subject: In 2022, Freedom is on the Ballot
body:
[****](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=af43be6525b14a05a98ebfa51b2544d6&_e=_2vvyhzHkR68o_zdhAkV8UcEW4EdjVUmOVFM1cUjonY0tPD5enXnsXyUkFEKevm7pPQW1dnVWNEjd8M90OqTx42SmTGgLW3SUP1FhLc_TQrq5WLkC5eSBNldUwF1WRyiYfg6-CY79XJAuZ9IkBcyUGSTVR6p_TITsHKzpLWLKRwHmz0kTkeUkA08-ubylzok9fFYzsberygbMScHCansClNDPN09eIbnl6ej3g1qDpYsgHSzAsmExSEGCcUDMJRaqnAjOiLHo1IjaLLoEATXKCHjihjEiZJamFmorJEcYdf9oTyAkxWxhGNfjAG06805mCiuebfbVeOAlIDcMl4T-WToudTTeWGXhdpMTm1klwC2A75Yu8IgBal3k3ZPxtC43XvL-_xbu0wvBxw52IJvuA%3D%3D)
Friend,
We're getting ready for an election in 2022 that will set the course for generations of Floridians.
Will Florida continue serving as an oasis of freedom, blazing the path for other states to follow? Or will Florida turn into a dystopian wasteland like we've seen happen under Democratic leadership across the country?
**[CHIP IN $20.22 TO HELP RE-ELECT GOVERNOR DESANTIS IN 2022 >>> ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=af43be6525b14a05a98ebfa51b2544d6&_e=_2vvyhzHkR68o_zdhAkV8UcEW4EdjVUmOVFM1cUjonY0tPD5enXnsXyUkFEKevm7pPQW1dnVWNEjd8M90OqTx42SmTGgLW3SUP1FhLc_TQrq5WLkC5eSBNldUwF1WRyiYfg6-CY79XJAuZ9IkBcyUGSTVR6p_TITsHKzpLWLKRwHmz0kTkeUkA08-ubylzokdSLsecqQBFuAvMDa87ZicNV8coiB5bBONzB3WqUfPJhCj1nSRjl4wAEEP_mrr_9VBgkbJd-IUPW1bRsYppWT1z6dzUUUVLVft4h-tnSTwligt15h-KsqgJhsMoDHXBzhAYL4mxBfoogVCsqUHLBmbSrJxEs57DIDdBlxVsEDc5JNu9rRnwAxJj8K7DcVeNbG2nhhl6Y6IlSqcZAbcRgZzQ%3D%3D)**
Governor DeSantis has spent the past 3 years creating a state that embraces freedom and acts as a bastion of opportunity for all Floridians. He's stood toe to toe with tyrants who want nothing more than to strip you of your liberty._** But our governor has REFUSED to back down.**_
Florida has a governor who doesn't believe "15 days to slow the spread" should turn into "3 jabs or lose your job." He doesn't believe our children should be required to wear a mask in school all day or be force-fed Democratic indoctrination that teaches some children they are oppressors and others they are oppressed simply because of the color of their skin.
Instead of locking people down, Governor DeSantis spent the past 3 years lifting people up. He's protected our environment AND our economy. People are beating down the door to live in Florida and open businesses in our state thanks to Governor DeSantis.
**[CHIP IN $20.22 TO REELECT GOVERNOR DESANTIS IN 2022>>> ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=af43be6525b14a05a98ebfa51b2544d6&_e=_2vvyhzHkR68o_zdhAkV8UcEW4EdjVUmOVFM1cUjonY0tPD5enXnsXyUkFEKevm7pPQW1dnVWNEjd8M90OqTx42SmTGgLW3SUP1FhLc_TQrq5WLkC5eSBNldUwF1WRyiYfg6-CY79XJAuZ9IkBcyUGSTVR6p_TITsHKzpLWLKRwHmz0kTkeUkA08-ubylzokHT5jPi-FgtPLSWEf3-mdUl8GohscV-hP7oMcNuKHY6Ek-TLISmqQH4eUj0UDlWoLVuGAhc5fCNOh-cSbVvPACwmXwlUmR4t2uDHZmoLqBTp4E0kLNQPhv0q4mbMpH1QgcbBCggbueve_TWzSsRUzVPWwrewJMWhBJbaeEqrTNzq1U1ihgpYXnV1iLsedyso43GuPhVESBG2YlqXvFarCww%3D%3D)**
But, with the 2022 election, Democrats want to change all of that. Florida will descend into a downhill spiral if Democrats take control. Individual liberty and common sense will be relics of the past.
**We can 't allow that to happen to our great state.**
**[Friend, can we count on you to help us continue the fight for a free Florida? We can't do this fight without your support. Chip in $20.22 to reelect Governor DeSantis in 2022! ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=af43be6525b14a05a98ebfa51b2544d6&_e=_2vvyhzHkR68o_zdhAkV8UcEW4EdjVUmOVFM1cUjonY0tPD5enXnsXyUkFEKevm7pPQW1dnVWNEjd8M90OqTx42SmTGgLW3SUP1FhLc_TQrq5WLkC5eSBNldUwF1WRyiYfg6-CY79XJAuZ9IkBcyUGSTVR6p_TITsHKzpLWLKRwHmz0kTkeUkA08-ubylzok-E7J-C1n0GfYw8Xqs_-_3k3bP4mJlXKadyZpqw5p9GSfaW8iHWyN9sfPKX-sWaVHGyzgeqCnoI5G-jMauojAJHfeZN7iZ-PVa-mXUZ597yQrOSNtS6WIILKjspA85GZqXFek8CDD3UHKliL7XTWpe3pu53XsUIv7dVdiKaA5uAoiyGA0KpjZZL8eSCuz1GvHL3HWQW3Wb219pG9p9ulMdw%3D%3D)**

Team DeSantis

# Scott's Feeling Confident About 2022
---
|
---
| Friend—

I don't know about you, but the idea of Republicans taking back the House and Senate scares the crap out of us. The last time Republicans controlled both the House and Senate, they come __**EXTREMELY**__ close to gutting the Affordable Care Act. With Republicans attacking education and women's health, who knows what will happen if they gain the majority again.

We need your help. [**With so much at stake this year, will you chip in $10 to help us fire Scott Fitzgerald and help Democrats maintain their majority in the House?**](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=2ece64b6a8&e=42a933bda9)

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom Attacks Me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Newsom's Civics Lesson](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioobZ-eLYjqEApr5FeYTZqbK3oBODGuPeRoDPLFOQOWbtA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_3_final&n=1) Gavin Newsom ended 2021 with a flourish. As the Sacramento Bee reports in an article headlined [Newsom vs. Kiley](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=XEyBOVdeaP2GIXMB8tk43jY2eib-_ayV0AZNbJJQNJpWhQSU08Q6sbYuXOec9pdhPA_lejZ4Neu_UBvU-wfnWzOQ9tU-mh-876UL2RT14gITI8yDj0pgp38B7fgh1mBr&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_3_final&n=2): _Newsom took a rare jab at one of his loudest critics last week, when his office put out a statement suggesting Assemblyman Kevin Kiley might need “a basic refresher course on how the legislature and a separate branch of government works._ ” Yes, the Governor who literally [proclaimed himself](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzior-c-fqmlRvKfB26__PL8e_nfdx0_zOdPGJPwYAie-Ep9cpqd1tf4UdS4eeQJle-geHKpThOqQVdh9b11g1womZ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_3_final&n=3) an autocrat tried to lecture me about the separation of powers. His goal, following a backlash, was to distance himself from my removal as Education Vice Chair. Today that “separate branch of government,” the Legislature, reconvened for a new session. To start the year I’m renewing my legislation to ban vaccine passports throughout California, given that the rationale for them has collapsed entirely. But the arrival of legislators wasn’t the most significant event at the Capitol today. The true civics lesson was provided to Newsom by parents who gathered to protest his outrageous student mandate. You can see my remarks at the rally [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRazbeUwnGE-wF2FEw-QVBbz&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_3_final&n=4). We begin 2022 with the nation’s only K-12 mandate and the highest measure of insanity across the board. Yet we also begin the year with a movement that is stronger than ever, that's poised to take on the failed leadership of both Sacramento and Washington. [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lRRCK90LByd_IZ7SYQ32hXdGYSh_QNx24op8gCjcFPsRBdD_8OFMVw-LIYJSa42Tf3O8uSDnhSnw1pBgoHHxbWYm6rA3Ai_hdtC1BBj9h4_H6yyX8tN0cVMLI6zynoFQQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_3_final&n=5) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_3_final&n=6)California Legislator
Paid for by Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_3_final&n=7).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: Tune in to watch Bill McSwain in the first GOP Gubernatorial debate
body:
Wednesday, January 5th at 7pm, Bill McSwain will take the stage LIVE at Dickinson College. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/tune-in-to-watch-bill-mcswain-in-the-first-gop-gubernatorial-debate?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| | **A Message From Bill McSwain **
---
| Friend,

The first GOP gubernatorial debate is this week! On **Wednesday, January 5th at 7:00pm** , I'll take the stage at Dickinson College to make my case for protecting security, family, and freedom as Governor of Pennsylvania.

The debate will be broadcast LIVE on PCN. More information on how to watch via your TV or online is [available here](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=a7591d6d4a&e=b1ec95759b).

I hope that you will tune in to hear more about my plans to uphold law and order, promote economic growth and security, and fight to keep Pennsylvania free from government overreach.
Our campaign to restore Liberty to our great Commonwealth is growing every day because of supporters like you. This is only the beginning!

Yours in the fight,

Bill McSwain
_Republican Candidate for Governor
U.S. Marine Commander
U.S. Attorney appointed by Trump_

name: Vernon Jones for Governor
subject: Press Release: Georgia's Governor Follows Vernon Jones
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jones for Georgia JonesforGeorgia
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 4, 2022
PRESS CONTACT: GAPRESS@JONESFORGEORGIA.COM
---
| | |
---
| |
---
PRESS RELEASE: Georgia's Governor Follows Vernon Jones
---
Statement by Gubernatorial candidate & former State Rep.Vernon Jones (R)
---
| |
---
|
---
| ATLANTA, FULTON COUNTY - "I'm glad to see Governor Kemp follow my lead in supporting Constitutional Carry, which I outlined in my Contract with Georgia. During his 2018 campaign stump, Kemp sat on the back of a truck with an empty shotgun and said, I hunt, I Shoot, and I Carry. But the truth of the matter is, he hid in Joe Biden's basement and did nothing to pass Constitutional Carry until it was time for his re-election."
Statement by Vernon Jones.
Vernon Jones for Governor Office:404-540-4556 Email:teamjones@jonesforgeorgia.com
---
|
---
| |
---
About Vernon Jones
---
| |
---
Vernon Jones is running to be the next Governor of the state of Georgia. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running to defeat Brian Kemp, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia First and Take Georgia Back.

---
|

name: American Update
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8384%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=sznU6aLER3w3zNHFU2KG8g&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11907%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iz7aRsyZohUDDJyt2cm7xQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well.
Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time.
How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges?
Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_.
Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.
Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.”
That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves.
**So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
_**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more.
The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11908%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qP%2fMPpt7JoSEKmXCalcz1Q&sysid=1) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long.
Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11909%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2pCijl2As5cbdae9aqe3VA&sysid=1)
Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8384%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=sznU6aLER3w3zNHFU2KG8g&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8384%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=sznU6aLER3w3zNHFU2KG8g&sysid=1)

name: Ann Coulter
subject: How to stop the intolerant left
body:
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the Un
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq1s6db880lrc2r51alhe0aoc5utn451idim0bl0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpj2c70cjjr8dj4s2r39ohgmpp3bdjkmpib3cpimeq3aob6eqp38ttm6cr38djgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lib6ob0eti6cd30mdi3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5i64p71c1h6aoh5u)
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. Here's one thing you can do about it that can really make a difference.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z30ofvu4737f10s10im0gprg9mq0aaaa0v8p2fho_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9ie2o32clh2bs) Fellow Conservative, **College campuses have gone absolutely insane.** A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-called “birthplace of the free speech movement.” As you may have heard, my speech was abruptly canceled because leftist thugs decided to riot and the administration wouldn’t stick up for free speech. Unfortunately, I’m not the only one to suffer threats and intimidation on campus. Far from it. [ **Fight the intolerant left on campus** ](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4qvjch2mev545ejitov3vh9qkfdcmc154os8120_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9ie2o32clh2bs) As I point out in _Resistance is Futile: How the Trump-Hating Left Lost Its Collective Mind_ , ever since Donald Trump’s arrival in politics, **liberals have lost their minds.** But there’s no padded room to keep them contained! Instead, **these violent, masked lunatics have taken over college campuses, where young Americans are turned into automaton leftists just like themselves.** Young conservatives on college campuses across our nation are losing their right to free speech – and even the right to walk down the street without getting sucker punched – because of how intolerant the liberals have become. [**But lest you think I’ve given up hope, faithful conservative, there’s a group I trust that fights back against this onslaught and exposes leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination on college campuses for all the world to see:_Campus Reform_.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z93qfer56o1habealv7ur0bv286hi5fpo60o9b1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9ie2o32clh2bs) **Campus Reform, a project of the Leadership Institute, is the single most powerful force for campus free speech in America today.** By sticking up for conservative students and giving them the tools necessary to defend themselves and their principles, Campus Reform provides an absolutely essential public service. **Bottom line – Campus Reform uncovers the liberal schemes that the mainstream media wants to keep hidden... and they shut down the liberals’ indoctrination on campus after campus.** [**To continue their vital work, Campus Reform counts on the generous support of conservatives just like you – yes, you! – which is why I urge you to partner with them today by making a generous gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more right now.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5nrqmoq6tgkq5k0j6qagpp67u54150dudulq1ag_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9ie2o32clh2bs) And to sweeten the pot – when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book, _Resistance is Futile_. Saving young conservatives AND getting a free book? What a deal! [ **Get my book here** ](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zau1f4tsn70s4stq8gcrm7dlnr11im7j9fvehbe0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9ie2o32clh2bs) Campus police at the College of DuPage in Illinois told conservative students they’d **“lock them up” for handing out copies of the U.S. Constitution.** Yes, that dangerous document that the created the greatest country ever known to man. A teaching assistant at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln harassed the student president of a conservative group for recruiting students. With a gesture from her middle finger, she shrieked profanities at the conservative student and called her a “neo-fascist” and “Nazi.” Charming. At Purdue University in Indiana, a staffer called conservatives “vile, racist idiots” and **threatened to rape pro-life students.** (And you wonder why liberals prefer violence to debate.) In all three cases, LI’s Campus Reform exposed the truth. Armed with investigative reports from their student correspondents on campus, Campus Reform got word out to their nationwide audience of concerned conservatives. And they brought it to news outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, the Blaze, and numerous talk radio shows. Ultimately, Campus Reform’s exposure of the truth got _results_. In these cases and many others, **Campus Reform’s quick and powerful action forced universities to change their anti-conservative policies, discipline leftist student groups, and suspend or fire radical professors.** I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform’s fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won’t be won overnight. **To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help.** [**Please make a generous investment of $25, $35, $50, or more today to support the Leadership Institute’s Campus Reform, stand up to liberal indoctrination, and ensure conservative students don’t lose their freedoms on college campuses.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z243kur9n4ci3vglpl7vophjsst50lqn45emiugg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9ie2o32clh2bs) Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. [**Please help Campus Reform right away so they can empower conservative students and strike back at the lunatic liberals.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3c56up8qrokftsotij0nipf27cvcufd9qsmqqmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9ie2o32clh2bs) Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter **P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,_Resistance is Futile_.** It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because **if we lose the kids, we lose this country.** [**Please donate right away.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqc6u7bgtqctpnjus89lbs1amj6mb0oefq9co030_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9ie2o32clh2bs) Thank you.** [ **Yes, I'll join Campus Reform in the fight against leftist tyranny** ](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4hvtsfu8vrn5aktubsnfj89pgun67ccptfcd0eg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9ie2o32clh2bs)

In these cases and many others, Campus Reform’s quick and powerful action forced universities to change their anti-conservative policies, discipline leftist student groups, and suspend or fire radical professors. I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform’s fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won’t be won overnight. To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help. Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,Resistance is Futile. It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because if we lose the kids, we lose this country. Thank you.** | | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Friends , as Jan. 6, 2022 approaches, I want to share my view on the events and narratives that lead to the assault on the Capitol one year ago. **"Rep. Jack Bergman holds serious culpability for assault on U.S. Democracy” – Dr. Bob Lorinser** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40339272/323909262/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDZjMzQxYi01MDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Q7g5qs8TuXDN9umDqD9EpP0nReUMTjFUEodgtAk_js=) **_As Jan. 6, 2022 approaches, Dr. Bob Lorinser – candidate for U.S. Congress opposing incumbent Rep. Jack Bergman – reminds voters of the events and narratives that lead to the assault on the Capitol one year ago._** [CONTRIBUTE TO PRESERVE OUR UNION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40339273/323909263/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDZjMzQxYi01MDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Q7g5qs8TuXDN9umDqD9EpP0nReUMTjFUEodgtAk_js=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40339274/323909264/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDZjMzQxYi01MDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Q7g5qs8TuXDN9umDqD9EpP0nReUMTjFUEodgtAk_js=) [ON-CLICK IMMEDIATE $29 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40339275/323909265/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDZjMzQxYi01MDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Q7g5qs8TuXDN9umDqD9EpP0nReUMTjFUEodgtAk_js=) WASHINGTON, DC. – As we approach the tragic anniversary of the Jan. 6, 2021 assault on the Capitol, let me be very clear – My opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman, may not have planned or participated directly in the riots, but he holds serious blame for the cause. Jack Bergman perpetuated a narrative that supported an attack on our Nation's Capitol. He pushed a conspiracy theory that had no basis in truth, nor was it fueled by any evidence. Instead, he instilled fear and anger into his constituency that motivated them to travel to D.C. and commit acts of crime against our Republic. The events of that day led to over 700 people being charged with crimes and five people dead. Jack Bergman's role in these events is serious. When leaders speak without regard to the truth, the fallout can be extreme. Jack was complicit, complacent, and endorsed the #BigLie. These behaviors are the textbook definition of demagoguery. **Three strikes, and you are out.** **Strike #1** One year ago, out of blind, amoral loyalty, my opponent postured for political points and objected to the results of a free and fair election. His allegations of voter fraud were fabricated, made up. The vast majority of voters and the objective data — including conservative-led audits — do not subscribe to the myth of widespread voter fraud. **Strike #2** On Jan. 6, 2021, Congress met jointly to certify the winner of the Electoral College vote, typically a ceremonial affair. It was far from ordinary. Following the first domestic attack on the Capitol, Jack voted against the certification of the election. After Rep. Bergman's recent attempt to block the votes of hundreds of thousands of his constituents, should he be allowed to be our Representative? What or who prompted Congressman Bergman to do this? **Strike #3** Time and again, Jack disregarded facts. Even when his constituents asked him whether President Joe Biden was legitimately elected, he and lead members of his staff could not or would not answer, 'yes.' When asked if he regrets his vote to undermine our democracy, my opponent responded, "Short answer 'No.' Long answer 'Hell no.'" His response is despicable. Jack told this untruth with the reckless abandonment of the consequences and disregarded our Constitution. Unfortunately, my opponent then doubled down on the lie and has yet to admit culpability. **Doubling down on a lie isn't strength. It's dishonorable.** Every American has the right to disagree with the policies of any elected official. It's even dutiful to speak up against policies with which we disapprove. The beauty of a democracy is we can express our distaste for the President and speak up against their performance. Voters may not like the result of any given election, but a Congressman repeatedly challenging Presidential election results without evidence or facts is wrong and dangerous. After an exhaustive, eight-month, taxpayer-funded investigation, Michigan Republican State Senator Ed McBroom — who represents a large portion of our district — said, "There is no evidence presented at this time to prove either significant acts of fraud or that an organized, wide-scale effort to commit fraudulent activity was perpetrated in order to subvert the will of Michigan voters." **How should Jack Bergman be held accountable for these actions?** In the best way possible — by a free and fair election. It is my hope the constituency of Michigan's First District votes to unelect Jack Bergman this November and hold him accountable for his dishonesty, poor leadership, and brazen disregard for the sanctity of our elections. Let's use the power of democracy to bring ethical, honest, transparent, and moral leadership to Congress for Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. I would be honored to serve in this capacity for the great people of the First District. Regardless of anyone's political affiliations, no one deserves to be lied to. Republican, Democrat, Libertarian, or Green, _all _citizens deserve representation. We must be able to entrust our leaders to provide citizens with the truth. Honesty is the most basic expectation of leadership. Our district deserves a Representative who believes in democracy and will honor the will of the people. Congress is no place for liars. It's time to retire Jack Bergman. – Dr. Bob [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40339276/323909266/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDZjMzQxYi01MDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Q7g5qs8TuXDN9umDqD9EpP0nReUMTjFUEodgtAk_js=) **_The Dr. Bob Lorinser campaign for U.S. Congress started a new fundraising quarter on Jan. 1, 2022. After successfully completing a three-month, six-figure milestone, the campaign seeks to expand outreach to the new 1st Congressional District in Michigan, comprising of six new counties across nearly 30,000 square miles. This effort takes a lot of resources._**[**Can you chip in**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40339277/323909267/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDZjMzQxYi01MDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Q7g5qs8TuXDN9umDqD9EpP0nReUMTjFUEodgtAk_js=)** _today?_** [MAKE A CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40339278/323909268/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDZjMzQxYi01MDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Q7g5qs8TuXDN9umDqD9EpP0nReUMTjFUEodgtAk_js=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40339279/323909269/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDZjMzQxYi01MDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Q7g5qs8TuXDN9umDqD9EpP0nReUMTjFUEodgtAk_js=) [ON-CLICK IMMEDIATE $29 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40339280/323909270/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDZjMzQxYi01MDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Q7g5qs8TuXDN9umDqD9EpP0nReUMTjFUEodgtAk_js=) You may [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9df52e5b-206d-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e/1d6c341b-506d-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDZjMzQxYi01MDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Q7g5qs8TuXDN9umDqD9EpP0nReUMTjFUEodgtAk_js=&id=116937387). clean_body: Peter, We're getting ready for an election in 2022 that will set the course for generations of Floridians. Will Florida continue serving as an oasis of freedom, blazing the path for other states to follow? Or will Florida turn into a dystopian wasteland like we've seen happen under Democratic leadership across the country? Governor DeSantis has spent the past 3 years creating a state that embraces freedom and acts as a bastion of opportunity for all Floridians. He's stood toe to toe with tyrants who want nothing more than to strip you of your liberty. But our governor has REFUSED to back down. Florida has a governor who doesn't believe "15 days to slow the spread" should turn into "3 jabs or lose your job." He doesn't believe our children should be required to wear a mask in school all day or be force-fed Democratic indoctrination that teaches some children they are oppressors and others they are oppressed simply because of the color of their skin. Instead of locking people down, Governor DeSantis spent the past 3 years lifting people up. He's protected our environment AND our economy. People are beating down the door to live in Florida and open businesses in our state thanks to Governor DeSantis. But, with the 2022 election, Democrats want to change all of that. Florida will descend into a downhill spiral if Democrats take control. Individual liberty and common sense will be relics of the past. We can 't allow that to happen to our great state. name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Cobb State Rep. Seabaugh endorses Jake for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | For immediate release January 4th, 2022 Contact: (470) 588-2028, news@jakeevans.org
Cobb State Rep. Seabaugh endorses Jake for Congress State Rep. Devan Seabaugh of Cobb County has endorsed Jake Evans' campaign for the Sixth Congressional District, saying Jake will continue the strong legacy of conservative leadership in the Sixth District established by Newt Gingrich, Johnny Isakson and Tom Price. "Georgia Republicans need new blood, new energy and a new generation of conservatives to step forward and begin to fight for our country, and Jake Evans is the best candidate to do that," said Seabaugh. "As a healthcare executive, I appreciate that Jake will seek conservative solutions that provide affordable access to high-quality care while fighting the Democrats' demand for a socialist approach. Our country is on the line, and we need Republican leadership that's visionary and unafraid to stand up for our values." Jake said Seabaugh's special election win by a significant margin speaks to the respect he has in his Cobb County community. "Devan is a great addition to our General Assembly, and he's going to do a great job representing the people of Cobb County and the state as a whole," Jake said. "I'm honored to have his support in this race, and like him, I'll never stop working to earn every vote because I want to be part of the Great American Comeback -- when Republicans reclaim control of the House in 2023 and begin to get our country back on the right path."
---

subject: I’m Going to Commit A Radical Act…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| | |
---
| | Peter
Democrats want to make some simple truths FORBIDDEN to say.

---
So, I'm going to commit a radical act. I'm going to speak the _truth_.
---
|
| America is the GREATEST country on Earth. Christopher Columbus discovering America was a good thing. George Washington was an extraordinary national hero. Thomas Jefferson was an extraordinary national hero. Abraham Lincoln was an extraordinary national hero. Police Officers keep us safe. Israel is our friend. COVID-19 came from CHINA. There is a difference between men and women. Critical Race Theory is RACIST. It shouldn't be taught in schools.

---

Sadly, for Democrats these basic truths (and many others) are unspeakable.

---
| | | **FREE SPEECH ****FUND**
****
---
| | **[**DONATE NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59164353:J4XMzuEIN:m:1:3253819041:DD4C186B66FB1614D68B1452C0E20AAF:r)**
---
| | We must say them __loudly and often__ to save our country and culture.
If you agree, please click to [donate now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59164353:J4XMzuEIN:m:1:3253819041:DD4C186B66FB1614D68B1452C0E20AAF:r), and help my campaign to build a national movement to defeat Democrats' far-left ideological lies and their progressive political front that hates America...

I will never stop speaking the truth and never stop speaking up for YOU!

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

subject: Permanently Suspended
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59164464:J43SnuExN:m:1:3103520637:65A97DFA522E16F0D6599837DE9C4E8B:r "ALERT") [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59164464:J43SnuExN:m:1:3103520637:65A97DFA522E16F0D6599837DE9C4E8B:r "Twitter") Peter, **Twitter has Permanently suspended my account** - all because I refuse to follow Dr. Fauci's lies and Joe Biden's mandates. Since I got to Washington, the radical left and their friends in Silicon Valley have done everything they can to shut me up: from censure votes, to suspending my accounts several times last year, to gerrymandering my district, to funding my liberal opponent, and lying about me in every media outlet who will print their false attacks against me. **I guess this means we 're winning when they don't take a day off from trying to stop me!** I am not afraid of the radical left, and it's clear they **WANT ME GONE**. That's why they're throwing everything at me, including the kitchen sink after I sounded the clarion call about their attempts to turn us from free citizens into socialist slaves. **They can't stop me from exposing their lies, but if you act now, we can show them how freedom-loving Americans won 't be intimidated by their tactics.** **[Help me put an end to the left's socialist agenda by donating at least $35 TODAY! Together, we can stand up to Biden and Fauci's attempts to control our lives.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59164465:J43SnuExN:m:1:3103520637:65A97DFA522E16F0D6599837DE9C4E8B:r "Help
me put an end to the left’s socialist agenda by donating at least $35 TODAY! Together, we can stand up to Biden and Fauci’s attempts to
control our lives.")** The entire liberal establishment, from the Silicon Valley Cartel to Sleepy Joe, to their friends in the media, are coming down on any American who dares to question the liberal vaccine plan and expose their attempts to control our lives. As a duly elected Member of Congress, my tweets don't fit their narrative, so I'm permanently suspended, but Twitter happily makes up its own rules to protect the radical left:
* They blocked tweets prior to the Nov 2020 election that exposed the content of Hunter Biden's laptop.
* They didn't suspend anyone who falsely accused Kyle Rittenhouse of being a white supremacist.
* Andrew and Chris Cuomo still have accounts after Andrew was accused by 11+ women of serial sexual abuse that forced him to resign and Chris was complicit in the cover-up.
* BLM continues to post regularly after burning down billions of dollars worth of property nationwide.
* AOC wasn't suspended for tweets condoning violence against the NYPD.
* Ilhan Omar was allowed to promote her anti-Israel and anti-Semitic statements, and
* The rest of the Jihad Squad has been permitted to relentlessly post false and Anti-American statements intended to divide our nation.

It is up to freedom-loving Americans like you and me to stand up and reclaim our nation from Silicon Valley and the radical left RIGHT NOW. **[Donate $50, $100 or even $1,000 and help me continue to fight the radical left before they win the battle to steal our freedoms.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59164466:J43SnuExN:m:1:3103520637:65A97DFA522E16F0D6599837DE9C4E8B:r "Donate
$50, $100 or even $1,000 and help me continue to fight the radical left before they win the battle to steal our freedoms.")** **Sadly, for the radical left, I was duly elected to Congress as a strong Republican woman who is determined to impeach Joe Biden and put an end to his plan to force vaccines and socialism on Americans,_and that 's what I intend to do._** Just like President Trump (our greatest President), Twitter suspended me because I question the efficacy of Biden and Fauci's attempts to limit how free citizens handle the COVID pandemic. They've failed and they know it--that's why they don't want me to have a bullhorn to expose them. **[If you support my attempts to stop the radical socialist agenda in Washington and give the power back to the people where it belongs, then please donate $50, $100 or $250 TODAY!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59164467:J43SnuExN:m:1:3103520637:65A97DFA522E16F0D6599837DE9C4E8B:r "If you support my attempts to stop the radical socialist agenda
in Washington and give the power back to the people where it belongs, then please donate $50, $100 or $250 TODAY!")** **_WHY ARE THEY SO WORRIED ABOUT LITTLE OLD ME?_** **_They know I 'll win the battle this year to stop their socialist plan and impeach Joe Biden. They already know that when I have freedom-loving Americans like you in my corner we win and they can't accept that reality._** **[Will you join me and donate $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY to keep the left running scared? We can't waste a single moment in taking our nation back and stopping Biden's radical, socialist agenda.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59164466:J43SnuExN:m:1:3103520637:65A97DFA522E16F0D6599837DE9C4E8B:r "Will you join me and donate $50,
$100, or even $1,000 TODAY to keep the left running scared? We can’t waste a single moment in taking our nation back and stopping Biden’s
radical, socialist agenda.")** They _can change all the rules they want in their efforts to silence me; IT WON 'T WORK._ God Bless America, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59164464:J43SnuExN:m:1:3103520637:65A97DFA522E16F0D6599837DE9C4E8B:r "Marjorie
Taylor Greene")

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Do you want to have dinner with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC
body:
We have an important strategy to discuss | Time is almost up on your chance to have dinner with yours truly.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59163814:6jpCBuENm:m:1:3299561967:6DF600066677625D9BE486EC051D35BE:r)

Patriot,

I have an _**URGENT**_ message for you.

Time is almost up on your chance to have dinner **with yours truly.** This opportunity has only been offered to my TOP supporters, that's why I am reaching out to YOU personally, Patriot.

_Your opportunity to have dinner with me is almost over, so you must act TODAY or it will be gone forever._

**[Please contribute at least $25 TODAY to enter for a chance to have dinner with me in FLORIDA.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59163814:6jpCBuENm:m:1:3299561967:6DF600066677625D9BE486EC051D35BE:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59163814:6jpCBuENm:m:1:3299561967:6DF600066677625D9BE486EC051D35BE:r)

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59163815:6jpCBuENm:m:1:3299561967:6DF600066677625D9BE486EC051D35BE:r)

[CONTRIBUTE $150 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59163816:6jpCBuENm:m:1:3299561967:6DF600066677625D9BE486EC051D35BE:r)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59163817:6jpCBuENm:m:1:3299561967:6DF600066677625D9BE486EC051D35BE:r)

[CONTRIBUTE $25 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59163814:6jpCBuENm:m:1:3299561967:6DF600066677625D9BE486EC051D35BE:r)

[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59163818:6jpCBuENm:m:1:3299561967:6DF600066677625D9BE486EC051D35BE:r)

This is more than just a regular old dinner, I also want to discuss our CRUCIAL 2022 election strategy with someone I can trust. _That's why I am reaching out to YOU._

Patriot, I may NEVER do something like this again, and I REALLY want to meet a great supporter, like YOU. Will you step up for me?

_**[Please contribute at least $25 TODAY to enter for a chance to have dinner with your favorite President in Florida.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59163814:6jpCBuENm:m:1:3299561967:6DF600066677625D9BE486EC051D35BE:r)**_

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59163814:6jpCBuENm:m:1:3299561967:6DF600066677625D9BE486EC051D35BE:r)
Donald J. Trump
45th President of the United States

[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59163814:6jpCBuENm:m:1:3299561967:6DF600066677625D9BE486EC051D35BE:r)

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution use this _[form.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59163818:6jpCBuENm:m:1:3299561967:6DF600066677625D9BE486EC051D35BE:r)_ To enter without making a contribution, click _[here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59163819:6jpCBuENm:m:1:3299561967:6DF600066677625D9BE486EC051D35BE:r)**.**_**** The Promotion begins on Wednesday, December 1st, 2021, at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Wednesday, January 5th, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm EST January 5th, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: transportation for one (1), made at the discretion of Elise for Congress, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $750; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the Palm Beach, FL hotels, with an approximate retail value of $400; one (1) ticket to the Elise For Congress roundtable with President Trump Dinner, with an approximate retail value of $150; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $100. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $1,400. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of maturity as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the _[Official Rules.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59163820:6jpCBuENm:m:1:3299561967:6DF600066677625D9BE486EC051D35BE:r)_**** The Sponsor is Elise for Congress, PO Box 500, Glens Falls, NY 12801.
Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Donaldjtrump.com
Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219

[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59163821:6jpCBuENm:m:1:3299561967:6DF600066677625D9BE486EC051D35BE:r)

The momentum is on our side.

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Inauguration: One year ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Peter,One year ago today, I took the oath of office to serve as your congressman. It's been the honor of a lifetime, _**and our work is only beginning! **_I wanted to share with you some highlights of the past year (read on for more), but the year _ahead_ is going to be the bigger priority. [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curpo-yuhdluddtl-r/) [TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curpo-yuhdluddtl-y/) [AVERAGE 2021 CONTRIBUTION - $59](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curpo-yuhdluddtl-j/) **We have a lot of work to do this year to take back Congress.** But with your help, the majority is within reach! We're only FIVE seats away from the majority, and the political winds are at our back in 2022.This past year was tough for Americans, but people are **waking up** to the massive failures from Biden, AOC, Pelosi, and the radical liberals in Congress. While they were **opening our borders** , **killing our freedom** , and **spending us into oblivion** , I was getting the job done for Wisconsin.
* Voted against Joe Biden's tax-and-spend legislation that would send inflation even higher
* Fully funded our military and voted for a 2.7% pay hike for our troops
* Proudly sponsored HR 18, the No Taxpayer Funding for Abortion Act
* Introduced the SOFA Act, to permanently designate fentanyl as a schedule I drug
* Fought Critical Race Theory with the CRT Transparency Act, to ensure parents can easily review the curriculum for their children's education
* Stood tall for SECURE, HONEST elections by fighting HR 1

That's just scratching the surface. I hope you know that I will ALWAYS fight to stand up for our American values (including life and the 2nd Amendment), hold Big Tech accountable, and fight AGAINST a federal takeover of our elections! Will you join me as we FINISH THE JOB in 2022?[**I know I can count on you.**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curpo-yuhdluddtl-t/) Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [AVERAGE 2021 CONTRIBUTION - $59](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curpo-yuhdluddtl-h/) [JOIN US - TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY IN 2022 >>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curpo-yuhdluddtl-k/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curpo-yuhdluddtl-u/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curpo-yuhdluddtl-o/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curpo-yuhdluddtl-b/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-curpo-D494E01E-yuhdluddtl-n) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-u-curpo-yuhdluddtl-p/)

name: Rand Paul
subject: re: big news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59166430:JhwEtuEeN:m:1:3298722022:7FC23D6A951F909B0EDF9A6E59C15FFF:r) | |
---
Peter, in just the last few years, we've seen liberal government wreak havoc on our way of life.

From nationwide rioting and violent protests to unconstitutional lockdowns, to mask mandates and record-setting inflation, Americans are facing difficult times.

And an out-of-control, Democrat-led Congress and liberal president in the White House isn't helping. Instead of providing solutions, they continue to pour billions of taxpayer dollars into pet projects and bad investments.

That's why today, I'm officially announcing my campaign for reelection to serve the people of Kentucky - and the whole liberty movement - in the Senate for another term.

**[STAND WITH RAND: CHIP IN TO SUPPORT RE-ELECTION >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59166430:JhwEtuEeN:m:1:3298722022:7FC23D6A951F909B0EDF9A6E59C15FFF:r)**

I know this race won't be easy -- we have tough challenges ahead.
** **
The bureaucrats in our government, the pro-censorship leaders in big-tech, and the anti-freedom liberals in the media will do anything they can to make sure we don't succeed.
** **
That's why I want to start off with a big goal - to make sure we're prepared for whatever comes next. I'm pledging today to raise $100,000 for the launch of this campaign and I hope you'll join me by chipping in now.
__
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59166430:JhwEtuEeN:m:1:3298722022:7FC23D6A951F909B0EDF9A6E59C15FFF:r)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59166430:JhwEtuEeN:m:1:3298722022:7FC23D6A951F909B0EDF9A6E59C15FFF:r)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $35**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59166430:JhwEtuEeN:m:1:3298722022:7FC23D6A951F909B0EDF9A6E59C15FFF:r)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $45**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59166430:JhwEtuEeN:m:1:3298722022:7FC23D6A951F909B0EDF9A6E59C15FFF:r)
The stakes are just too high to let the liberals maintain control in Washington.

You're already feeling the damage they've done!

* Gas prices are up 40%
* Groceries cost up to 6% more
* Rent, cars, and energy prices are skyrocketing
* _Americans are struggling. _

It's hitting us hard all over the nation.

And here in Kentucky, where we're recovering not only from a pandemic but a statewide natural disaster, we simply cannot afford to continue down this path.

We must correct the course now. And we can do that by taking back the Senate and restoring a common-sense, pro-freedom approach to government.

**_Let 's not forget: we only need one seat to take control. _**

And I'm 100% confident that if we stand together now we can take a stand for liberty and win that one seat to take back the Senate in 2022.

Please, chip in what you can to make our launch a success and start this year off the right way: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3476970/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59166430:JhwEtuEeN:m:1:3298722022:7FC23D6A951F909B0EDF9A6E59C15FFF:r)**

Thank you in advance.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

From nationwide rioting and violent protests to unconstitutional lockdowns, to mask mandates and record-setting inflation, Americans are facing difficult times. And an out-of-control, Democrat-led Congress and liberal president in the White House isn't helping. Instead of providing solutions, they continue to pour billions of taxpayer dollars into pet projects and bad investments. That's why today, I'm officially announcing my campaign for reelection to serve the people of Kentucky - and the whole liberty movement - in the Senate for another term. I know this race won't be easy -- we have tough challenges ahead. The bureaucrats in our government, the pro-censorship leaders in big-tech, and the anti-freedom liberals in the media will do anything they can to make sure we don't succeed. That's why I want to start off with a big goal - to make sure we're prepared for whatever comes next. I'm pledging today to raise $100,000 for the launch of this campaign and I hope you'll join me by chipping in now. The stakes are just too high to let the liberals maintain control in Washington. You're already feeling the damage they've done! Gas prices are up 40% Groceries cost up to 6% more Rent, cars, and energy prices are skyrocketing Americans are struggling. It's hitting us hard all over the nation. And here in Kentucky, where we're recovering not only from a pandemic but a statewide natural disaster, we simply cannot afford to continue down this path. We must correct the course now. And we can do that by taking back the Senate and restoring a common-sense, pro-freedom approach to government. Let 's not forget: we only need one seat to take control. And I'm 100% confident that if we stand together now we can take a stand for liberty and win that one seat to take back the Senate in 2022. Please, chip in what you can to make our launch a success and start this year off the right way: Thank you in advance. All of the experts – from analysts at CNN to Roll Call – are calling Marco Rubio one of the most vulnerable senators in the country. **And with recent polling showing this race neck and neck, I need your support now more than ever. **

| | Team, 2021 was quite the year. And thanks to the support of this grassroots movement, we ended the year by beating our biggest fundraising goal **ever**. And we did it with hundreds and hundreds of grassroots donations from across our state. That’s a big deal. We’re showing everyone how we will win in November — neighbor to neighbor, arm in arm with one another. It’s this grassroots movement that’s going to power us to victory, and I know we’re just getting started. We had a great 2021 — we earned endorsements from progressive leaders and national organizations, built a winning team and hit our goals, and showed the future we can build for our state and our communities. You made this possible, and I can’t wait to see all we accomplish in 2022. Thank you for being a part of the team. Now, let’s go win. Saludos, Sonia

name: Don Huffines for Texas
subject: illegals are voting in Texas elections
body:
and they must be prosecuted [](https://dhcampaign.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curyklk-yuddtktydi-r/) Fellow Patriot, The Texas Secretary of State's office released a progress report on the ongoing audit of the 2020 election last week.The initial results from a minor review _prove that illegal aliens are voting in Texas elections. _**[That 's why I'm calling for the full audit of the 2020 election for lawbreakers to be prosecuted.](https://dhcampaign.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curyklk-yuddtktydi-y/)**Hundreds of votes appear to be cast by individuals from other states, hundreds of thousands of deceased voters were still on the rolls, and over 11,000 potential non-citizens were registered to vote . . . _So . . . how are the people of Texas supposed to have faith in their government if they can 't even trust that non-citizens don't influence elections?_This is just another consequence of the failed leadership of Greg Abbott. He has failed to secure our elections despite overseeing them for 20 years, has lowered the criminal penalties for those caught committing voter fraud, and continues to oppose efforts to implement a full forensic audit of our elections. When I am governor, we will conduct an audit and aggressively prosecute those engaged in voter fraud.**[DO YOU AGREE? ADD YOUR NAME](https://dhcampaign.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curyklk-yuddtktydi-j/)** For Texas, [](https://dhcampaign.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curyklk-yuddtktydi-t/) Don Huffines for Governor

name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: Do you remember this day?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee on behalf of Save America and the Make America Great Again PAC
body:
History was made
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=14218b1af212e7d2b4edc8245c0734df7e34d6575cdc3fb616d2b9ee1900ebe454d1c4caa4085c866154dbe92964efdbd649085015faea33)
Friend,

_**Five years ago this month, President Trump became the 45th President of the United States.**_

January 20th, 2017 was the day President Trump was inaugurated into office and officially began _Draining the Swamp._
[](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=14218b1af212e7d2b4edc8245c0734df7e34d6575cdc3fb616d2b9ee1900ebe454d1c4caa4085c866154dbe92964efdbd649085015faea33)
While most Presidents take things slow on their first day in the White House, President Trump had other plans. Just mere __**HOURS**__ after he was sworn in, he began fulfilling his promise to **Make America Great Again.**

_Friend, President Trump was a man of action from his first day in the White House. We sure miss having him as OUR President, and we want to know if you do as well._
[](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=14218b1af212e7d217612dc313b55c90e8adcd6e512dcad6b2336b26c5ecbc9f8b4128ae871d6eeb47e2c53a2bad2e48c732dc434aca16de)
At his inauguration, President Trump promised to unite all Americans and bring prosperity back to a country that had been losing it for so many years.

_**" We the citizens of America are now joined in a great national effort to rebuild our country and restore its promise for all of our people."**_

This defines what President Trump is all about: a man who sacrificed so much because he believed in standing for _**ALL**_ Americans _and restoring the American Dream for the forgotten men and women of this Country._

_Friend, President Trump is still fighting for EVERY SINGLE AMERICAN day in and day out. Will you still proudly stand with him?_

_**[Add your name NOW to publicly stand with President Trump as he fights to Save America.>>](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=14218b1af212e7d290650468c30f7180b1d39c50eb51ead9df378a9b14baf8e2131fdb4736440bf80105d7bc6ec7bb7647f87b6dadb9f14b)**_

President Trump's incredible inauguration is a day that will go down in the history books. While we look back and remember how much President Trump accomplished for the American people, it's important we don't forget that **Biden and the radical-Left are looking to erase all of President Trump 's progress.**

President Trump knows the 2022 Midterm Elections will be our last chance to FIGHT BACK. That's why he's calling on YOU to become an **[Official Trump Election Year Donor](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=14218b1af212e7d2b4edc8245c0734df7e34d6575cdc3fb616d2b9ee1900ebe454d1c4caa4085c866154dbe92964efdbd649085015faea33)** and help him SAVE AMERICA.

_**[Contribute any amount IMMEDIATELY to become an Official Trump Election Year Donor.>>](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=14218b1af212e7d2b4edc8245c0734df7e34d6575cdc3fb616d2b9ee1900ebe454d1c4caa4085c866154dbe92964efdbd649085015faea33)**_
[](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=14218b1af212e7d2b4edc8245c0734df7e34d6575cdc3fb616d2b9ee1900ebe454d1c4caa4085c866154dbe92964efdbd649085015faea33)

Thank you,

Team Trump
[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=14218b1af212e7d2b4edc8245c0734df7e34d6575cdc3fb616d2b9ee1900ebe454d1c4caa4085c866154dbe92964efdbd649085015faea33)

[](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=1697b18b10bf0c27a4eeb58ccfc3cfd7056a31e9658503a8b1f50c76ad076f9f3b64a18c792ccc48a0c12ddf3e1a8a9d0073eafaeb584d6b)

Thank you for joining Team Trump. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we've been able to consistently call out the Fake News media every single time they try to spread misinformation or outright lies about the important work President Trump is doing to Save America. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is critical if we're going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

[](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=1697b18b10bf0c2742dce2de8924d43d897b1038b5810b2e885269046cbe83db0d100cb09d331494d329a58e73df1c72b005a25b8d0fe863)

If you would like to opt out of important campaign updates like this, please _[click here.](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=0850345b25410abc7b17a44d6218dc4f5826b1f953429dd23bc7574dac65ab12377af0723d355d954a8c85462c8c6610d783b5e214b52ee1662e02841acfe9a4)_ If you would like to give feedback to the President, **[click here.](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=1697b18b10bf0c2742dce2de8924d43d897b1038b5810b2e885269046cbe83db0d100cb09d331494d329a58e73df1c72b005a25b8d0fe863)** It's because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like you Friend, that we will Save America! Thank you again for your generous support. name: Team Gearing
subject: Ready to knock?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Peter -

There are only 41 days left until early voting starts, and we need your help! Knocking on doors and having conversations with our neighbors about the future we want to see for our state is one of the most important, and rewarding, parts of campaigning.

Can you block walk with us to help spread the word about Charlie’s campaign? Sign up here >>> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/exMiHT4940qHQ_ffbwbq9w2]

Over the past few months, #TeamGearing has been out talking to voters across the 114th District on their doorsteps about Charlie’s vision to build a #BetterTexas for everyone, and we’ve been blown away by the excitement and support for our campaign. Texans are ready to elect strong leaders like Charlie who will go to Austin and work hard on the issues that impact us most here at home.

We’ll be out knocking this weekend, will you join us? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/exMiHT4940qHQ_ffbwbq9w2]

With your support, we can continue to build out our field program and reach voters all across our communities. Charlie can’t win this without your help, and he could use your help with your time (and your steps!) at this critical juncture of the campaign. This campaign will be won at the doors, and we need your help to turn out more of our neighbors to vote so we can send Charlie to Austin!

- Team Gearing

P.S. Running a strong block walking program takes a lot of resources. Help us build our program by chipping in to fund our efforts >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.

Donate Now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]Learn more at gearingfortexas.com [https://www.gearingfortexas.com/?]

Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas

name: Eric Lynn
subject: Our New Year's Resolutions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress
body:
We’re doubling down on our efforts in 2022 https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-resolutions [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-resolutions]Dear friends,
The start of a new year is a great time to reflect and commit to new goals. I wish you the best of luck with your New Year’s Resolutions, whether you want to exercise more or find new hobbies or eat less chocolate (or eat MORE chocolate).
On the campaign, we use this time to craft our plan for the election year. We’ve been working on our budgets and plans for engaging with our community in new and exciting ways. We are in a fantastic position in this race, and I want to make some important commitments as our New Year’s Resolutions:
*
We’ll
always
do
our
best
to
keep
our
focus
local.
Kitchen
table
issues
that
effect
our
everyday
lives
are
of
the
utmost
importance,
I’ll
always
put
them
first.
*
Our
values
are
threatened
if
we
can’t
keep
the
Democratic
Majority
in
Congress.
I’ll
work
as
hard
as
I
can
to
keep
this
seat
blue
and
help
other
Democrats
win
their
races.
*
We
care
deeply
about
the
people
who
help
this
campaign
function
,
so
whether
you’re
a
donor
or
volunteer,
we’ll
always
make
sure
you
know
how
much
we
value
you.
While we’re well positioned to win this race, we need your help to keep our momentum and accomplish the lofty goals that we’ve set for ourselves during these next few months. Please, will you help us stay on track by starting 2022 with a grassroots donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-resolutions]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-resolutions] Click here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-resolutions [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-resolutions]
We have 11 months to protect this Congressional seat, and with your help, I know that we can win this race and protect the Democratic Majority.
Thank you,
Eric Lynn

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Flipping Florida blue can’t wait. We can’t let disinformation win.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
help me root out the lies |

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40356471/323975271/813604258?refcode=20220104_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjZmNjBhZC03ZDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DyKPSx4Yb4MSA6BuPVeR4XNEtPitUGyNx593VyGvq-M=)

Friend,

To defeat Gov. DeSantis, we know we’ll need to build the largest grassroots movement in Florida’s history. Florida deserves better than Gov. DeSantis, and voters are fed up. So far, he and I are neck-and-neck in the polls. We will win – as long as we can meet a couple of challenges.

First, we’ll have to raise enough to persuade and mobilize voters. I spent last year talking to people across the state, and this year, we’ll need to increase our efforts exponentially. To be honest, we won’t be able to do it unless **[supporters like you donate a few dollars whenever you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40356472/323975272/813604258?refcode=20220104_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjZmNjBhZC03ZDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DyKPSx4Yb4MSA6BuPVeR4XNEtPitUGyNx593VyGvq-M=)**

But winning this election will take more than persuading and mobilizing voters ... it’ll also require us to stem **_the flood of disinformation_** sweeping across Florida.

**[I’ll be honest: These lies _won’t_ be easy to combat, but we need to tackle this issue head on. Can you chip in to help my team and me fight back against disinformation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40356473/323975273/813604258?refcode=20220104_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjZmNjBhZC03ZDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DyKPSx4Yb4MSA6BuPVeR4XNEtPitUGyNx593VyGvq-M=)**

Combating these lies can’t wait.
* An anti-abortion group has already claimed that Gov. DeSantis _isn't_ an extremist when it comes to banning abortion.
* The governor himself has _refused_ to admit the booster shot is effective against the raging Omicron COVID-19 variant.

Across our beautiful state, bad partisan actors are intentionally spreading disinformation to confuse Floridians – and we cannot let this go unchallenged.

**[Friend, I’m asking for your help pushing back against these lies. Please donate what you can to our efforts!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40356479/323975279/813604258?refcode=20220104_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjZmNjBhZC03ZDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DyKPSx4Yb4MSA6BuPVeR4XNEtPitUGyNx593VyGvq-M=)**

Happy New Year, friends!
In mildest possible terms, 2022 is a big, big, _big_ year.
The midterm election on November 8 will be a pivotal moment, with consequences that will resonate for years to come. In Congressional and Senate races all across the country, Americans will decide whether to push back against fascist authoritarianism or allow extreme insurrectionists to remain in power.
If that sounds scary, well, that’s because it is! **And Florida’s 15th District has a _critical_ role to play**, because we’ve got our very own, home-grown insurrectionist to defeat, and his name is Scott Franklin.
But with people like you on our side, I’m not worried. Actually, I am _extremely_ worried, but I’m hopeful. I really do believe that most people will choose love and solidarity over division and hatred — but it’s not enough to just say that. We have to prove it on November 8.
So, thank you for being on our team. Thank you for donating, for reading, for spreading the word about our campaign to your friends and family. I can’t wait to see what we accomplish this year.
— Eddie

clean_body: | | It might be a new year, but we’ve got the same mission: Kick insurrectionist Scott Franklin out of Congress, flip this soon-to-be Biden +9 district, and expand the Democratic majority. = = Happy New Year, friends! In mildest possible terms, 2022 is a big, big, big year. The midterm election on November 8 will be a pivotal moment, with consequences that will resonate for years to come. In Congressional and Senate races all across the country, Americans will decide whether to push back against fascist authoritarianism or allow extreme insurrectionists to remain in power. If that sounds scary, well, that’s because it is! And Florida’s 15th District has a critical role to play, because we’ve got our very own, home-grown insurrectionist to defeat, and his name is Scott Franklin. But with people like you on our side, I’m not worried. Actually, I am extremely worried, but I’m hopeful. I really do believe that most people will choose love and solidarity over division and hatred — but it’s not enough to just say that. We have to prove it on November 8. So, thank you for being on our team. Thank you for donating, for reading, for spreading the word about our campaign to your friends and family. I can’t wait to see what we accomplish this year. — Eddie = | Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. = | = | PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS Eddie Geller for Congress P.O. body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40356923/323978122/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWY0NTRjOS03ZjZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nF63pc0_EK4hRk7Lx6-CBAicszhuj-Httj1HC3J2x7E=&emci=88642cca-786d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=79f454c9-7f6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

On Friday, we faced our biggest fundraising deadline since the launch of our campaign. Because this team stepped up in a big way, we hit our ambitious end-of-year goal!

As 2022 begins, I first and foremost want to thank you for being a part of our team. Whether you signed a petition, read our emails, or contributed to our campaign, you are an essential part of our team. I'm tremendously grateful for your support this past year, and I look forward to what 2022 brings.

The stakes have never been higher for Rhode Island. This year, we have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to rebuild a stronger economy, where everyone has a chance to succeed.

Together we can rebuild our schools, make higher education and workforce training more affordable, and build the clean energy infrastructure that will create good-paying jobs while protecting our environment. If we put in the work now, we can build the future Rhode Islanders deserve.

I'm confident that with your help, we'll win this year and rebuild a stronger Rhode Island than ever before.

Thank you,

Seth

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: sharing this photo with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
It always brings a smile to my face...
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40357301/323980086/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk532-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDNlN2U3Ny04MDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K3MrAD-bKaByhqpMFhg2ro03JpGmoQGjvAvmcvS2lk8=)
Hi Peter: I want to share an old photo with you. This is my grandma, Helen Finkenauer, with my dad, Jerry, who was just a baby then. **This photo always brings a smile to my face, but it also reminds me of a big issue – one that's at the forefront of my mind every day that I'm on the campaign trail for our race to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA).**
You see, back in 1958, my grandfather was able to come home from the war and find a job – and not just any job. A very good paying _union _job. He was able to make a living for his family of four, with money left over to get a chance to _enjoy _life. Not only that, he and Grandma had a sense of security knowing a pension and retirement would be there for them in the future.
**It's nice to get nostalgic about old photos, but with that nostalgia comes an important realization: This picture wouldn't exist if my grandpa didn't have the means, provided by his union job, to purchase a camera.**
I'm running for Iowa's Senate seat to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley because our state and country have gone through too many years of seeing middle and working class jobs decimated. There's no way in hell I'm going to sit on the sidelines while billionaires increase their profits as unions get weaker.
You see, working families are _my _family. That little kid you see in the photo above went on to become a union pipefitter-welder, and it was that good job that allowed our family to have a solid quality of life when I was growing up. **We need a senator who will fight for legislation that bolsters the middle class. Sen. Grassley isn't that guy. But my public service has always – _always _– been about the fight for working families like mine. **
**[I'll keep this simple: If you believe that we need people in the Senate who will fight for our working families, and that we need to flip Iowa blue to protect our Senate majority – then I need you with me. Please, can you donate $5 to my campaign right here and now? In a race like this, every dollar counts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40357302/323980087/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk532-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDNlN2U3Ny04MDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K3MrAD-bKaByhqpMFhg2ro03JpGmoQGjvAvmcvS2lk8=)**
Thank you for your support. I'm so grateful to have you on my team.

Abby
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40357303/323980088/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk532-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDNlN2U3Ny04MDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K3MrAD-bKaByhqpMFhg2ro03JpGmoQGjvAvmcvS2lk8=)
---

subject: PCR - Get your $50 Refund!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
We need your help! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8def1a74e9db/pcr-get-your-50-refund?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter

I wanted to get in touch to let you know **Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1st.** This means you can once again make a $50 donation today (or $100 for couples) and receive a FULL REFUND even if you just used your 2021 PCR donation. _Here’s how it works:_ **Step One:** Make your [refundable contribution](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=76dac662b2&e=33b11688c1). **Step Two:** Our campaign will send a receipt of your contribution and a 2022 PCR application form in the mail. **Step Three:** Complete your PCR application form (we'll mail you a copy of this) and mail it to the Minnesota Department of Revenue. **Step 4:** Receive your FULL REFUND!
---
| [**Take advantage of your 2022 PCR contribution and make a REFUNDABLE $50 DONATION right now to help our campaign WIN in November!**](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=37dd41a2ac&e=33b11688c1) We are not relying on big dollars and need you! Let's start the year strong.
---
| In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota

| | | | | | | [](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=09a7f445c3&e=33b11688c1)

clean_body: We need your help! | | | | | | | Peter I wanted to get in touch to let you know Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1st. This means you can once again make a $50 donation today (or $100 for couples) and receive a FULL REFUND even if you just used your 2021 PCR donation. Here’s how it works: Step One: Make your . Step Two: Our campaign will send a receipt of your contribution and a 2022 PCR application form in the mail. Step Three: Complete your PCR application form (we'll mail you a copy of this) and mail it to the Minnesota Department of Revenue. Step 4: Receive your FULL REFUND! | We are not relying on big dollars and need you! Let's start the year strong. | In Freedom, Dr. Scott Jensen Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Dr Scott Jensen for Governor, All rights reserved.
