name: Malik Hubbard, Team ODP
subject: People will be watching Ohio in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Hey team,

We officially wrapped up 2021 and election year is here.

To start the year on a strong note, we approached our crucial FEC end-of-year fundraising deadline head-on. We reached out to ask for your support and you stepped up in a big way. Thanks to your commitment to a blue Ohio, we hit our end-of-year fundraising goal!

Your support in 2021 paved the way for a strong start to the new year. However, hitting our end-of-year goal and starting the year off on the right foot was only the beginning.

The race for Ohio's open Senate seat will be one of the most-watched races of the year -- but we're also focused on building the infrastructure to protect the Democratic House majority, taking back the governor's office, and electing Democrats at every single level.

It's not going to be an easy fight, which makes every single goal we set in 2022 even more important than ever before. But with your continued support, we'll be able to show the nation that Ohio isn't a lost cause.

We're counting on you to help us take on the year ahead -- let's get to work.

Thank you,

Malik Hubbard
Ohio Democratic Party

The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. **Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio.** [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/odp-january22?refcode=em22_220104_eoyty_enask_gq_act___mh_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220104_eoyty_enask_gq_act___mh_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: What are you excited about this year?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Hi Peter,

I hope your New Year is off to a promising start! Here at TNDP we are excited about 2022 and its endless possibilities. Out of everything we have planned, I’m most excited about our ambitious plan to register 200,000 voters across the Tennessee. Oh, and to make Bill Lee a one term Governor of course.

But I want to hear from you — what are YOU most excited for in 2022? Reply to this email with your answer!

We have the power to go forward boldly this year and Build Back Blue — for all Tennesseans. Let’s get it done, together.

Look forward to hearing from you,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

PS: if you want to take action with our Volunteer Team, click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dviSsrmOjkqq8Hckg8c0iA2] !

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]
https://www.facebook.com/tndem [https://www.facebook.com/tndem]

Dave Johnson has lost credibility and should resign as Ohio Republican Party (ORP) Treasurer.

(https://d2pqFK04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/RJ+113/d2pqFK04/VW7M526NB4rzVCGvjM8DMVrmW4sKGqD4CWKWJN8Vtb7G3l0fQV1-WJV7CgH_LW19Fv6d4l1WZgW7kwsWD3DvTszW7HzQ8f11j31jW3qdrjr8M7SNBW7rNB7L5sLtNQW1kBZ0-6jVT3YW6VPfzf2cG6bHN7PyS-BdzStFW50C8cR4QrJzrVhQZ146cyLh9W6jCQdM6326k7W5tTq1D1Yb5RYW7824R931nyK4W2wbdz47xVr_XW1LPSsy4RPXtSW5zM5wz43dN1lW4JKCk-7N37QcW54Zjly6x527QW91ZW-q4ZD3V4W8zPRyT3XX25KW7ZfxMy5p4YNhW2jQtsw268cS7W7TrMyc8lw_VcV22Zh76KCg9k3dWV1 )

name: Chelsea Clark
subject: We couldn’t have done it without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202
body:
Because of our grassroots team, we’ve hit another milestone.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40358097/323984152/-182240488?refcode=EM_CT_220104ty_N_TC_TC_4_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTRmMTQ2MC04NTZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n816wLayQrxRmRu9XjuJAWGpF5m0eHLAPSAGJkcmgeY=)
---
Team, thank you. Together, we were able to hit our final goal of 2021, and we have the building blocks of a public report we’re proud of. All because of your dedication and support for my campaign and mission to build a better Ohio together. **And with your support, we’re moving into 2022 stronger than ever!** With one deadline down, it’s up to us to carry this momentum all the way to November. I understand the stakes at hand. Frank LaRose is a powerful Republican incumbent, and we can’t miss the mark at any moment in 2022. But with you on my side, I know I have the voices, and the vision, of the hardworking people of Ohio. And as a mom, small business owner, and city councilwoman, I understand the issues facing our state firsthand at every level of experience. With those things together, we can bring a government that works for all and not just the few. Thank you again for your incredible amount of support, and let’s make 2022 a year we will all be proud to remember. Thank you, — Chelsea | | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure.

**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40358099/323984154/-182240488?refcode=EM_CT_220104ty_N_TC_TC_4_NG_N_L1_BioBox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTRmMTQ2MC04NTZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n816wLayQrxRmRu9XjuJAWGpF5m0eHLAPSAGJkcmgeY=)** Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: The year ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]Thank you.

With your help, we hit our 2021 goal and are headed into 2022 with a strong momentum.

In 2021, we made history, passing the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill to create millions of jobs and restore our roads and bridges.

I will need your help to continue this fight in 2022.

A Fourth Right Winger has just entered the race against me and the Cook Political Report is predicting I “might face a strong challenge next year if the Republicans can recruit a strong, well-funded nominee.”

We need all hands on deck. If you didn’t get a chance to chip in before the end of the year, please help out my campaign now by clicking here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2201?amount=20]

Thank you,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Team Nikki
subject: BREAKING - DeSantis has done it again
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter — Just when we thought he couldn’t get any worse, DeSantis has pulled off yet another horrific display of authoritarianism. This morning in Jacksonville, Governor DeSantis had Ben Frazier, a leader in Jacksonville’s Black community, _arrested_ at a COVID press conference for “trespassing” and demanding answers about DeSantis’ refusal to take our health and safety seriously. **And here’s the other piece: Frazier was right when he told DeSantis there’s nothing private about public health. ** Apparently, in DeSantis’ Florida, speaking out against government inaction is a crime. Standing up for Floridians’ health and safety is a crime. **_And questioning DeSantis’ authoritarian regime can get you arrested. _** [**This has to stop, Peter. And we have the power to defeat DeSantis. name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Starting the new year off strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
I want to take a moment to share how grateful I am for this grassroots team. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40358394/323985884/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODRkNTAyYi04ODZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XWxcwwnSZQuggUT0cMfolpSCYwmIDlX6VPyducOBwv4=&emci=e753d3c1-6a6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=384d502b-886d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

I hope you had a safe and happy new year!

I want to take a moment to share how grateful I am for this grassroots team. **On Friday, we hit our crucial end-of-year fundraising goal, and we couldn't have done it without your support.**

As we enter this election year, I know that we are facing our toughest race yet. Your support in 2021 means we're in a stronger position to take on my opponents and national Republicans and win in November. It won't be easy, but with this grassroots team by my side, I know we can protect our seat and the Democratic House majority.

So Peter: thank you again for your continued support. I look forward to seeing all that we accomplish in this new year.

Thank you,

Kim

**National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Peter, When we first started our campaign for Congress, I knew it wasn't going to be easy. The radical Left and spineless RINOs want to see our America-First movement fail. Unfortunately for them... our message is resonating with the voters in Michigan. Thanks to all of your support, our campaign for Congress successfully raised $359,000 from 2,204 individual donors. We surpassed our end of year goal and continue to surge in the polls! When President Donald J. Trump first endorsed me, he tasked me with defeating corrupt Republican Fred Upton, who voted to IMPEACH the most popular President in our nation's history. Today, I am pleased to announce that we are on track to doing just that! After seeing my end of year totals, Upton knows that we are gaining momentum... That's why he spent Christmas with socialist lawmakers on fake news CNN. With your continued support, our campaign looks forward to celebrating our victory with you in November. We'll start by Draining the Swamp and introducing legislation aimed at Making America First again. The political establishment in Washington, DC is hopeful that I won't be elected because they know I will fight against their socialist policies and for individual liberty. Their tyrannical reign is coming to an end... and it's all thanks to you. Thank you for all of your support... we fight on!
---
---
Steve Carra
Michigan Candidate for Congress

body:
From nationwide rioting and violent protests to unconstitutional lockdowns, to mask mandates and record-setting inflation, Ameri
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ze7bt4jjmfdema3j0v7biki98p6ko90dhf61jkb0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1o74smq63c5ncdh38sple3g71pb362p78slj6ip74plj6ip3ao34shrjec3k63jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9cr661r62pjks2pm9ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgm8pj4cjh64p724no)
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zv81mae5vkl7di2g71lkrqqkjia5tfb1jtih1s3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpi69oj2cjh2bs) | |
---
Friend, in just the last few years, we’ve seen liberal government wreak havoc on our way of life.

From nationwide rioting and violent protests to unconstitutional lockdowns, to mask mandates and record-setting inflation, Americans are facing difficult times.

And an out-of-control, Democrat-led Congress and liberal president in the White House isn’t helping. Instead of providing solutions, they continue to pour billions of taxpayer dollars into pet projects and bad investments.

That’s why today, I’m officially announcing my campaign for reelection to serve the people of Kentucky - and the whole liberty movement - in the Senate for another term.

**[STAND WITH RAND: CHIP IN TO SUPPORT RE-ELECTION >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z51ihgd31fpai2oi57nbqqjmjkq2jiknl46439go_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpi69oj2cjh2bs)**

I know this race won’t be easy — we have tough challenges ahead.
** **
The bureaucrats in our government, the pro-censorship leaders in big-tech, and the anti-freedom liberals in the media will do anything they can to make sure we don’t succeed.
** **
That’s why I want to start off with a big goal - to make sure we’re prepared for whatever comes next. I’m pledging today to raise $100,000 for the launch of this campaign and I hope you’ll join me by chipping in now.
__
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $15**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zq8vreniqb27nlkhufjs2khjr2uqeb2ihbrgv6vo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpi69oj2cjh2bs)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $25**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ze98r6uu34fuuk4buirdopkgfgburvn0v16vudl8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpi69oj2cjh2bs)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $35**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z141u0qq43605ni5d7tncvipbkpchptmmofla23o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpi69oj2cjh2bs)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $45**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztn7a2isfp3ouht3qdtf1s8tcptr78vobd6kudh8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpi69oj2cjh2bs)
The stakes are just too high to let the liberals maintain control in Washington.

You’re already feeling the damage they’ve done!

* Gas prices are up 40%
* Groceries cost up to 6% more
* Rent, cars, and energy prices are skyrocketing
* _Americans are struggling. _

It’s hitting us hard all over the nation.

And here in Kentucky, where we’re recovering not only from a pandemic but a statewide natural disaster, we simply cannot afford to continue down this path.

We must correct the course now. And we can do that by taking back the Senate and restoring a common-sense, pro-freedom approach to government.

**_Let’s not forget: we only need one seat to take control. _**

And I’m 100% confident that if we stand together now we can take a stand for liberty and win that one seat to take back the Senate in 2022.

Please, chip in what you can to make our launch a success and start this year off the right way: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3476970/](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ze7s5506ml611lqlo1lbarv7ru9ni7uhm68p5st8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpi69oj2cjh2bs)**

Thank you in advance.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

name: V. Demings
subject: never again [sign now]

body:
my colleagues and I crouched down in the gallery of the House, fearing for the worst.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40358918/323988108/689143012?code=jtk2019-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjNiNWRkZS04ODZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gcZKoBRcJY96xqrX63fcEjrxbZzmXSsCWln4Nq9R8kA=&emci=3aacc503-c56c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=023b5dde-886d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=20244100)
---
Friend – almost one year ago, my colleagues and I crouched down in the gallery of the House, fearing for the worst. As we put on gas masks, Trump supporters ran through the halls, waving Confederate flags and threatening to hang the vice president.
While my colleagues and I feared for our lives, Republican leaders texted Trump's chief of staff to urge the former president to stop the escalating violence. But Trump refused to tell his supporters to stop attacking the U.S. Capitol. People died as a result, including five Capitol Police officers.
**Now, Trump and his associates are doing everything they can to sweep this tragedy under the rug. Trump's chief of staff is even refusing to cooperate with the congressional bipartisan investigation.**
As a congresswoman, as a former chief of police and as an American, I firmly believe that NO ONE is above the law. That's why I argued the case for Trump's first impeachment in front of the Senate, and that's why I voted to investigate the Jan. 6 riot.
**I'm asking you to join me in speaking out to hold Trump accountable, uphold our rule of law and preserve our democracy. If we fail to act during this dark moment, we'll continue to see attacks that undermine our democracy. That's why I'm counting on you today:**
**[Please, before my petition closes at midnight tonight, will you add your name to demand accountability for Donald Trump?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40358919/323988109/689143012?code=jtk2019-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjNiNWRkZS04ODZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gcZKoBRcJY96xqrX63fcEjrxbZzmXSsCWln4Nq9R8kA=&emci=3aacc503-c56c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=023b5dde-886d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=20244100)**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40358920/323988110/689143012?code=jtk2019-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjNiNWRkZS04ODZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gcZKoBRcJY96xqrX63fcEjrxbZzmXSsCWln4Nq9R8kA=&emci=3aacc503-c56c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=023b5dde-886d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=20244100)
---
I know these are dark times, but I promise you this: So long as we fight for justice together, we are going to win, and democracy is going to stand.

Val Demings

clean_body: my colleagues and I crouched down in the gallery of the House, fearing for the worst. | | | Friend – almost one year ago, my colleagues and I crouched down in the gallery of the House, fearing for the worst. As we put on gas masks, Trump supporters ran through the halls, waving Confederate flags and threatening to hang the vice president. While my colleagues and I feared for our lives, Republican leaders texted Trump's chief of staff to urge the former president to stop the escalating violence. But Trump refused to tell his supporters to stop attacking the U.S. Capitol. People died as a result, including five Capitol Police officers. Now, Trump and his associates are doing everything they can to sweep this tragedy under the rug. Trump's chief of staff is even refusing to cooperate with the congressional bipartisan investigation. As a congresswoman, as a former chief of police and as an American, I firmly believe that NO ONE is above the law. That's why I argued the case for Trump's first impeachment in front of the Senate, and that's why I voted to investigate the Jan. 6 riot. I'm asking you to join me in speaking out to hold Trump accountable, uphold our rule of law and preserve our democracy. If we fail to act during this dark moment, we'll continue to see attacks that undermine our democracy. That's why I'm counting on you today: | | I know these are dark times, but I promise you this: So long as we fight for justice together, we are going to win, and democracy is going to stand. body:
The Child Tax Credit is expiring as Democrats in congress stand by | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8s3kINcoX3OlEu2ePJ4Ce2m_ga930IlFjAZ4-SEvMhTTKRsYHoqg9PzgsXuAzIBFQyRhkfyC8VVMl9At0a5ICbbRoRVaFCYOkI1GxcYe8ZVsU9Pkyn6Q9pCpLKelJzTEPEmQ3riv1DpIkMOk44VkhNSIAJwMWhfwiKW-4tXSZRWc8JJIOyD-pkoeVJAlh4lrPuZlOlQkXY1dcaqE8B08L-n8dEBczKUF9J_NWzG-t3GaGtHcmlpoto5q81rluUb33I7FVWaVKtECNT4M2et9gCsexhbO7iV4LOhhjmic_BmES/3if/ICZPZoB6R1qQqsL_iv5BhA/h0/JgZZrPYNDsjy_MsEbbzKQl0xqQW1IBvj9rK6CI01f5c) team, In 2021, Build Back Better was about improving the state of things and making progress permanent. In 2022, it is about preventing the consequences of deep and permanent loss. While corporate politicians like Joe Manchin argue about the deficit, the expanded [Child Tax Credit is expiring](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGlyFEPfIQqTPhAJ7ICxnKFLHhHz7ljH4Y756LEWX9rnvn1tcKn20smh5zUppTqpNeT33xnS3ETXBDj_aG3K21KH78epcXGK_S6RHiYqNbQj5tyXFrwgDvDz_GlFgtvByN2WZAfMtT64XsVkE-D94nP3cX2q_S7m2hAqB0viyvp53jQyQ_BrmmQcXMNtY1G34qkH-RjO1ht1oVtIyJui8CgLXibhM2Dka6ADkQ556aOFv_PPLe4tbtRx95oqIATznFhRsAdC1YItVusD02jlWVfGDI7tKtOlj33hHM6USpDUOFKH76ZSBeq-NksDH8NcZPdvia-ZdF2TNb-ON9o6Mzai82cgwkFWx8rYe3KaJx4n/3if/ICZPZoB6R1qQqsL_iv5BhA/h1/_HdbhFHZzodngkyhXhh6W8aO59coZk20zE4LTI-g0Wg) right in the middle of the biggest COVID wave we’ve seen, to date. This year, let’s show the corporate politicians in Congress, once and for all, that when they let us down, we send them home. It’s not enough to be a Democrat, it’s not enough to say a few nice things during election season, we need leaders who fight for us every day. [**If you agree, chip in $3 to help us launch our ballot petition collection program with all of the supplies we need.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESo003jEpKR-dHns-0Zp-BASi_YoZ86WoJ-WTEXoGcmmOwGje41S86YQf5fMhIRN9SLM63aNrn7tO-vEw7sKxle8yRLDOiGZEl7hmGU6Bld4Ik2Q4L2mnWHm_doCGs_9R74oPXwhCTz9PdQKsrQQJ7sCDpTdKCdkeyc1m-N9dw7rBawCPdeN7DehrAiG6JIkzOQM61gBjfGo9DDmDTYo8Y-dd_V-qCTCIrDYsG9_1Y6Fdc5wD4VpnewYIdRlw2fRiommT7Ux2xC8jUsR4EJL9wiXFUSenktm7KYiBtV7b7LzX4JWVEgpfUUi7RWn0RN20GDiEBlknYz_UWnVxN6oN0ww/3if/ICZPZoB6R1qQqsL_iv5BhA/h2/YIwIHEu9k8S-q3v_tFAgqh4N5GE40uhJ0krEX16NCCE) [Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESEp6-fZZDHYYgXNJyt4d1Qj8WASAiA0kxCFFwc3Sh6GZRKFW9e_C4t-Zc_Yo9ADqPYev_Y6_UPOIbDK8NSrIBywbnj-5KZjTLu2fJ0avPX7CnENxZ_XE9vSinFgpIjCZRHYkkx0l648XmwcUUXB7MKBa7SIsL4lBqceaNmqN1nwVT3Q7ZhYyhjXBM7Lp8mCIeK3yFjSR9xR6nW3SwyvJ6mujUsADUKWUEfD9W9dUW5vg1W4xrKVhubXXPAKlaIgjadCWOaLN01pXCcnEsM1tZSNxkPRFji7P-BWoQieCnfOst0pXBluzveIahnv6M9lxviehmsRImG78NdAXcPuaVKA/3if/ICZPZoB6R1qQqsL_iv5BhA/h3/fjDaPFlt2nXZ4lcqTAqaofgoaIo5HukA6F674AFCKP0) According to [researchers at Columbia University](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN7kdBKkV7kxhjJPjL6yCCzQhEYWn4cnvULACvm8AykgtUj8rid0fXRli6Sn7VXH0VXcAyATZC8P4sOU0EpiVXI9vsTJMjjnzf1fk78wR6-awcX5HZDXtr5mSkIxhJTRCf9YHH21Wvd-xGAvFu0rca0kRDy58XbQ3e_q8CAWE9RZ1FyNtQTn46pdq_2aC6s04Y39hfnYeGh60X1gRrhdlrJs2S16EN_vn_u7t58WRtfD5HrUgSP-V64YBDO0Psrt57D069DqBxDD5J9WUsZnb5kZbeWA8NI_m1srFR1ttvX79OJiZeb0TwXnJWTnUSCN1t5gVIt0HPkxAUhIOf-k964HbL4_vw2XvX2_WLrJ_nC2/3if/ICZPZoB6R1qQqsL_iv5BhA/h4/wqLimVrf5l9OKTZ3h26jW--W039149kzyx-C2PmWB4M), the expanded Child Tax Credit **reduced the child poverty rate in the US by 30%. That is 3.8 million children.** On the 15th of this month, all of those families will lose the financial support that they now depend on for survival, and it will be because of one person: Joe Manchin. **We don’t need Joe Manchin, and we don’t need Democrats who aren’t willing to stand up to him.** [**Donate $3 to elect a representative who will do more than just show up for work.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESHhbO-vtLu5uOWWq_OEU7wEKoTRikUahcmBbf_UJ-ikYFEwhFpup9_fE_bCkBXU5bbp1-Jn3BHXXR3xyUjp0OxeyXmzwU7FqwjipBgRTKwKBlL_toPZ1sLzwCt5IWmZMJujbu96mw6BWVWqZNF8Zfwuy5iBopFyLHJRxCzjgmDNeejsf1VpKOZe5f_fybrCBhuNoBanWNbNI7NQrP--lh4ynGvco-Ne_v-IWA-Wx1-hLjitfYihuG3xDFfV5mEntUDcfoLzReD7uyWtUKaFOLPj2mOkYq0anicjCa61dvDvyvrZ-apssjyH2oeUZ3GwyZIhHaNVXVj-iBuHA5qAarAA/3if/ICZPZoB6R1qQqsL_iv5BhA/h5/IWi-4zrOnE_8Y46_Ef3VCnG3O3kLb8CvLJ3lFfFFCbY)**** It’s time to demand true progressive leadership. clean_body: The Child Tax Credit is expiring as Democrats in congress stand by | | | team, In 2021, Build Back Better was about improving the state of things and making progress permanent. In 2022, it is about preventing the consequences of deep and permanent loss. While corporate politicians like Joe Manchin argue about the deficit, the expanded right in the middle of the biggest COVID wave we’ve seen, to date. This year, let’s show the corporate politicians in Congress, once and for all, that when they let us down, we send them home. It’s not enough to be a Democrat, it’s not enough to say a few nice things during election season, we need leaders who fight for us every day. According to , the expanded Child Tax Credit reduced the child poverty rate in the US by 30%. That is 3.8 million children. On the 15th of this month, all of those families will lose the financial support that they now depend on for survival, and it will be because of one person: Joe Manchin. We don’t need Joe Manchin, and we don’t need Democrats who aren’t willing to stand up to him. **** It’s time to demand true progressive leadership. We are falling further behind every day. In solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

| | | Happy New Year, Fellow Conservative!

Thanks to you, 23 Democrats have retired because they’re scared of the red wave that’s coming.

Thanks to you, we’re at a pivotal moment in turning this country around.

I know I can count on you, Fellow Conservative, which is why I’d like to offer you the exclusive opportunity to be our very first donor of 2022.

---

This is the year that will change everything. This is the year that we FIRE Pelosi, reclaim Congress, and turn our country around — and I’d like YOU to be the one to kick us off.

Your exclusive link: **[https://secure.winred.com/kevin-mccarthy/exclusive-link-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-37qlk-1rqro-4qqlpo0/ "https://secure.winred.com/kevin-mccarthy/exclusive-link-%%email__c%%")**

Leader Kevin McCarthy

As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. body:

Let's Talk About Climate

A VIRTUAL event!
Due to COVID this event is now a virtual event.
ONE WEEK FROM TODAY!
Tuesday, January 11th 6pm-8pm

image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Virtual_ClimateEvent.png]Hi Peter,

Please join us for this virtual event! Dr. William Schlesinger (Dean Emeritus from the Duke University Nicholas School of the Environment) and Susannah Tuttle (faith leader and environmental justice advocate) will moderate a conversation with Dr. Ashley Ward, climate-health expert and candidate for U.S. Congress, NC District 6.
This will be an engaging and informative Q&A on how climate change is impacting our communities, and what's ahead for policy solutions.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]Hi, did you see the email Marcus sent yesterday?
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently banned from Twitter for spreading disinformation about COVID-19 and putting her followers at severe risk.
We welcome her removal from Twitter -- but the next step is to remove her from office. Can you donate $20 or more now to help us do just that? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marcus Flowers is a Veteran, a patriot, and a Democrat -- and he’ll restore honor and integrity to Congress.
Thanks for your support.
---- Begin forwarded message ----
From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene was permanently suspended from Twitter
Sent on Sunday, January 2, 2022 at 1:05 p.m.
It’s official: Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter.
She deserved to be removed from the platform because of her dangerous incitements to violence and reckless spreading of harmful disinformation.
But here’s the thing: Our goal was never to get Marjorie Taylor Greene removed from Twitter. Our goal is to remove her from Congress.
I’m a Veteran, a Democrat, and I believe that the people of Georgia’s 14th District deserve so much better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. That’s why I’m running to unseat her in 2022.
So I have to ask: Will you join me in the fight to remove her from Congress by donating $20 or more to my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been removed from Twitter -- that’s a good thing. But let’s not pretend that was our goal. We have to remove her from office.
Thanks for fighting with me,
Marcus Flowers
Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
Marcus for Georgia

Bremen, GA 30110
United States

body:
Thanks to supporters like you, we were able to reach our online fundraising goal before the FEC deadline.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40359559/323992043/356326851?refcode=em_fr_2022.01.04_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDNjMTBmZS04ZjZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UqjLhNpUueLldmt8oa-AL2ddsw2AtyDMySskls9z9vU=) Happy New Year, Peter!

Thanks to supporters like you, we were able to reach our online fundraising goal before the FEC deadline. I know you’ve received a lot of emails from me and my team, and I want you to know how overwhelmed and grateful we are for the generosity of our supporters.

In just a few days, our fundraising numbers will become public, and my opponent and the Republican establishment will see the strength of the grassroots campaign that we’ve built. They’re going to throw everything they’ve got at us because they know we can win.

**We’ve officially begun the on-year, and looking ahead, we have a lot of work to do to make sure voters in the 2nd District know who I am and what I stand for.**

[**Now that it is officially 2022, we are going to be increasing our efforts tenfold, and there is no time to waste. I’ll be reaching out more in the coming days, but I wanted to thank you and wish you a very Happy New Year, too! Cheers,
Charles

name: Max Steiner
subject: So grateful for your support
body:
with your help, we will post a strong fundraising quarter that's sure to make Doug LaMalfa nervous. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40359703/323993447/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWZlYmQ4ZC05MDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=df3RXU0FClnm9VFTB3Kt1rdR9kMAk2Bq8aQMdHhG1ko=)
We did it, friend!

It was a close, but in the final days of December this team rallied to help us meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. I’m so grateful for your support.

**I look forward to sharing the specifics soon, but with your help, we will post a strong fundraising quarter that's sure to make Doug LaMalfa nervous. That’s huge -- especially given that he’s been busy raising massive sums from corporate PACs over the last few months.**

Friend, we’ve never had an easy road in our fight to bring grassroots change to the North State. We’ve been doubted and underestimated from the start. But as we head into 2022, we do so confidently, and that’s because of your continued support.

Counting on individual donors instead of special interest means we can run a true grassroots campaign centered on the needs of working families in the North State. That’s how we defeat the Republican establishment, and it’s how we flip this seat in November.

I hope your new year is off to a strong start! Thanks again for stepping up.

Max Steiner

name: Conservative Direct
subject: How Far Will the Left Go to Keep Criminals Out of Jail?
body:
\-- Jill Haliburton Su, a wealthy, white woman who spent her spare time reading to the blind and doing charity work, was found tied up and stabbed to death in her home in 2014. Dayonte Resiles stood trial in December of 2021. His DNA was found on the knife used to kill her and elsewhere in Su’s home. Three members of his jury refused to convict him because they didn’t “want to send a young black male to jail for the rest of their life or have him get the death sentence.” Resiles’ retrial began Monday. Let’s face it, the left doesn’t care about the violent murder of a rich, white woman. But more than that, the truth is that liberals hate to see a criminal go to jail. Even if that criminal has hurt a fellow leftist. In 2019, a gay man walking in New York City’s Morningside Park was pummeled to the point that he received a traumatic brain injury. It was yet another in a string of violent beatings. The victim’s friends and local residents useful idiots decided to hold a protest against the violence by marching with signs that read: “Stop violence w/Restorative Justice” and “Community Solutions, Not Retribution.” They already knew who was behind the savage attacks. Even as their friend was struggling to get his memory back, they didn’t want the teen attackers punished. Why wouldn’t they want the violent miscreants in jail? Aw, you know. The left is doing everything it can to keep violent offenders out of prison. Even at their own peril, and the peril of innocent minorities. As PJ Media’s Victoria Taft recently reported, woke Washington-state Democrats are trying to reduce penalties for drive-by shootings, a crime committed mostly by black men, against black men. Seattle broke its 2020 record murder rate by September of 2021. Now, liberals want lighter sentences for drive-by killers. Never mind that 49% of those murdered in 2020 were black, even though black people are only 7% of Seattle’s population. Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot and her state’s attorney, Kim Foxx, are a one-two punch of commie crime forgiveness. Lightfoot changed the rules involving the police’s ability to chase criminals on foot. Foxx dropped 29.9% of all felony cases. She also thinks people illegally possessing guns shouldn’t be arrested if they haven’t used the gun to commit a violent crime, even though Chicago’s gun violence is at a record high. FACT-O-RAMA! Chicago had 4,542 shootings in 2021; 81% of the victims were black. Spoiler alert: no MAGA hats were found at any of the crime scenes. Lefty news is in on the plan, too, going so far as to hide the identities of violent black offenders. Some examples: A local Chicago CBS affiliate blurred the face of a black man who shot two people execution-style after a crowd pulled them from their car during the Puerto Rican Day parade; San Francisco’s mass transit office, Bay Area Rapid Transit (BART), refused to show surveillance videos of black people attacking riders because they might result in a “high level of racially insensitive commentary toward the district”; In a beautiful example of clowndom, San Francisco police asked for the public’s help in identifying a black teen who set an Asian woman on fire, but then blurred his face. Chicago and California have made shoplifting a misdemeanor if the stolen items are valued at less than $1,000 (Chicago) and $950 (California). Most stores won’t even call the cops, knowing it’s pointless. In other words, help yourselves, nothing will happen to you. A CNN simpleton claimed he had “no idea” what could be behind the recent spate of “smash and grab” lootings, until he admitted exactly why it was happening: liberal DAs won’t prosecute, and even if they did, there are almost no consequences. Nice try, CNN. Defunding the police in large, Democrat-run cities is nothing more than an attempt to keep criminals out of prison. Ditto bail reform. Commie jackpuddings like New York City’s former mayor, Komrade De Blasio, and the now unemployed governor/serial elder killer, Andrew Cuomo, decided to release hundreds of thousands of criminals over the last three years. They released even more because of “COVID,” despite fewer than 1% of New York’s “China sneeze” victims coming from jails. Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez blamed the 130% rise in New York City shootings on people “shoplifting food.” More blue cities are jumping on the “woke” bandwagon: Los Angeles County District Attorney George Gascon can’t do enough to keep criminals out of jail, even going so far as to not add a sentence enhancement to a black career criminal who murdered an 81-year-old woman during a home invasion;  A Seattle area judge set painfully low bail for two men who ambushed a police officer; Milwaukee County District Attorney John Chisolm set Darrell Brooks’ bail at $1,000 after Brooks tried to run over his girlfriend. Shortly thereafter, Brooks allegedly ran over 62 white people in the Waukesha Christmas parade. Chisolm’s website claims he is a “bold reformer” and that “progressive” district attorneys in “Philadelphia, Boston, St. Louis, and San Francisco” are following his lead. Related: Woke Milwaukee DA Admitted His Bail Reform Would Get Someone Killed, ‘It’s Guaranteed’ Remember when Kamala Harris pimped a bail fund? One of the guys they sprang, George Howard, who was arrested for domestic abuse, was released on a $1,500 bond. He promptly shot a Hispanic man to death. Defunding the police, bail reform, decriminalization of various crimes, restorative justice, and lighter sentencing are all about keeping criminals out of jail. They are also responsible for keeping the crime stats exploding, crimes that more often than not involve minority victims. This progressive experiment has got to end. Martin Luther King, Jr. marched for equality, not for the right to steal Gucci bags and kill people with impunity. |

clean_body: \-- Jill Haliburton Su, a wealthy, white woman who spent her spare time reading to the blind and doing charity work, was found tied up and stabbed to death in her home in 2014. Dayonte Resiles stood trial in December of 2021. His DNA was found on the knife used to kill her and elsewhere in Su’s home. Three members of his jury refused to convict him because they didn’t “want to send a young black male to jail for the rest of their life or have him get the death sentence.” Resiles’ retrial began Monday. Let’s face it, the left doesn’t care about the violent murder of a rich, white woman. But more than that, the truth is that liberals hate to see a criminal go to jail. Even if that criminal has hurt a fellow leftist. In 2019, a gay man walking in New York City’s Morningside Park was pummeled to the point that he received a traumatic brain injury. It was yet another in a string of violent beatings. The victim’s friends and local residents useful idiots decided to hold a protest against the violence by marching with signs that read: “Stop violence w/Restorative Justice” and “Community Solutions, Not Retribution.” They already knew who was behind the savage attacks. Even as their friend was struggling to get his memory back, they didn’t want the teen attackers punished. Why wouldn’t they want the violent miscreants in jail? Aw, you know. The left is doing everything it can to keep violent offenders out of prison. Even at their own peril, and the peril of innocent minorities. As PJ Media’s Victoria Taft recently reported, woke Washington-state Democrats are trying to reduce penalties for drive-by shootings, a crime committed mostly by black men, against black men. Seattle broke its 2020 record murder rate by September of 2021. Now, liberals want lighter sentences for drive-by killers. Never mind that 49% of those murdered in 2020 were black, even though black people are only 7% of Seattle’s population. Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot and her state’s attorney, Kim Foxx, are a one-two punch of commie crime forgiveness. Lightfoot changed the rules involving the police’s ability to chase criminals on foot. Foxx dropped 29.9% of all felony cases. She also thinks people illegally possessing guns shouldn’t be arrested if they haven’t used the gun to commit a violent crime, even though Chicago’s gun violence is at a record high. FACT-O-RAMA! Chicago had 4,542 shootings in 2021; 81% of the victims were black. Spoiler alert: no MAGA hats were found at any of the crime scenes. Lefty news is in on the plan, too, going so far as to hide the identities of violent black offenders. Some examples: A local Chicago CBS affiliate blurred the face of a black man who shot two people execution-style after a crowd pulled them from their car during the Puerto Rican Day parade; San Francisco’s mass transit office, Bay Area Rapid Transit (BART), refused to show surveillance videos of black people attacking riders because they might result in a “high level of racially insensitive commentary toward the district”; In a beautiful example of clowndom, San Francisco police asked for the public’s help in identifying a black teen who set an Asian woman on fire, but then blurred his face. Chicago and California have made shoplifting a misdemeanor if the stolen items are valued at less than $1,000 (Chicago) and $950 (California). Most stores won’t even call the cops, knowing it’s pointless. In other words, help yourselves, nothing will happen to you. A CNN simpleton claimed he had “no idea” what could be behind the recent spate of “smash and grab” lootings, until he admitted exactly why it was happening: liberal DAs won’t prosecute, and even if they did, there are almost no consequences. Nice try, CNN. Defunding the police in large, Democrat-run cities is nothing more than an attempt to keep criminals out of prison. Ditto bail reform. Commie jackpuddings like New York City’s former mayor, Komrade De Blasio, and the now unemployed governor/serial elder killer, Andrew Cuomo, decided to release hundreds of thousands of criminals over the last three years. They released even more because of “COVID,” despite fewer than 1% of New York’s “China sneeze” victims coming from jails. Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez blamed the 130% rise in New York City shootings on people “shoplifting food.” More blue cities are jumping on the “woke” bandwagon: Los Angeles County District Attorney George Gascon can’t do enough to keep criminals out of jail, even going so far as to not add a sentence enhancement to a black career criminal who murdered an 81-year-old woman during a home invasion;  A Seattle area judge set painfully low bail for two men who ambushed a police officer; Milwaukee County District Attorney John Chisolm set Darrell Brooks’ bail at $1,000 after Brooks tried to run over his girlfriend. Shortly thereafter, Brooks allegedly ran over 62 white people in the Waukesha Christmas parade. Chisolm’s website claims he is a “bold reformer” and that “progressive” district attorneys in “Philadelphia, Boston, St. Louis, and San Francisco” are following his lead. Related: Woke Milwaukee DA Admitted His Bail Reform Would Get Someone Killed, ‘It’s Guaranteed’ Remember when Kamala Harris pimped a bail fund? One of the guys they sprang, George Howard, who was arrested for domestic abuse, was released on a $1,500 bond. He promptly shot a Hispanic man to death. Defunding the police, bail reform, decriminalization of various crimes, restorative justice, and lighter sentencing are all about keeping criminals out of jail. They are also responsible for keeping the crime stats exploding, crimes that more often than not involve minority victims. This progressive experiment has got to end. subject: Thank you to Rep. Rush
body:
Thank you to Rep. Rush

** JANUARY NEWSLETTER
------------------------------------------------------------
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/56c4a61787f7/thank-you-to-rep-rush?e=339f142c50)

** A Note from Jahmal:
------------------------------------------------------------

Running for the First District means you get to walk in the footsteps of legends.

This morning, Representative Bobby Rush, who has served this district for the past 30 years, is announcing his retirement. I am so impressed by the work that he has done, and the precedent he has set for excellence in representation. As a Black Panther, he revolutionized how we think about politics and activism. As a representative, he reminded us that we have power, that we can use our voices for good.

I am humbled and honored to be running for this office and to have the opportunity to continue his legacy by representing this beautiful, powerful district. I hope you will join me in thanking Congressman Rush for his service, and wishing him a wonderful retirement.

Yours in service,

Jahmal Cole

** IN THE NEWS
------------------------------------------------------------
Rep. Bobby Rush Won't Run for Re-Election, multiple sources say (https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=b4f1840091&e=339f142c50) - NBC

subject: Thank you, friend.
body:
10,547 donors gave and average of $22.78. And we didn't take a penny from a corporate PAC. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40360542/323996883/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzAzMDI1OC05MzZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q4YyOiO3E1V_QGvgYJPuUuf3Al5D0RyLZzd_8sWLYf4=)
Big news, friend.

With the support of grassroots donors like you, we were able to surpass our fundraising goal ahead of our FEC filing deadline last week.

Here are a few highlights from last year that I’m especially proud of: **10,547** \- the number of donors who have chipped in to support our campaign.
**$22.78** \- our average donation size
**0** \- the number of corporate PAC contributions we've received. The outpouring of support we've received in our campaign to unseat Kevin McCarthy has been overwhelming. You give us the confidence we need to win to keep fighting, and we cannot thank you enough.

**Kevin McCarthy is raising huge sums from corporate PACs who are already planning for him to become Speaker. To that we say: McCarthy still needs to win this election here at home, and we're not going to let him off easy for selling our community short.**

This is only the beginning, and there will be many challenges ahead. But knowing that we’re all in this together will carry us to victory.

Thank you!

Marisa

To that we say: McCarthy still needs to win this election here at home, and we're not going to let him off easy for selling our community short. This is only the beginning, and there will be many challenges ahead. But knowing that we’re all in this together will carry us to victory. Thank you! Marisa Teacher For Congress | = | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. Consider supporting Marisa's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: Marisa Wood for Congress, PO Box 12103, Bakersfield, CA 93389. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Marisa Wood for Congress PO Box 12103 Bakersfield, CA 93389 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawn=20Hyland?=
subject: A New Year and A New Opportunity for New Jersey
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fbc16b490399/merry-christmas-8715909?e=5167ed8367)
---
|
---
# 2022 The Year We Have Been Waiting For
Peter,In 2021, America broke records. _But all the wrong records._ Because the Biden Administration ignored the humanitarian crisis at the border and encouraged unsafe migrant journeys through their catch and release policies, America experienced multi-decade highs for illegal border crossings. **People deserve better.** Because of Nancy Pelosi and the radical spending policies of the Left, we printed and spent money we don’t have, resulting in record-breaking inflation.The American dollar is losing its value, Americans are losing money in their savings’ accounts, our budgets are tighter, and essential products like gas, food, and housing have become so expensive that Americans are struggling just to get by. **Families deserve better.**
The radical Left is defunding police departments all across the country. For every police officer let go due to COVID-19 or budget cuts, there is a community without immediate response to violent or property crime. When police are stretched thin and demonized, departments struggle to protect small businesses from coordinated smash and grabs and a consistent stream of shoplifters. We are looking at record-breaking homicides and crime rates all across America and our first responders are powerless to stop it. **Communities deserve better.** None of this is comforting, and it isn’t right. _But it doesn’t have to be this way. Much of this human suffering and economic instability could have been prevented by conservative public policies._ Despite the challenges of 2021, I am looking forward to the new year. In 2022, New Jerseyans are going to have the opportunity to put a stop to the radical progressive politicians following the Biden administration who are steering America down a dangerous path. We all want safe communities, strong economies, well-cared-for children, and a society that works for _all_. Self-interested Democrat leaders are going to play games, bully us, and change the rules of Democracy to benefit their own agendas. But New Jerseyans are ready to take back Congress and build a better America for everyone.
|
---
|
---
For New Jersey,Shawn Hyland
|
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: re: big news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59164741:6_nTjlEgN:m:1:3253819041:024DA8E11D03729128927609C1C06FA8:r) | |
---
Peter, in just the last few years, we've seen liberal government wreak havoc on our way of life.

From nationwide rioting and violent protests to unconstitutional lockdowns, to mask mandates and record-setting inflation, Americans are facing difficult times.

And an out-of-control, Democrat-led Congress and liberal president in the White House isn't helping. Instead of providing solutions, they continue to pour billions of taxpayer dollars into pet projects and bad investments.

That's why today, I'm officially announcing my campaign for reelection to serve the people of Kentucky - and the whole liberty movement - in the Senate for another term.

**[STAND WITH RAND: CHIP IN TO SUPPORT RE-ELECTION >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59164741:6_nTjlEgN:m:1:3253819041:024DA8E11D03729128927609C1C06FA8:r)**

I know this race won't be easy -- we have tough challenges ahead.
** **
The bureaucrats in our government, the pro-censorship leaders in big-tech, and the anti-freedom liberals in the media will do anything they can to make sure we don't succeed.
** **
That's why I want to start off with a big goal - to make sure we're prepared for whatever comes next. I'm pledging today to raise $100,000 for the launch of this campaign and I hope you'll join me by chipping in now.
__
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59164741:6_nTjlEgN:m:1:3253819041:024DA8E11D03729128927609C1C06FA8:r)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59164741:6_nTjlEgN:m:1:3253819041:024DA8E11D03729128927609C1C06FA8:r)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $35**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59164741:6_nTjlEgN:m:1:3253819041:024DA8E11D03729128927609C1C06FA8:r)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $45**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59164741:6_nTjlEgN:m:1:3253819041:024DA8E11D03729128927609C1C06FA8:r)
The stakes are just too high to let the liberals maintain control in Washington.

You're already feeling the damage they've done!

* Gas prices are up 40%
* Groceries cost up to 6% more
* Rent, cars, and energy prices are skyrocketing
* _Americans are struggling. _

It's hitting us hard all over the nation.

And here in Kentucky, where we're recovering not only from a pandemic but a statewide natural disaster, we simply cannot afford to continue down this path.

We must correct the course now. And we can do that by taking back the Senate and restoring a common-sense, pro-freedom approach to government.

**_Let 's not forget: we only need one seat to take control. _**

And I'm 100% confident that if we stand together now we can take a stand for liberty and win that one seat to take back the Senate in 2022.

Please, chip in what you can to make our launch a success and start this year off the right way: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3476970/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59164741:6_nTjlEgN:m:1:3253819041:024DA8E11D03729128927609C1C06FA8:r)**

Thank you in advance.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

#

Friends —
As you know, Mark Kelly made the decision to reject corporate PAC money in his campaign. It was the right call, but it makes things a little harder.
This campaign is funded entirely by lots and lots of people chipping in small amounts of money when they can.
In 2021, more than 200,000 people contributed to our campaign and our average online donation was right around $20. We’re very proud of that fact.
But if we are going to win in 2022, we need you in the fight. We need you to make your first donation to this campaign.
It doesn’t have to be a big one. It all adds up. But we need your help to get the election year off to a strong start, because our opponents are already spending millions on attack ads against Mark.

body:
🚩Pelosi has decided that she will run again and remain Speaker if Democrats hold the majority next year. We can't let that happen. | | | |
---
| | | Patriot,

We've seen over **23 House Democrats announce their retirement **leading into this year's election.

However, one Democrat refuses to retire: _**Nancy Pelosi.**_
---
| Not only is she running again, but _**Nancy Pelosi wants to remain Speaker of the House if Democrats maintain control next November! **_

**After years of continued failed leadership, it's way past time for her to go. **

[Do you think it's time to Fire Pelosi? Answer now.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=b5855e99ac&e=1050d051da)

---
| Pelosi, the Squad, and Leftist House Democrats are enabling Joe Biden's overreaching administration. Their policies have caused crises on **our border, in our supply chain, in our energy sector, and even massive inflation devaluing your earnings.**

Democrats have shown us they cannot be trusted to be in charge. We'll bring **Conservative solutions to fix Liberal problems.**
---
| [Do You Think It's Time to Fire Pelosi?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=80247fa355&e=1050d051da "Do You Think It's Time to Fire Pelosi?")
---
| Last year, Coastal Liberals infused cash into our opponent's campaign to try to change our state. _**This year, our opponent is actually traveling to wealthy New York neighborhoods to raise money.**_

We fought back together, and we'll do it again. With your help, we'll **Fire Nancy Pelosi.**

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner

name: Katie Baker
subject: ICYMI: "Dems face off in Maryland primary in an incredibly Republican year"
body:
We need a tested candidate like Doug who truly cares about what will happen to our state if we don't elect a Democratic governor. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzunPCJZCWqegLzEb93J4Yrp2FiJP3YqyTAgFy92fh0V08ykHJ2L0xeneWIdJ_QAz1DIpO8PRFFTCXrlVHxxHTOb51rdtpk4pWSNuPJ3S3M7xDA77s8LbiTpYq1xKXRR3Yyjt8li_WsACduuqCpxO9qsbcPuiPWFzUbe_NOMCwUWhe2jPK8zFzRCOfFZQjWcAR69F2_jmcL79UNNvBuS4cVIQg42WHZBJ9pTmf6SV5A-xzXHyIHttHry4qTrfXAz3Sjn6eFw9defSkIrG-GxjgNpLdfu3RmdK3bxRLuM7dQuV9o1ETuNAN1k7PTIAR3MAngcqADPqx02nzAdK-ZhCIy4GFyaIgzrIAL9oiteUoGKj5Z6DNjpdCWAgdvbTdNKUOzd467mH35xQpOgioMjFQI3s/3if/KcJL4GNyTUS1uU0JoZ5BOg/h0/xDtGPSATrPTC_sHh-2tiOlyc5tx2X_7Oge3XvjOTq2w)
---
Hi friends, _Politico_ recently published an article that highlighted Doug's observations about the critical challenges Democrats face as we try to flip the governorship from red to blue in 2022. **In case you missed it, check out the summary of the article below!**
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDL0195r-gNaKL0NXw0E6jsbolAd7WrWUbkIPs5xy9RdOt163TKa1g4YxR2bb2YYauAufngiy4CSfaMgr59pr8K8VWxk-DnHZOkgWz9CPyz8SlezXdzHNfFMyUNANS7FxFmQAUnnivbWzWI133-CNY-URaZdgvI8xJX8wrB7rwF2vKVqFCHsEiKNNZf9DOhbo8-7Bd_jNYy4C1tytqPyvOvry0JbVb_v1RFMIDdFg64QFoyMX5tNlDCx2p5OAnCympj8INKktNQBgS8XkvOwblKvyBXyoMTKshFGrP_dLF2GDO9_gZht5zyCLO9vSBnHHz7yXs0Tx5fl31S-0rod611k/3if/KcJL4GNyTUS1uU0JoZ5BOg/h1/vNjkve3yl4MSbCa8rR3pogz_F5Jz9HW3UiF3lsVHmK8)
---
Dems face off in Maryland primary _ --__in an 'incredibly Republican Year'_
---
_Looming over the Democratic primary is a political environment likely benefiting Republicans -- amplified by the GOP's victory in neighboring Virginia last month. One of the Democratic hopefuls (Doug Gansler) told POLITICO he thinks 2022 could be the most difficult election for his party in a half-century._ _[...] [ Gansler] said that Democrats' recent losses in the state -- coupled with an expected tough political climate for the party nationally -- **are why the party should nominate a candidate best suited to win the general election.**_ _[...] "The idea that somebody ... that might come out of the Democratic primary that's never held a political office and then try to take on the Hogan machine in an incredibly Republican year is myopic," he said._

clean_body: We need a tested candidate like Doug who truly cares about what will happen to our state if we don't elect a Democratic governor. | | Hi friends, Politico recently published an article that highlighted Doug's observations about the critical challenges Democrats face as we try to flip the governorship from red to blue in 2022. In case you missed it, check out the summary of the article below! | Dems face off in Maryland primary --in an 'incredibly Republican Year' Looming over the Democratic primary is a political environment likely benefiting Republicans -- amplified by the GOP's victory in neighboring Virginia last month. One of the Democratic hopefuls (Doug Gansler) told POLITICO he thinks 2022 could be the most difficult election for his party in a half-century. [...] [ Gansler] said that Democrats' recent losses in the state -- coupled with an expected tough political climate for the party nationally -- are why the party should nominate a candidate best suited to win the general election. [...] "The idea that somebody ... that might come out of the Democratic primary that's never held a political office and then try to take on the Hogan machine in an incredibly Republican year is myopic," he said. | Doug is right. The political winds are in Republicans' favor this year and it is essential we elect the Democrat who is most capable of taking on the Republican machine and winning over the most voters. Democrats need a tested candidate like Doug who truly cares about what will happen to our state if we don't elect a Democratic governor. That's why Doug is running. He has the knowledge, experience, and ability to win the governorship and start building a better Maryland for everyone on Day One. Thank you for being a part of our campaign, Katie Baker Team Gansler By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. If we allow them to build a huge fundraising lead, we’re toast. It’s absolutley critical that we have the funding we need to compete with the Left online and on TV.

name: Mike Thompson
subject: 2022 will be a year worth remembering!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email
body:
# [#]
Peter,

While 2021 was a big year full of progress and change, we have the chance to make 2022 even better – by not only holding onto the majority in Congress, but by continuing our work to implement positive change that will impact our community for generations to come.

I couldn’t be more thankful to have you on our team and I look forward to working together throughout the year as we continue to deliver on our promises for folks across the nation.

I hope you have a happy new year and enjoyed a wonderful holiday season.

Thank you for your continued support,

Mike Thompson

We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. body:
Ready to make history?
#
Peter:
Email asks wearing you out?
Impossible to determine where your donation can truly make a difference?
I know how you feel. **Here’s one campaign that is truly different.**
A woman setting out to make history in Illinois – being outspent five to one, but going toe to toe. An exciting cause you can sign up for that speaks directly to our values.
**Anna Valencia.**
She would be the first woman and the first Latina to be elected Secretary of State in Illinois.
Can she win? She is about to pass the $1 million mark in fundraising for the June Democratic primary election.
She has the support of key unions like the Illinois Nurses Association. She has the endorsements of Senator Tammy Duckworth, Congresswoman Lauren Underwood, and yours truly.
Now it’s time for you to join in this history-making effort.
**[Here’s the ask: $5 a month for five months or whatever you can afford.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40362003/324006950/402132440?refcode=dd_em_220104_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTI2NzlmZS05ZjZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0PNY6QHhkdqsNYEyDcerBUFjNkScwFzlvQQxvUfZ56E=)**
Join us.
I’m for Anna.
With your help she can win.
My best,
Dick Durbin

An exciting cause you can sign up for that speaks directly to our values. Anna Valencia. She would be the first woman and the first Latina to be elected Secretary of State in Illinois. Can she win? She is about to pass the $1 million mark in fundraising for the June Democratic primary election. She has the support of key unions like the Illinois Nurses Association. She has the endorsements of Senator Tammy Duckworth, Congresswoman Lauren Underwood, and yours truly. Now it’s time for you to join in this history-making effort. = Join us. I’m for Anna. With your help she can win. My best, Dick Durbin **= Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: checking in!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/WuNhCFqtCtoQCeGDlR1crEUUuTyGET0GF4etqOxSs5Q=/oI1_0b0jvmgXPlZgOmwCCy1A9lhzJGeaDnG4DhBpZwE=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220104-1-EM)
---
| Peter - Happy New Year! It's the first week of 2022, and we must seize the opportunity before us. We must elect leaders that will go to Washington to fight for them.

**I am deeply honored and humbled by the outpouring of support we received to hit our fundraising goals in 2021. Since launching my campaign, I have spoken with hundreds of voters across the district and I have been truly touched by how enthusiastically my candidacy has been received.

It is clear that they are placing their trust and faith in me to be that fighter and I am grateful for their support.**

Your support has fueled our campaign to date and I can't wait to see what we accomplish together this year.

We've raised over $162,000 in the first 45 days of this race which is an impressive showing in just six weeks.

Eighty-three percent of these donations came from within North Carolina and the overwhelming majority of those from within the 6th Congressional district.

Over 75% of donations are $100 or less.

[_**We 're running a grassroots, people-powered campaign. If you're able to help us hit the ground running in 2022, please donate today!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/WuNhCFqtCtoQCeGDlR1crEUUuTyGET0GF4etqOxSs5Q=/oI1_0b0jvmgXPlZgOmwCCy1A9lhzJGeaDnG4DhBpZwE=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220104-1-EM)

Valerie Foushee
Democratic Candidate for Congress, NC-06

Friend,

The last few months have been incredible for Marc Thielman. His mission to **restore freedom and dignity for the people of Oregon** has gained tremendous momentum and support. Our campaign has hundreds of individual donors, who - like you - know that **freedom is the cornerstone of our constitutional republic**. We need your continuous support to keep this grassroots campaign going strong and elect a governor who will serve the people - not the system.
[**Will you invest in Oregon’s future?**](https://u22856175.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=Qqu2eGArjYt8p8lYGOqE7bgeL636dXSee66-2FAL4TYHj9TIGyEaiWLHVwqbMORKraxZDFoxkuULKbn-2BxO-2Bl2GEw-3D-3DQyFp_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6vRW58oijNugQDQHDJjlHLvHnVpN5mYryDeUWeIC9QsbcRtc8AcZ4jHT3AqfoGtpmAMD9c65aObAxEsOizw-2FPho6QPqaeqNkRhArdvGR58dy0Hljz02ISprCmsx4wsU9oaJHz23gKep9lxHkDvet8oOO4Dnef5k2F1eieFMjT3bd-2Bk78p-2ByXhlJBOUGjN8s0DlVO4AwcmyD1-2BUEQqIdJHgWcu15Ae0qdvUwvSf1KMD0BQ4c5W1kkYLUZ1XNRN1p-2BLZM0HS4WkyDmeapdNzclURjSgA-2BJMoMBtCrt6D9WdGP-2FatZxSGesxIEBCLcoWr31IXiidxuNclph8G-2B1IElpiEV-2FUvznvXU9Q5Y7VqbP6LUki4FonbR2WU8bJbhDWj6KvFZf43Y2xhHKteh-2BMTtZrRca8AtO-2BRiF6he5v-2BqgZOONI4ZzBejm444YBzdbTm1nkiAgYUsdDgF-2FtOsTFmGAyqijiwcF-2B3r0r0tIjRHr1ktBCt5J45351nNEi2azYTQPdMAJBYjzyFbjLvvKpSQsuB3vANfM-2B9h1qNGu4qhwHjE4W1zZa43qd21bflmzRaIkA03gFXlgDIJZw-2Fqc8TKpOOb3EVKYcdEfynsUiocCfuy2xhBRrpFBiTV1MJwvMl-2FYolysdfSRgp-2BF5yWdnCCazHLTQdSLAmHq2myDP1s8m1J1GXC3Z1oWb5ThzpTacx-2BszRLXpOk5gjEWXUZGRUe7SYrf4N6qwL1H5hRCZCWGQoDFbeBREGIZW9wH83gdPmASGgQzbGMdkwyVDWwjfAEiuEIUv-2FGeIY6ACl30LH5Gf2hQ-3D) Let’s get leadership that stands for self-determination, individual liberty, and freedom - not heavy-handed government control.

Marc entered the race to bring balance through tangible and sustainable policies that are not derived from special interest-led lobbying efforts in Salem made behind closed doors. **It’s his promise to every Oregonian that he will stand firm in the pursuit of sound policy, not special interests.**

clean_body: | | | | Friend, The last few months have been incredible for Marc Thielman. His mission to restore freedom and dignity for the people of Oregon has gained tremendous momentum and support. Our campaign has hundreds of individual donors, who - like you - know that freedom is the cornerstone of our constitutional republic. We need your continuous support to keep this grassroots campaign going strong and elect a governor who will serve the people - not the system. Let’s get leadership that stands for self-determination, individual liberty, and freedom - not heavy-handed government control. Marc entered the race to bring balance through tangible and sustainable policies that are not derived from special interest-led lobbying efforts in Salem made behind closed doors. It’s his promise to every Oregonian that he will stand firm in the pursuit of sound policy, not special interests. | | | | | Marc Thielman for Governor | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM_ PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 949, Bandon, 97411

name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: The year we put an end to Bill Lee’s callous disregard for the lives of Tennesseans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
| | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martin-email-jan2022?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220104thankyou_DJM_full_xx_hdr)
---
Happy New Year, Peter!
**THANK YOU** to everyone who contributed to our end-of-year fundraising drive. I know it’s a tough time of year financially for many, but your contributions — whether $5 or $50 — are what’s going to fuel this campaign all the way up to November 8.
I spent the days leading up to and after Christmas in the ICU, where I saw firsthand how Omicron is ripping through our communities. Thankfully, this strain of the coronavirus is a little less deadly, but I cannot help but wonder what might have been different — and how many lives would have been saved — if Bill Lee had embraced vaccines and mask mandates instead of lies and conspiracy theories.
**With your help, 2022 will be the year we put an end to Lee’s callous disregard for the lives of his constituents.** Tennesseans deserve a governor who looks out for them, and who fights to protect ALL of our families.
Thank you again. Now, let’s go win this.
Dr. Jason Martin

P.S. One of the best ways you can help make our campaign sustainable over the next eleven months is by setting up a recurring donation—[**if you’re able, will you sign up for a recurring donation of $11 every month from now until November 8?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40362556/324009279/-371068714?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220104thankyou_DJM_full_xx_l1&recurring=true&amount=11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTcwZDIyNC1hMjZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OznrIr9FyMLZBmUJuPzEt9JN7krXgmgkLREmcWmQSQA=)

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: Thanks!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-jan22?refcode=em220104thankyou&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-jan22?refcode=em220104thankyou&amount=10] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-jan22?refcode=em220104thankyou&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-jan22?refcode=em220104thankyou&amount=10]
I just wanted to check in real quick to say thank you!
Your support of my campaign last year — especially during the FEC deadline in December — has put us in a position to not only keep Delaware’s only seat in the House of Representatives blue, but also ensure we keep our Democratic majorities in the state legislature.
So if you gave $5 or $500, each and every one of my supporters has played a vital role in getting this campaign started on the right foot.
Thank you so much, and I hope you have a wonderful 2022!
Lisa
Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-jan22?refcode=em220104thankyou&amount=10]
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.

name: Update From James Carville
subject: So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
| | |
---
**Listen up, friend!**
Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.
So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in 2022 – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes).
That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. Especially when up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $55,000 before her End of Quarter deadline tonight, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **
**[Will you rush $5 or more now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40362575/324009354/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1987-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmU4ZGYwMi1hMjZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J5xFcSS4PlZMTSYctvuNkWLD1XcsrmYQW-85bFic7eA=)**
From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it.
Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony, Rubio.
That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. **But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be.**
**So if you truly want Val Demings in the Senate, if you truly want to flip Florida blue and oust Marco Rubio, then I need you to give, because she can't cede any ground:[Make a contribution of $5 or more now – every dollar you can spare before the End of Quarter deadline – to elect Val Demings and defend Democrats' Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40362576/324009355/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1987-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmU4ZGYwMi1hMjZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J5xFcSS4PlZMTSYctvuNkWLD1XcsrmYQW-85bFic7eA=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Niki=20Conforti?=
subject: Contrast On Crime
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b0f09fb42dd8/conforti-for-congress-6621949?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Cook County's stance on crime has failed our communities!

Violent crime is on the upswing with no end in sight and our communities and our families are not safe.

Sean Casten and Marie Newman have fully supported overall police reform, including defunding the police. This has led to the deadliest year on record since 1996 - 25 years!!

On top of that, criminals are more brazen. They are venturing out of their own neighborhoods into ours to commit violent crimes - even extending into DuPage County. They challenge police officers when they are apprehended - often with deadly results, knowing that punishments have been downgraded.

We deserve to feel safe on our streets!

When I am in Congress, I will push to refund the police and provide them the resources they need to do their job.

If you want your US Congressional Representative to fight for you and your rights, vote Conforti for Congress 2022!
[Click here](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=647aeee23e&e=25f4fa3311) to donate to my campaign and bring common sense to Congress.
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
