name: Eric Greitens
subject: We did a lot in 2021 but the best is yet to come.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
I say it's about time we take out country back. Don't you agree?
---
| | | | | |
---
| 2021 has been a wild and eventful year for all of us. Though there are certainly things that made this year a tough one--it's important to reflect on the things that we accomplished together.
As 2022 nears, I wanted to share some of the things that I'm most proud of from the year behind us:
In March, I announced my 2022 campaign for the US Senate. When I announced, I made clear that this campaign wouldn't be for the go-along-to-get-along Republicans or the RINO establishment. This campaign is an America First campaign of, by, and for the people of Missouri.
Rest assured, the RINOs and the establishment took notice. We've taken more incoming from the weak and woke RINOs than the radical Left--but that's just fine with me.
In the first few weeks of announcing, I was honored to announce that the Greitens campaign has been endorsed by an army of America First fighters, many of whom stood strong with President Donald J. Trump.
Among those who've endorsed are Kimberly Guilfoyle, former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani, Lt. General Michael Flynn, Ryan Zinke, Dennis Prager, Bernie Kerik, Steve Cortes, and Dr. Sebastian Gorka.
Then, my friends, Pastor Darrell Scott, Bruce LeVell, and Stacy Washington--the leaders of Black Voices for Trump--joined Team Greitens.
In March, I was proud to announce the endorsement of St. Louis police sergeant Ann Dorn, widow of Captain David Dorn.
We've also got the support of smart and strong veterans like USAF Lt. Colonel and Senator Wendy Rogers, who I've been proud stand alongside in the fight for election integrity and USMC Gunnery Sergeant Jessie Jane Duff, who lead Veterans for Trump 2020.
I'm honored to have the support of such a tough and courageous group of thinkers and fighters.
In 2021, we traveled tens of thousands of miles meeting voters in all four corners of Missouri.
Whether we were honoring our First Responders in Sikeston...
---
|
---
| Attending a BBQ in Carthage...
---
|
---
| Speaking to supporters in Moberly at the largest-ever Macon County Lincoln Days...
---
|
---
|
---
| Meeting with a great group of Patriots in Randolph County...
---
|
---
|
---
| Hearing from great folks at a town hall with my friend, Marc Cox in St. Charles...
---
|
---
| Spending time with first responders and their families in Kansas City...
---
|
---
| We pushed through a wild thunderstorm in Troy for Pike and Lincoln County Republicans...
---
|
---
|
---
| We met in New Madrid with law enforcement from Stoddard, Scott, and Mississippi Counties...
---
|
---
|
---
| In 2021, hundreds of Missourians came out to welcome Mayor Rudy Giuliani, Bernie Kerik, and Jessie Jane Duff to the Show-Me-State for our rally.
---
|
---
|
---
| But in 2021, we didn't just keep the fight here in Missouri. We went to the front lines, and we did the things no other candidate was willing to do.
We went to the US-Mexico Border--twice--to see Biden's Border Crisis firsthand. We actually crossed into Ciudad Acuña, Mexico to see it from both sides. It's worse than the mainstream media will tell you.
In Pinal County, Arizona--we rode along with Sheriff Mark Lamb to the spots where illegal drug and human smuggling is the worst.
---
|
---
|
---
| But what was happening in Texas was even more appalling. We rode with Sheriff Joe Frank Martinez of Val Verde County, Texas.
---
|
---
| We crossed into Mexico with Ben Bergquam of Real America's Voice. Within five minutes of arriving, we saw illegal immigrants who claimed to be from Venezuela cross the Rio Grande into the United States.
---
|
---
| We also found hundreds of IDs thrown on the ground in Mexico--why? So when they enter the US and are picked up by Border Patrol, they can claim to be from Haiti or another country and "seek asylum." Thanks to Joe Biden, they are released into the US with no documentation and asked nicely to return in 60 days for a hearing on their asylum claim...

In 2021, we also were the only major US Senate candidate in the country to visit the Arizona Audit. The process was meticulous and incredibly secure--the mainstream media will lie to you & call you a conspiracy theorist for saying the truth: the 2020 election was stolen.
---
|
---
|
---
| We were the only candidate in Missouri to take election integrity seriously and plainly say that the 2020 election was fraudulent.
But in 2021, we did something major. Something that drew the ire of RINOs and establishment consultants everywhere... On Steve Bannon's War Room, I committed that when I am in the US Senate, I'm not voting for Mitch McConnell to be GOP Majority Leader. Drain the swamp!
---
|
---
| I'm proud to be in this fight and am comfortable making calls like that because the PEOPLE have our back. We aren't going to Washington to go-along and get-along. It's not enough to send people with an "R" behind their name to DC. It's America First fighters who support President Donald J. Trump only--and I believe that every candidate in this race should answer whether they would side with the weak, woke RINOs and support Mitch McConnell as leader.
The race is going really, really well. The good news is this: we are winning... BIG!
---
|
---
| President Trump's pollster says that we hold a 30-point lead in the GOP primary. Right before Thanksgiving, a new poll came out that shows that I'm beating the Democrats by 13 points--a massive margin!
Patriots like Bernie Marcus and Dick Uihlein, some of President Trump's top donors, have reportedly already put millions of dollars behind our campaign.
I'm humbled by the support of so many amazing people in Missouri and around the country. I wish everyone a Happy New Year & I'm excited for what 2022 will bring! It's time to take our country back!
Yours in Service, Eric Greitens
---

clean_body: I say it's about time we take out country back. Don't you agree? | | | | | | | 2021 has been a wild and eventful year for all of us. Though there are certainly things that made this year a tough one--it's important to reflect on the things that we accomplished together. As 2022 nears, I wanted to share some of the things that I'm most proud of from the year behind us: In March, I announced my 2022 campaign for the US Senate. When I announced, I made clear that this campaign wouldn't be for the go-along-to-get-along Republicans or the RINO establishment. This campaign is an America First campaign of, by, and for the people of Missouri. Rest assured, the RINOs and the establishment took notice. We've taken more incoming from the weak and woke RINOs than the radical Left--but that's just fine with me. In the first few weeks of announcing, I was honored to announce that the Greitens campaign has been endorsed by an army of America First fighters, many of whom stood strong with President Donald J. Trump. Among those who've endorsed are Kimberly Guilfoyle, former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani, Lt. General Michael Flynn, Ryan Zinke, Dennis Prager, Bernie Kerik, Steve Cortes, and Dr. Sebastian Gorka. Then, my friends, Pastor Darrell Scott, Bruce LeVell, and Stacy Washington--the leaders of Black Voices for Trump--joined Team Greitens. In March, I was proud to announce the endorsement of St. Louis police sergeant Ann Dorn, widow of Captain David Dorn. We've also got the support of smart and strong veterans like USAF Lt. Colonel and Senator Wendy Rogers, who I've been proud stand alongside in the fight for election integrity and USMC Gunnery Sergeant Jessie Jane Duff, who lead Veterans for Trump 2020. I'm honored to have the support of such a tough and courageous group of thinkers and fighters. In 2021, we traveled tens of thousands of miles meeting voters in all four corners of Missouri. Whether we were honoring our First Responders in Sikeston... | | Attending a BBQ in Carthage... | | Speaking to supporters in Moberly at the largest-ever Macon County Lincoln Days... | | | Meeting with a great group of Patriots in Randolph County... | | | Hearing from great folks at a town hall with my friend, Marc Cox in St. Charles... | | Spending time with first responders and their families in Kansas City... | | We pushed through a wild thunderstorm in Troy for Pike and Lincoln County Republicans... | | | We met in New Madrid with law enforcement from Stoddard, Scott, and Mississippi Counties... | | | In 2021, hundreds of Missourians came out to welcome Mayor Rudy Giuliani, Bernie Kerik, and Jessie Jane Duff to the Show-Me-State for our rally. | | | But in 2021, we didn't just keep the fight here in Missouri. We went to the front lines, and we did the things no other candidate was willing to do. We went to the US-Mexico Border--twice--to see Biden's Border Crisis firsthand. We actually crossed into Ciudad Acuña, Mexico to see it from both sides. It's worse than the mainstream media will tell you. In Pinal County, Arizona--we rode along with Sheriff Mark Lamb to the spots where illegal drug and human smuggling is the worst. | | | But what was happening in Texas was even more appalling. We rode with Sheriff Joe Frank Martinez of Val Verde County, Texas. | | We crossed into Mexico with Ben Bergquam of Real America's Voice. Within five minutes of arriving, we saw illegal immigrants who claimed to be from Venezuela cross the Rio Grande into the United States. | | We also found hundreds of IDs thrown on the ground in Mexico--why? So when they enter the US and are picked up by Border Patrol, they can claim to be from Haiti or another country and "seek asylum." Thanks to Joe Biden, they are released into the US with no documentation and asked nicely to return in 60 days for a hearing on their asylum claim... In 2021, we also were the only major US Senate candidate in the country to visit the Arizona Audit. The process was meticulous and incredibly secure--the mainstream media will lie to you & call you a conspiracy theorist for saying the truth: the 2020 election was stolen. | | | We were the only candidate in Missouri to take election integrity seriously and plainly say that the 2020 election was fraudulent. But in 2021, we did something major. Something that drew the ire of RINOs and establishment consultants everywhere... On Steve Bannon's War Room, I committed that when I am in the US Senate, I'm not voting for Mitch McConnell to be GOP Majority Leader. Drain the swamp! | | I'm proud to be in this fight and am comfortable making calls like that because the PEOPLE have our back. We aren't going to Washington to go-along and get-along. It's not enough to send people with an "R" behind their name to DC. It's America First fighters who support President Donald J. Trump only--and I believe that every candidate in this race should answer whether they would side with the weak, woke RINOs and support Mitch McConnell as leader. The race is going really, really well. The good news is this: we are winning... BIG! | | President Trump's pollster says that we hold a 30-point lead in the GOP primary. Right before Thanksgiving, a new poll came out that shows that I'm beating the Democrats by 13 points--a massive margin! Patriots like Bernie Marcus and Dick Uihlein, some of President Trump's top donors, have reportedly already put millions of dollars behind our campaign. I'm humbled by the support of so many amazing people in Missouri and around the country. I wish everyone a Happy New Year & I'm excited for what 2022 will bring! It's time to take our country back! Yours in Service, Eric Greitens | | | | FOLLOW US == == == == | | | | Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate | PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 | | | Sent by mailto:team@ericgreitens.com powered by

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ameena=20Matthews?=
subject: Bobby Rush announces his retirement
body:
The race for the 1st District is now an "open" primary | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3b94f9e8f63f/bobby-rush-announces-his-retirement?e=5fba611a2c)
---
| |
---
| |
# Last night, Rep. Bobby Rush announced he would be retiring from Congress.
I am now a candidate in an open primary here in the 1st District. But we also know that no primary is genuinely "open" in Illinois. We know that special interest groups and machine politics will grind away in this race.

However, I truly believe that we are building something meaningful with our movement in this race. We have centered the people who live here and their concerns. When we talk to our neighbors, they all tell us the same thing. They need access to healthcare. They need housing and food assistance. They want community-driven solutions to violence. It is time for a new way of thinking about Federal investments in our community. It's time for a new way of organizing politics on the south side.

But I need your help to make this happen! We need you to help us reject politics as usual in this campaign. And we would be grateful if you could help us reach others. [Can you ask five friends to donate to the campaign?](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=f2238a91f7&e=5fba611a2c) [Can you volunteer to make 15 phones calls?](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=66f86d3f47&e=5fba611a2c) [Can you help us with our petitions?](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=ec3bd647d6&e=5fba611a2c)

With your help, we can bring about real change in the 1st District. [](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=13e91a05e3&e=5fba611a2c) [](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=f3cacd1a9e&e=5fba611a2c)
In Solidarity,

Dr. Ameena Matthews

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress](https://dellickerforcongress
body:
Dellicker for Congress is Ready for 2022 | | | |
---
| | |
# Back to Work!
I hope you all had a relaxing Christmas and enjoyable holiday. The Dellicker Family certainly did. Now I'm excited to get back to work to Keep America Free! The primary election will be here soon and our campaign is in full swing. Next week, we are hosting two public events that are free and open to the public. Please join us!

**Volunteer Meeting
Wed., Jan. 12th from 6:30-8 p.m. at the Gin Mill & Grille
(1750 Main Street, Northampton)**

**Meet-and-Greet
Sat., Jan. 15th from 6-9 p.m. at the Catasauqua Club
(226 Pine Street, Catasauqua)**

We hope you can attend. Please RSVP to Linda Swankoski at [swankoskil@hotmail.com](mailto:swankoskil@hotmail.com).

---
| [RSVP](mailto:swankoskil@hotmail.com?subject=RSVP "RSVP")
---
|
---
|
---
| **Good Jobs**

West Virginia Senator Joe Manchin did the right thing by pulling the plug on President Biden’s $2 trillion “Build Back Better” plan. But it’s far too early to declare victory. If we truly want to help American workers, we must help them get good jobs instead of making them more dependent upon government. [Read More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=bd406e7a61&e=1090c5c412).
---
|
---
|
---
| **Safe Communities**

Last month, American chipmaker Intel sent a letter to its suppliers warning them not to source products from China’s Xinjiang region, where the government uses forced labor to produce goods and services. But after protests from the Chinese Communist Party, Intel issued the following statement, “We apologize for the trouble caused to our respected Chinese customers, partners and the public. Intel is committed to becoming a trusted technology partner and accelerating joint development with China.” [Read more](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=41e0342012&e=1090c5c412).

We are still waiting for the apology to China's ethnic minorities, who are the victims of slavery and genocide because they dare to believe in something greater than the Chinese Communist Party.

Wake up Washington and Wall Street. This insanity has got to stop.
---
|
---
|
---
| **Strong Families**

The _New York Times_ journalist behind the infamous “1619 Project” said last week that she doesn’t understand “this idea that parents should decide what’s being taught” in America’s public schools. [Read more](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=eb74c4c12b&e=1090c5c412).

Of course, such attitudes from coastal elites are precisely the problem. Let’s pray that more parental involvement leads to less time wasted on liberal indoctrination and more time spent on math and reading.
---
|
---
| **Get Involved!** Please consider volunteering to help his campaign or making a donation to help him spread the message. He needs your help to **KEEP AMERICA FREE!**

clean_body: Dellicker for Congress is Ready for 2022 | | | | | | | Back to Work! I hope you all had a relaxing Christmas and enjoyable holiday. The Dellicker Family certainly did. Now I'm excited to get back to work to Keep America Free! The primary election will be here soon and our campaign is in full swing. Next week, we are hosting two public events that are free and open to the public. Please join us! Volunteer Meeting Wed., Jan. 12th from 6:30-8 p.m. at the Gin Mill & Grille (1750 Main Street, Northampton) Meet-and-Greet Sat., Jan. 15th from 6-9 p.m. at the Catasauqua Club (226 Pine Street, Catasauqua) We hope you can attend. Please RSVP to Linda Swankoski at mailto:swankoskil@hotmail.com. | mailto:swankoskil@hotmail.com?subject=RSVP "RSVP" | | | Good Jobs West Virginia Senator Joe Manchin did the right thing by pulling the plug on President Biden’s $2 trillion “Build Back Better” plan. But it’s far too early to declare victory. If we truly want to help American workers, we must help them get good jobs instead of making them more dependent upon government. . | | | Safe Communities Last month, American chipmaker Intel sent a letter to its suppliers warning them not to source products from China’s Xinjiang region, where the government uses forced labor to produce goods and services. But after protests from the Chinese Communist Party, Intel issued the following statement, “We apologize for the trouble caused to our respected Chinese customers, partners and the public. Intel is committed to becoming a trusted technology partner and accelerating joint development with China.” . We are still waiting for the apology to China's ethnic minorities, who are the victims of slavery and genocide because they dare to believe in something greater than the Chinese Communist Party. Wake up Washington and Wall Street. This insanity has got to stop. | | | Strong Families The New York Times journalist behind the infamous “1619 Project” said last week that she doesn’t understand “this idea that parents should decide what’s being taught” in America’s public schools. . Of course, such attitudes from coastal elites are precisely the problem. Let’s pray that more parental involvement leads to less time wasted on liberal indoctrination and more time spent on math and reading. | | Get Involved! Please consider volunteering to help his campaign or making a donation to help him spread the message. He needs your help to KEEP AMERICA FREE! | "Volunteer" | "Donate" | | "Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress" | Military information and photos of Kevin in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Deptartment of Defense, Air Force, Army, or National Guard. | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Kevin Dellicker for Congress, All rights reserved. # Peter,

When I first announced my campaign for US Senate in September, 2021, I asked every America-First patriot to join my fight against the corrupt political establishment in Washington, DC. The radical Democrats and spineless RINOs want nothing more than to see our campaign fail. Unfortunately for them... we keep gaining momentum! Thanks to all of your support, our campaign for US Senate successfully raised $150,000 from 500 individual donors. We surpassed our end of year goal and continue to surge! Last year, we watched as hundreds of American citizens were politically targeted by rogue Biden regime. As a Proven Republican Fighter, I refuse to stand by and watch the political establishment criminalize exercising our inalienable rights... That why I filed the Prohibition on Political Prisoners in Oklahoma Act in the Oklahoma Senate today. These America-First Patriots are being held against their will for their political beliefs. I REFUSE to let the federal government transport these political prisoners through Oklahoma. The First Amendment to the Constitution guarantees our right to peacefully protest. Those who were arrested on January 6 were escorted by Capitol Police into a building which they own as citizens. Now... many of these people are still being held in jail for a period of time longer than the sentence for the ridiculous charges being levied against them. With your continued support, we're taking our fight to the US Senate. The corrupt political establishment are the ones who should be imprisoned... NOT Americans citizens exercising their Constitutional rights. For the People,
---
---
Senator Nathan Dahm
Candidate for United States Senate
Personal cell number: (918) 615-2335 [P.S. If you were waiting until the New Year to give... Click here to rush a $20.22 donation to the campaign. ](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VVL5Xv3LH77xW83cL7C5pmbhPW842MfZ4CX2VRN5l4bjp3lLBmV1-WJV7CgDtVVm_y5w8xcsxkVDLM9V8mSR1fW4dxJrN2nM7rqW1qwPk-2g3td8N7CcrL6WkC-kW6_Psq06xXHkFW4hJB8j5J_F4mW8KkM_08sCDddN4Ng70BsDh2PW6ky5yW6v4cgQW1yTnWw67YwmrW4pyGh84nmsnTW8jy7rr2sqk2lW4cbLzJ5-svyLW87h7H17pv4XdW5RWpQc3XYR38N5spC7YxXTkXW6B-2CX7wPJvQW2PKnhH6Q-R5rW5jP1YX4pj1pSVqPWNP1ByHcDW6GkwBc8tqsvY3cm21)

**Nancy Pelosi just celebrated her THIRD anniversary as Speaker of the House.**

And we can't help but get emotional over all that she's done for our country over the years:

- She led the charge to hold Donald Trump and his cronies accountable.

- She passed the American Rescue Plan to help our country recover from the COVID-19 pandemic.

- And with President Biden in the White House, she delivered a HISTORIC investment to upgrade America's infrastructure.

**But Republicans have relentlessly ATTACKED Speaker Pelosi -- _so we need to make sure our grassroots Democrats are firmly behind her and our House Majority as we go into this election year._**

That's why we're calling for 63,000 responses to our survey before midnight.**__**

******[Will you take our poll before midnight and confirm your support for Speaker Pelosi's leadership? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/8E0Gs0_)******
---

Thank you,

DCCC
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46196910&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MDM5NDM1MgS2&l=14308035&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46196910&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MDM5NDM1MgS2&l=14308035&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25&recurring=true). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Jerry Dickinson
subject: Starting off the new year on the right foot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Dickinson for Congress Committee
body:
| | |
---
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40363401/324013898/-632576040?utm_source=headerlogo&utm_medium=email&refcode=em_20220104-ty-JD-eoyty-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2NjOWQ5Ny1hOTZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fXTfvb_U6_P4QY6b0XU_PnU4tn5MObZfBZV7I-YEulU=&emci=dc0647e7-736d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=2ccc9d97-a96d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25561085)
---
| I just want to take a moment to express my sincere gratitude for you. Friend, First let me say: Happy New Year! I hope your 2022 is off to a great and refreshing start. Second, I want to tell you how grateful I am for this community. I know we sent a lot of emails over the holidays asking you for money, but that’s because this campaign is people-powered—that means we’re not taking cash from big corporate PACs or the fossil fuel industry. And you all stepped up. **It’s because of you that we hit our goals and we’re starting off the new year on the right foot—so thank you for everything.** Now that we’re officially into 2022, this campaign is going to start heating up. We’ll be emailing you about volunteer opportunities, asking if you want yard signs, seeing if you’ll share some of my content on social media (I promise to limit the number of dad jokes on Twitter!). But seriously, as we get closer and closer to the primary, I’m going to be leaning on you all a bit more to chip in and help out, because that’s what a grassroots campaign is all about. And I know you’ll come through—you always do. So before things start getting more intense, I just want to take a moment to express my sincere gratitude for you. To everyone who’s donated (big or small amounts), shared something about this campaign with a friend, or showed their support with a yard sign: thank you. It really does mean the world to me. I’m so excited to enter this new year with this team, and can’t wait to see what we can do together. Thanks again, Jerry
**_[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40363402/324013899/-2042008336?refcode=em_20220104-ty-JD-eoyty-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2NjOWQ5Ny1hOTZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fXTfvb_U6_P4QY6b0XU_PnU4tn5MObZfBZV7I-YEulU=)_**
---
|
---
| Emails like this are often the best way for us to stay in contact with supporters like you. If you no longer wish to receive email communications, you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/dc0647e7-736d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c/2ccc9d97-a96d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2NjOWQ5Ny1hOTZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fXTfvb_U6_P4QY6b0XU_PnU4tn5MObZfBZV7I-YEulU=&id=129004134).

Friend,
Wow.

2021 was an incredible year for our movement and I couldn’t have done it with YOU!
Just take a look at all we have accomplished: ✓ Visit all 23 Wyoming counties ✓ Travel over 9,000 miles within Wyoming ✓ We launched our first online ad: “Ride for the Brand” ✓ Endorsed by numerous leaders in the State of Wyoming ✓ Endorsed by U.S. Sen. Rand Paul (R-KY) ✓ Endorsed by President Trump As I traveled around the state, I have been humbled and honored by so many people who have thanked me for running. I so appreciate all of the support that you have offered. I know that you are ready to have someone from Wyoming, who has actually fought for Wyoming, and someone with Wyoming values to represent you in Congress. I am that person. Let’s kick-off 2022 with a BANG! If you haven’t already, please tell your friends and family to join Team Hageman, or follow me on social media, to stay up to date on our latest campaign news.
Thank you for everything you have done thus far, friend.

-Harriet Hageman Proud Republican Candidate
Wyoming’s Lone U.S. House Seat

clean_body: | | | | Look at what we’ve accomplished. | Friend, Wow. 2021 was an incredible year for our movement and I couldn’t have done it with YOU! Just take a look at all we have accomplished: ✓ Visit all 23 Wyoming counties ✓ Travel over 9,000 miles within Wyoming ✓ We launched our first online ad: “Ride for the Brand” ✓ Endorsed by numerous leaders in the State of Wyoming ✓ Endorsed by U.S. Sen. Rand Paul (R-KY) ✓ Endorsed by President Trump As I traveled around the state, I have been humbled and honored by so many people who have thanked me for running. I so appreciate all of the support that you have offered. I know that you are ready to have someone from Wyoming, who has actually fought for Wyoming, and someone with Wyoming values to represent you in Congress. I am that person. Let’s kick-off 2022 with a BANG! If you haven’t already, please tell your friends and family to join Team Hageman, or follow me on social media, to stay up to date on our latest campaign news. Thank you for everything you have done thus far, friend. -Harriet Hageman Proud Republican Candidate Wyoming’s Lone U.S. House Seat | | | |

Friend,

Right now, the fate of our nation is hanging in the balance. Between Joe Biden’s failed leadership and the Radical Left’s Socialist Agenda, it’s so important that we Take Back the U.S. Senate to stop America as we know it from turning into a Socialist safe-haven.

We need conservative leaders to step up and make that happen. Luckily, my good friend, Jane Timken, is running for U.S. Senate in Ohio, and she’s the best chance we have to Take Back the U.S. Senate.
| [**RUSH YOUR SUPPORT TO JANE TIMKEN**](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=f9913e9d4f6141fe92a95a1227254b92&_e=IuGeV3xPmC7XYGxgv_w2yjgnQeyLiTdcgTtlHGRFoK2fbc2DTRdoHrOjKJFJrXAUKK_q2-ZaZGd7BjJi0sBVpSr-wz7Cf3ENvJ9yC59b1awjRwMS0-aFCwo9cOStv8VrMLskAWs8SNoOhlZ77uAN4_Ub2_oDnM9TsN06RQpNRTJQaSl0IM86NEEW4vRsVh56qAUJyIkLaNSCv8xhuJCFerBl_o_lfCGj_Mj-QZanFtdjTNjqfdchm_zcx6ZwpX4Ko8uVp_OXd0SgwQSSkhU0Nhvp_w3aguXisn8HyYWzmbCNxkERDqe5oUMZ4Ol_xIfIFJWXlAtP3nN0wfdJjX-hglNBqEAFJ_fozWSm5_fdTJTwG9TCWKpCNeNS1dtdXsvfuUA6QQ9wXdgSgCwmNHQwvH53ySNP_IC6yHpxcZzDZ2XecljxbkZG0-Fya8E5L5xNb1jiw8hQRJp30twX9dlYEhpgWdlSGXKuS4LKwbB-jZ8rrMzNb6oKMQN6VgbJz3q8B7U4G8LLTOwLgLvj3vUhuB8kzZ3qK20_DO1g12rVrWFO_hxPf8CGLa67ENOKx53pFRAvi8WKRaOg2gJzGvOiqQ%3D%3D)

Jane is a proven leader. Her actions and resume are second to none when it comes to pushing the America First Agenda. As Ohio GOP Chair, she won Ohio for President Trump not once, but twice. I know when elected that Jane will be Tough on China, Tough on the Socialist Left, and a staunch advocate for parents to decide what their children should learn instead of being spoon fed Critical Race Theory.

I hope you’ll join me today in supporting a strong woman, a true conservative leader, and a fierce advocate for the America First agenda. If we’re going to Take Back the U.S. Senate and save America, we must elect Jane Timken to the U.S. Senate.

name: Holly McCormack
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene is scared to let the people vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, when Marjorie Taylor Greene got elected in 2020, the circumstances were bleak.
Marge was ramping up her hateful rhetoric and the only democrat in the race was forced to drop out weeks before the election. This left Marjorie Taylor Greene with a wide open lane to the Halls of Congress. However, the democratic challenger still got 25% of the vote despite no longer running.
Let’s be honest folks, GA-14 democrats were scared and had nowhere to turn in 2020. That won’t be the case in 2022. If a candidate who dropped out got 25% of the vote, imagine what our campaign is capable of.
GA-14 cannot have a repeat of 2020. The same folks who voted for Marge were since abandoned and left in the dust. The atmosphere has shifted and we’re going into 2022 ready to fight.
Team Holly knows this won’t be easy by any means. That’s why we have launched the biggest voter registration program GA-14 has ever seen. The ground work we’ve been doing to flip moderates, outreach voters, and register democrats is how we’re going to win this race. Chip in $14 today, and together we can provide Northwest Georgia with true leadership. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1216]
Thanks so much,
Team Holly.

name: Great America Update
subject: College campuses have gone insane
body:
A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6622%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=92tRCHM5X2dKB2RVVsVgmg&sysid=1)
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. Here's one thing you can do about it that can really make a difference.
|
---
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68465%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1x6CLUIEt1IiDc1HHUezUw&sysid=1) Fellow Conservative, **College campuses have gone absolutely insane.** A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-called “birthplace of the free speech movement.” As you may have heard, my speech was abruptly canceled because leftist thugs decided to riot and the administration wouldn’t stick up for free speech. Unfortunately, I’m not the only one to suffer threats and intimidation on campus. Far from it. [ **Fight the intolerant left on campus** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68466%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tA0ajmYVjOapSOwjsg18dA&sysid=1) As I point out in _Resistance is Futile: How the Trump-Hating Left Lost Its Collective Mind_ , ever since Donald Trump’s arrival in politics, **liberals have lost their minds.** But there’s no padded room to keep them contained! Instead, **these violent, masked lunatics have taken over college campuses, where young Americans are turned into automaton leftists just like themselves.** Young conservatives on college campuses across our nation are losing their right to free speech - and even the right to walk down the street without getting sucker punched - because of how intolerant the liberals have become. [**But lest you think I’ve given up hope, faithful conservative, there’s a group I trust that fights back against this onslaught and exposes leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination on college campuses for all the world to see:_Campus Reform_.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68467%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K1pX3LsUAqav%2bwDvYMRLjg&sysid=1) **Campus Reform, a project of the Leadership Institute, is the single most powerful force for campus free speech in America today.** By sticking up for conservative students and giving them the tools necessary to defend themselves and their principles, Campus Reform provides an absolutely essential public service. **Bottom line - Campus Reform uncovers the liberal schemes that the mainstream media wants to keep hidden... and they shut down the liberals’ indoctrination on campus after campus.** [**To continue their vital work, Campus Reform counts on the generous support of conservatives just like you - yes, you! - which is why I urge you to partner with them today by making a generous gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more right now.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68468%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vqkrjwjkhIg%2byQG%2bdIx1Aw&sysid=1) And to sweeten the pot - when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book, _Resistance is Futile_. Saving young conservatives AND getting a free book? What a deal! [ **Get my book here** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68469%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qlTg8b9HmNN2pl5H6rogtQ&sysid=1) Campus police at the College of DuPage in Illinois told conservative students they’d **“lock them up” for handing out copies of the U.S. Constitution.** Yes, that dangerous document that the created the greatest country ever known to man. A teaching assistant at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln harassed the student president of a conservative group for recruiting students. With a gesture from her middle finger, she shrieked profanities at the conservative student and called her a “neo-fascist” and “Nazi.” Charming. At Purdue University in Indiana, a staffer called conservatives “vile, racist idiots” and **threatened to rape pro-life students.** (And you wonder why liberals prefer violence to debate.) In all three cases, LI’s Campus Reform exposed the truth. Armed with investigative reports from their student correspondents on campus, Campus Reform got word out to their nationwide audience of concerned conservatives. And they brought it to news outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, the Blaze, and numerous talk radio shows. Ultimately, Campus Reform’s exposure of the truth got _results_. In these cases and many others, **Campus Reform’s quick and powerful action forced universities to change their anti-conservative policies, discipline leftist student groups, and suspend or fire radical professors.** I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform’s fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won’t be won overnight. **To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help.** [**Please make a generous investment of $25, $35, $50, or more today to support the Leadership Institute’s Campus Reform, stand up to liberal indoctrination, and ensure conservative students don’t lose their freedoms on college campuses.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68460%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rGqk8RnwUB9Qf9CHPidQZg&sysid=1) Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. [**Please help Campus Reform right away so they can empower conservative students and strike back at the lunatic liberals.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68461%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=73j%2fyBocN0YJJQ%2f%2fagfbVQ&sysid=1) Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter **P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,_Resistance is Futile_.** It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because **if we lose the kids, we lose this country.** [**Please donate right away.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68462%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uJoTwUNnFhhHxHFC%2bvXicw&sysid=1)**Thank you.** [ **Yes, I'll join Campus Reform in the fight against leftist tyranny** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68463%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=24HKYGBw8uQlKhiuwe90dA&sysid=1)
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6622%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=92tRCHM5X2dKB2RVVsVgmg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6622%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=92tRCHM5X2dKB2RVVsVgmg&sysid=1)

To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help. Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,Resistance is Futile. It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because if we lose the kids, we lose this country. you. | | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: Ann Coulter
subject: Liberals have lost their minds – butthere’s hope
body:
A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-call
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. Here's one thing you can do about it that can really make a difference.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z3pa5fehajdilja7t4gh2i92qiqrrqp153qhep0g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpj6aob2cph2bs) Fellow Conservative, **College campuses have gone absolutely insane.** A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-called “birthplace of the free speech movement.” As you may have heard, my speech was abruptly canceled because leftist thugs decided to riot and the administration wouldn’t stick up for free speech. Unfortunately, I’m not the only one to suffer threats and intimidation on campus. Far from it. [ **Fight the intolerant left on campus** ](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5v7vkqqs4s13abtmeoqa104apcmrm7m690t3t8o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpj6aob2cph2bs) As I point out in _Resistance is Futile: How the Trump-Hating Left Lost Its Collective Mind_ , ever since Donald Trump’s arrival in politics, **liberals have lost their minds.** But there’s no padded room to keep them contained! Instead, **these violent, masked lunatics have taken over college campuses, where young Americans are turned into automaton leftists just like themselves.** Young conservatives on college campuses across our nation are losing their right to free speech – and even the right to walk down the street without getting sucker punched – because of how intolerant the liberals have become. [**But lest you think I’ve given up hope, faithful conservative, there’s a group I trust that fights back against this onslaught and exposes leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination on college campuses for all the world to see:_Campus Reform_.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zsqh9mac1vn2pu8i0omhhdjchjqnm8uldgfkvrso_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpj6aob2cph2bs) **Campus Reform, a project of the Leadership Institute, is the single most powerful force for campus free speech in America today.** By sticking up for conservative students and giving them the tools necessary to defend themselves and their principles, Campus Reform provides an absolutely essential public service. **Bottom line – Campus Reform uncovers the liberal schemes that the mainstream media wants to keep hidden... and they shut down the liberals’ indoctrination on campus after campus.** [**To continue their vital work, Campus Reform counts on the generous support of conservatives just like you – yes, you! – which is why I urge you to partner with them today by making a generous gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more right now.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z2llgguf6d4ese8bnn3qvfnfeuhvc2k0u6c4lf9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpj6aob2cph2bs) And to sweeten the pot – when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book, _Resistance is Futile_. Saving young conservatives AND getting a free book? What a deal! [ **Get my book here** ](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zl7241rdjhdpjp65d0lcp9v0pi1tbk1ll5ttjoo0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpj6aob2cph2bs) Campus police at the College of DuPage in Illinois told conservative students they’d **“lock them up” for handing out copies of the U.S. Constitution.** Yes, that dangerous document that the created the greatest country ever known to man. A teaching assistant at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln harassed the student president of a conservative group for recruiting students. With a gesture from her middle finger, she shrieked profanities at the conservative student and called her a “neo-fascist” and “Nazi.” Charming. At Purdue University in Indiana, a staffer called conservatives “vile, racist idiots” and **threatened to rape pro-life students.** (And you wonder why liberals prefer violence to debate.) In all three cases, LI’s Campus Reform exposed the truth. Armed with investigative reports from their student correspondents on campus, Campus Reform got word out to their nationwide audience of concerned conservatives. And they brought it to news outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, the Blaze, and numerous talk radio shows. Ultimately, Campus Reform’s exposure of the truth got _results_. In these cases and many others, **Campus Reform’s quick and powerful action forced universities to change their anti-conservative policies, discipline leftist student groups, and suspend or fire radical professors.** I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform’s fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won’t be won overnight. **To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help.** [**Please make a generous investment of $25, $35, $50, or more today to support the Leadership Institute’s Campus Reform, stand up to liberal indoctrination, and ensure conservative students don’t lose their freedoms on college campuses.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zdos4aoie88321mer110501re8tpkdo8jk2avn3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpj6aob2cph2bs) Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. [**Please help Campus Reform right away so they can empower conservative students and strike back at the lunatic liberals.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z23l422v602kr4br4o3ti96nfmj4gcb63220ugd8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpj6aob2cph2bs) Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter **P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,_Resistance is Futile_.** It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because **if we lose the kids, we lose this country.** [**Please donate right away.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zhm8r80aen7jsnnkvivp6dul0foqe7cbcuevijcg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpj6aob2cph2bs) Thank you.** [ **Yes, I'll join Campus Reform in the fight against leftist tyranny** ](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z7fgv9i1afs4f7n1j6lohmtkpfkpu3a0dt7qct3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpj6aob2cph2bs)
---

name: Aadland For Congress
subject: This year we have reason to hope
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019fwXuZVcx2KjMSlALnowzXWiWSYjomO8Rb4kKNPLRsgm_YPvFTuFaCw9aprSIEiEtrVeE47oT5WKOdNPJpMzb6vec_NZtECWk2HJDKkS4yyIH6trN38sLnpus4hLitK7nU4E6KnYK4rZvensaU6TmKNMnAUEFWgp&c=3xnH2BbXtiC58KChubi0LQCD0gSsXEnE0OpI39jeEslrupG4dbAtRg==&ch=B4VHVKsEcNaqzeQXlGJ5XFkizp12sOFTmq0Yi_o6QbhUEAoPD_ednw==)
---
|
---
|
# As we enter the first week of 2022, I have hope
---
My campaign and I are focused on bringing out the very best in every Coloradan. Yes, we are in a dire situation, and we must act now to course correct our country from spiraling into economic and social despair. But my hope is in people like you who realize that something must be done, action must be taken to stem this tide.
I'm looking forward to a vigorous campaign season leading up to not only the primary but the general election. We must have a salient conversation about what our nation should be and who we want representing us. Vitriol does not solve problems. Neither do bullies. Rather, we need to roll up our sleeves and show our friends and neighbors that we have solutions.
Republicans must recognize that we alone cannot win the country back, especially in Colorado where only 28% of the state is Republican. We must find a way to unite as Americans and Coloradans along principles grounded in truth and common to all human beings. That doesn't mean we compromise on truth, but rather find common ground with fellow human beings that believe in freedom, truth, justice and rule of law. It is imperative that we send representatives to Congress that will stop the spending spree--Mother Government cannot replace the dignity of earning one's own living.
Democrats claim rising crime is a state issue. While generally that is true, we need those who will stand up in Washington and stop the flood of illegal immigrants pouring into this country, many of which are criminal. There are federal solutions that can stop this wave of crime. I will pursue this change.
Finally, education is fundamental to the future of our country, as our future is embodied in our children. These three issues are critical to restoring our country, our state, our communities to the American Dream.
And again, my hope is renewed as I see Coloradans rushing to help their neighbors in Boulder County following the devastating fire there. As I send you my thoughts each week, I will continue to include quick links to places where you can give your time and money.
Together we will lift each other out of the ashes of despair and rebuild a brighter tomorrow. Please help me help you by sending me to Washington. Our future depends on it.
---

clean_body: | | | | == | | As we enter the first week of 2022, I have hope My campaign and I are focused on bringing out the very best in every Coloradan. Yes, we are in a dire situation, and we must act now to course correct our country from spiraling into economic and social despair. But my hope is in people like you who realize that something must be done, action must be taken to stem this tide. I'm looking forward to a vigorous campaign season leading up to not only the primary but the general election. We must have a salient conversation about what our nation should be and who we want representing us. Vitriol does not solve problems. Neither do bullies. Rather, we need to roll up our sleeves and show our friends and neighbors that we have solutions. Republicans must recognize that we alone cannot win the country back, especially in Colorado where only 28% of the state is Republican. We must find a way to unite as Americans and Coloradans along principles grounded in truth and common to all human beings. That doesn't mean we compromise on truth, but rather find common ground with fellow human beings that believe in freedom, truth, justice and rule of law. It is imperative that we send representatives to Congress that will stop the spending spree--Mother Government cannot replace the dignity of earning one's own living. Democrats claim rising crime is a state issue. While generally that is true, we need those who will stand up in Washington and stop the flood of illegal immigrants pouring into this country, many of which are criminal. There are federal solutions that can stop this wave of crime. I will pursue this change. Finally, education is fundamental to the future of our country, as our future is embodied in our children. These three issues are critical to restoring our country, our state, our communities to the American Dream. And again, my hope is renewed as I see Coloradans rushing to help their neighbors in Boulder County following the devastating fire there. As I send you my thoughts each week, I will continue to include quick links to places where you can give your time and money. Together we will lift each other out of the ashes of despair and rebuild a brighter tomorrow. Please help me help you by sending me to Washington. Our future depends on it. | | | | | == | | | | | | COLORADO WILDFIRE - HOW YOU CAN HELP | Here are a number of places where you can contribute goods, funding, or even volunteer your time: | == | YMCA is accepting donations (blankets, pillows, dog and cat food) at their location: 2800 Dagny Way, Lafayette, CO 80026. You can follow their updates for what supplies are needed: | | == | | | Boulder Office of Emergency Management | * You can donate money, discounted services, or sign up to volunteer through the == form here: . | == | | | Airbnb Open Homes Program | Sign up to offer shelter. The Airbnb Open Homes Program will notify you if your offer is needed. | | == | | | Volunteer to help with clean-up and rebuilding | If you want to volunteer for ongoing clean-up and rebuilding efforts, check Samaritan's Purse below: | == | | Current Shelter Resources | KDVR has provided a list of current shelters that are available. | == | | | Animal Assistance | | == | == | | | | | PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 (303) 903 1985 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:info@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

Peter, this is our time to make a difference!

The beginning of the new year marks the beginning of our all-out Special Election push — _and I know I can count on your support._

So as Republican Devin Nunes quits Congress to work for Trump, we’re getting to work for hard-working people like you, Peter.

_But with our Special Election just months away_ , we need our grassroots army to help us fight back against the dozens of MAGA Republicans we’re up against.

**That’s why I’m asking for $1 today, Peter.** I know it doesn’t sound like a lot, but your $1 has the power to enrich our voter outreach programs, fund our ads, and get every single Central Valley voter on our team!

[**We’ve come so far since barely missing out on beating Devin Nunes in 2020. name: August Russell
subject: The man who raised me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEN RUSSELL FOR FLORIDA Ken Russell for Senate
body:
For most of my life, I grew up with my Dad being a single father. It was me and him versus the world, and we could do anything we put our minds to. This remains true about my dad, when he sets his mind to something he remains committed and passionate until the end. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40364592/324019207/-1367352072?refcode=220104-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDA1OWEzZi1iMDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q9j596DTMyh4u4lbZ0vv8eo2yCQRuyD3mbo0Auqd15E=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40364593/324019208/1389757993?refcode=220104-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDA1OWEzZi1iMDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q9j596DTMyh4u4lbZ0vv8eo2yCQRuyD3mbo0Auqd15E=) Peter, For most of my life, I grew up with my Dad being a single father. It was me and him versus the world, and we could do anything we put our minds to. This remains true about my dad, when he sets his mind to something he remains committed and passionate until the end. **I vividly remember my dad taking a stance for the local community when we found out about the contamination in the park in front of our house.** While I didn't know it at the time, this was his first step in a long journey to helping his community and improving the lives of those around us. My dad has been involved in local activism and community organizing for 8 years now, and he has set his sights on the US Senate. **[He needs your support to get there. Can you chip in $20 right now to elect a better, kinder, and more compassionate leader to the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40364594/324019209/1389757993?refcode=220104-email&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDA1OWEzZi1iMDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q9j596DTMyh4u4lbZ0vv8eo2yCQRuyD3mbo0Auqd15E=)** I am nineteen years old, and my father is running for office to try and prepare this state, this country, and this world for the impacts of climate change. I know he is doing it for me and my sisters. I know he is doing it for all young people everywhere. And, I know he will do a really good job. **[We need to elect my father because when it comes to protecting our planet, we don’t have any time to waste. Will you help my dad win by chipping in to his campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40364595/324019210/1389757993?refcode=220104-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDA1OWEzZi1iMDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q9j596DTMyh4u4lbZ0vv8eo2yCQRuyD3mbo0Auqd15E=)** Thank you, August Russell Ken Russell is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Florida. He's a small business owner turned community activist who will clean up Washington and restore our country’s character. Support Ken with a donation today. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40364596/324019211/-1367352072?refcode=220104-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDA1OWEzZi1iMDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q9j596DTMyh4u4lbZ0vv8eo2yCQRuyD3mbo0Auqd15E=)**[**CONTRIBUTE >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40364597/324019212/-1367352072?refcode=220104-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDA1OWEzZi1iMDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q9j596DTMyh4u4lbZ0vv8eo2yCQRuyD3mbo0Auqd15E=)** **[**CONTRIBUTE $25 MONTHLY**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40364598/324019213/-1367352072?refcode=220104-email&amount=25&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDA1OWEzZi1iMDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q9j596DTMyh4u4lbZ0vv8eo2yCQRuyD3mbo0Auqd15E=)** PAID FOR BY KEN RUSSELL FOR FLORIDA Ken Russell for Senate

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40364599/324019269/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmQ3NTlhZC1iMDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xb0lzI0CAH4GbdQR53YqSniEMsV9BMy-NbcemCQSiTY=)
Happy New Year — Today, I hope you’ll help us support the Boulder County community. Sadly, right before New Year's Eve, fires spread across Boulder County displacing families and destroying entire neighborhoods. I’m thankful to the first responders who evacuated communities and fought these fires. These natural disasters are unfortunately too familiar here in Colorado. Right now, these folks need our help. I am doing all that I can to help our communities recover — and there are many ways you can too. **There are local organizations helping displaced families deal with the immediate aftermath of these fires. name: Josh Harder
subject: my resolutions for 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uDdujYyF-A-iKxTHWK9AJIgdtGvL2bq6oQdSGs6Nr1w=/A9igZn510bpWhPVlWsundB82DBwmcvK7lWuWq7zl_40=?refcode=E13307-20220104-NYResolutions-header-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Peter, how was your News Years? I spent the past weekend thinking about all the things we've accomplished together and all the things we have in store for us in 2022. [**I know that our biggest challenges are yet to come, which is why I 'm hoping you'll chip in $22 now to kickstart our 2022 campaign efforts!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/uDdujYyF-A-iKxTHWK9AJIgdtGvL2bq6oQdSGs6Nr1w=/A9igZn510bpWhPVlWsundB82DBwmcvK7lWuWq7zl_40=?refcode=E13307-20220104-NYResolutions-SL-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) I've heard that the best way to make sure you stick to your resolutions is to put them in writing, so here are mine, for our whole team to see!
* I want to be the most supportive husband I can be to Pam whether that's an extra chore or a listening ear
* I want to be a loving and patient father - work hours are long, but I refuse to let that get in the way of being a present father to our soon-to-be little one
* And, I want to prevent Kevin McCarthy from becoming the next Speaker of the House by winning our toss-up race here in California's 13th Congressional district.

The first two resolutions are on me, but I'm going to need your help to accomplish the third - because our race is going to decide who controls the House majority this November. [**So, will you please send in a donation now to help us start 2022 in the strongest position possible?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/uDdujYyF-A-iKxTHWK9AJIgdtGvL2bq6oQdSGs6Nr1w=/A9igZn510bpWhPVlWsundB82DBwmcvK7lWuWq7zl_40=?refcode=E13307-20220104-NYResolutions-SL-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10](https://act.myngp.com/el/uDdujYyF-A-iKxTHWK9AJIgdtGvL2bq6oQdSGs6Nr1w=/A9igZn510bpWhPVlWsundB82DBwmcvK7lWuWq7zl_40=?express_lane=true&refcode=E13307-20220104-NYResolutions-EL-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)**

body:

ing-national-security?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022
jan4hf Friend — Joe Biden and Raphael Warnock have embarrassed
America on the world stage.

In 2021, Biden left Americans behind in
Afghanistan. He gave Russia a pipeline and refused to address its human
rights violations. He emboldened Iran and weakened our alliance with
Israel.

He refused to hold Communist China accountable for what it
unleashed on the world.

And his top supporter in the Senate, Raphael
Warnock, said not a word.
https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/why-im-runni
ng-national-security?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022j
an4hf Will you help us defeat him here?

When I’m in the U.S. Senate,
that changes. I’ll stand for a fearless approach to national defense,
not Biden’s weak agenda.

We’ll stand up to rogue states like Russia
and Iran.

We’ll renew our friendship with our most trusted Middle
East ally, Israel.

And we will make Communist China pay by breaking
our supply chain dependency.

Now is the time for bold leadership
that puts our country first. Joe Biden doesn’t have it — he’s been
wrong on foreign policy for 50 years. And Raphael Warnock is out of his
depth.
https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/why-im-runni
ng-national-security?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022j

Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:

I couldn’t be prouder to
have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our
efforts. Here’s why.

Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17
million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat
hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who
controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in
order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part
of our efforts.

With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican
leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready —
and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Michael=20Brown?=
subject: Let Me Make This Perfectly Clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Any state employee fired or displaced by Whitmer, Nessel, or Benson over the vaccine mandate will be rehired day one after I’m elected. | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| Dear Peter:

She did it again.

Gretchen Whitmer put the jobs and livelihoods of thousands of Michigan workers — and Michigan state employees — on the line when she doubled down on her support of President Biden’s ridiculous vaccine mandate policy.

A couple of weeks ago she seemed to come to her senses telling a group of business owners, "I know if that mandate happens, _we’re going to lose state employees_...it’s going to be a _problem for all of us_.”

But then just before Christmas _**she flip-flopped and came out strongly in support of mandatory vaccinations**_.

I want to be perfectly clear here.

**Any state employee fired or displaced by Whitmer, Nessel, or Benson over the vaccine mandate will be rehired day one after I’m elected.**

The corrections officers, troopers, first responders and other employees have already proven they can serve the citizens without your vaccine mandate.
---
| [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=78a55873c4&e=0636b97700)
---
(click video to play)
| While _Whitmer was busy putting people out of work_ with her lockdown policies, those of us on the frontlines continued to successfully work throughout the pandemic before vaccines became available.

**Peter, we have an historic opportunity to get rid of Gretchen Whitmer and Fix Michigan. Will you join me?**

[Volunteer](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=5640e086e5&e=0636b97700), [endorse](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=7c22d11317&e=0636b97700), tell others, and [make a donation](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=565b974c97&e=0636b97700).

Your donation of [$25](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=e3eef0b08d&e=0636b97700), [$50](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=64c3057d7f&e=0636b97700), or [$500](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=5da748bf5c&e=0636b97700) will help.

Together we can win this election. Together we can dump Whitmer. _Together we can fix Michigan_.

Will you join me? Michael Brown
Republican for Governor PS - I’m fully vaccinated myself, but I completely support anyone who opts to not get the vaccine because of health, religious, or other reasons.
---
|
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=d241df3ef0&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TODAY")
---
|

_D.C. statehood has already passed the House,_ and Mitch McConnell is TERRIFIED! He knows that granting D.C. statehood will add 2 progressive Senators -- and lock-in our Senate Majority.

Here’s the thing: our democracy is stronger when everyone can fully participate! That’s why we’re gathering 10,000 signatures in support of D.C. statehood.

[We need to make sure our voices are heard alongside the more than 700,000 D.C. residents DEMANDING representation. Team, add your name before MIDNIGHT to call on Congress to make Washington, D.C. a state! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/DC_Statehood_Pet_January/?refcode=VPP_20220104_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=1081%2E878179%2EQTQc35)
[ADD MY NAME »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/DC_Statehood_Pet_January/?refcode=VPP_20220104_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=1081%2E878179%2EQTQc35)
---
**** PETITION CLOSING AT 11:59PM! ACT NOW! ****
Thank you,

VPP

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1081%2E878179%2EQTQc35). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1081%2E878179%2EQTQc35).**

body:
I will fight to stop all career politicians and put AMERICA FIRST

| [](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=4e353d529d2243dc9a552f020424b5e9&_e=WJYMJ-Et62iuxStLDSQuB8-mN1T-sLLtDny6RifCrJPh-gQ9EU2XspGgMtygEnrWPDsaGipFm_rqbLCUW7Gwrp5PMIoOuspWnRHNeyhSyRUY16_AIlFdLP5Tz5kCqOmlf_B9G2Elynr_owrRHRjLHAA8WR20v6iiHmweR-l4p4QaVjbgoUlA3bZYIVx5A4b0XB-ke9Nqsa96AdB_B3irfCweUG_qVc1ZH15RbMo5wHfxP9dNKPce-h6BCuTrZV7RFAUq4Jla2QZg-6HfGVE1kzmNgOxoj4nr0PkiHFzYgLraKj4Im86em-ZkZKbdksij5YKBRm-fyNU1i-jqq7qrj3Kj6kOda7z76rEftEPqjnRdL7O4Tm2l1bCRTbWrxeI1lixIi2o6h22OzBfQNhSbVBwi1Wo_Sw6VSJYsqXKHIRZ5Q4VnxC6ebQDyb7EXvSuhg-tlyJ9iNf7-dssWx3gKAeJMaXSPraBvInqn9bzdbN_XAu4r9exJw_ayy49FVUIcXwmC1-n3uTtHK_2ziN7f6g%3D%3D)

Friends,

Our campaign just got off to an even greater start in 2022 than I could’ve imagined.

Conservative champion Jessica Taylor just gave me her endorsement for the U.S. Senate race in Alabama, and I couldn’t be more honored to accept it. As political outsiders, we both know how important it is that we stop career politicians from ruining Alabama and ruining our country.
[](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=4e353d529d2243dc9a552f020424b5e9&_e=WJYMJ-Et62iuxStLDSQuB8-mN1T-sLLtDny6RifCrJPh-gQ9EU2XspGgMtygEnrWPDsaGipFm_rqbLCUW7Gwrp5PMIoOuspWnRHNeyhSyRUY16_AIlFdLP5Tz5kCqOmlf_B9G2Elynr_owrRHRjLHAA8WR20v6iiHmweR-l4p4QaVjbgoUlA3bZYIVx5A4b0XB-ke9Nqsa96AdB_B3irfCweUG_qVc1ZH15RbMo5wHfxP9dNKPce-h6BCuTrZV7RFAUq4Jla2QZg-6HfGVE1kzmNgOxoj4nr0PkiHFzYgLraKj4Im86em-ZkZKbdksijMUmQcZJMvQ9hbnPyF8S-EwAR1ATKUAxW16wX8em_n91w7DlfAYPrjFrdP30bY9jE16Gf8VYPHznUciMzXr3IbKMVkZmwcdCQ-kH_Fv74DYkaF1EiUt8TBGNWYQraWjip3wL5Iw_EOiEY-1hN4dXOAgY2LlKNrM-jWt2H030iSkw5sV2faAre3HKmQW0jtS9CLN65UQBfPEdMuGkfksdVLg%3D%3D) “I ran for office because we need more political outsiders who will stand up to the radical left and career politicians. Mike Durant is the political outsider that Alabama needs in Washington, and I am proud to endorse his campaign for United States Senate. Mike has spent his life serving our country and building a successful business. Like President Trump, Mike will use his business experience and outsider perspective to deliver for Alabama and drain the swamp. I look forward to supporting Mike’s campaign and sending him to Washington for one more mission.” – Jessica Taylor

**I’m ready to serve the people of Alabama.

I’m ready to serve my country one more time.

I’m ready to put America First again.**
_**Will you join me?**_

If you believe that the way we’re going to take back our country from the Liberal Left is by stopping career politicians, Biden’s draconian vaccine mandates, and by standing up to China, then please rush your support below to join our campaign.
| [**RUSH $25**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=4e353d529d2243dc9a552f020424b5e9&_e=WJYMJ-Et62iuxStLDSQuB8-mN1T-sLLtDny6RifCrJPh-gQ9EU2XspGgMtygEnrWPDsaGipFm_rqbLCUW7Gwrp5PMIoOuspWnRHNeyhSyRUY16_AIlFdLP5Tz5kCqOmlf_B9G2Elynr_owrRHRjLHAA8WR20v6iiHmweR-l4p4QaVjbgoUlA3bZYIVx5A4b0XB-ke9Nqsa96AdB_B3irfCweUG_qVc1ZH15RbMo5wHfxP9dNKPce-h6BCuTrZV7RFAUq4Jla2QZg-6HfGVE1kzmNgOxoj4nr0PkiHFzYgLp1orDKu6DPQMiNqOAwtMAGxR1k6X1_WsxjjmWh3xafHDih6OFPdaqQaW4GolZVa5BePnCobBqPUlzPcEMVcOkqDQT9lRZbZoF3oWlg_4y0Xehfsbu7D40Oczmydv-LT-TXTQlhuprH7aBed3EuaxPAkESMlDkmc030uO75aUSGl55R4zmJqg46kqZ5sCmOEZMWhrbGAgNsbbW8n4-l-H91PM5pZuKvsRdaMLskueuRYVJTkAAyJLPMsz5WlvAmfME%3D)

clean_body: I will fight to stop all career politicians and put AMERICA FIRST | Friends, Our campaign just got off to an even greater start in 2022 than I could’ve imagined. Conservative champion Jessica Taylor just gave me her endorsement for the U.S. Senate race in Alabama, and I couldn’t be more honored to accept it. As political outsiders, we both know how important it is that we stop career politicians from ruining Alabama and ruining our country. “I ran for office because we need more political outsiders who will stand up to the radical left and career politicians. Mike Durant is the political outsider that Alabama needs in Washington, and I am proud to endorse his campaign for United States Senate. Mike has spent his life serving our country and building a successful business. Like President Trump, Mike will use his business experience and outsider perspective to deliver for Alabama and drain the swamp. I look forward to supporting Mike’s campaign and sending him to Washington for one more mission.” – Jessica Taylor I’m ready to serve the people of Alabama. I’m ready to serve my country one more time. I’m ready to put America First again. Will you join me? If you believe that the way we’re going to take back our country from the Liberal Left is by stopping career politicians, Biden’s draconian vaccine mandates, and by standing up to China, then please rush your support below to join our campaign. | I’d like to thank Jessica Taylor for all that she has done for conservatives in Alabama and for her support of our growing campaign. For too long, career politicians who have never held a real job in their life have made poor decisions that have left Alabama families behind and put America last. I’m running to change that. God Bless, Mike Durant, candidate for U.S. Senate in Alabama PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE Not authorized by any other candidate. It’s heartbreaking to think of the exhaustion my fellow health care workers continue to endure because of COVID denial, rampant misinformation, and low vaccination rates that have resulted from it. Though I know from personal experience that it can be challenging, one-on-one conversations with friends and loved ones who are hesitant about getting vaccinated will mean the difference between sickness and health. They will be a critical piece of helping us end this pandemic this year.

**So, team, I wanted to ask:[How many of your loved ones have you spoken to about getting vaccinated?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40365303/324022504/123138415?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWQxMzU5My1iNDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1iDZXZMxX3uUxV3nlWBHRXt11Z1xJIcjmNOzcXrqrG8=&emci=1ef4e11a-9e6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=81d13593-b46d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25515813)** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40365304/324022505/123138415?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWQxMzU5My1iNDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1iDZXZMxX3uUxV3nlWBHRXt11Z1xJIcjmNOzcXrqrG8=&emci=1ef4e11a-9e6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=81d13593-b46d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25515813)** Instead of being a part of the solution, Ron Johnson’s willingness to spread misinformation and create fear around vaccines has been a major driver behind vaccine hesitancy. As a physician, here’s what I know for certain: In order to prevent the development of COVID variants, we must reduce the number of infections in our populations. In order to reduce infections and prevent sickness and death, we need as many people to get vaccinated and boosted as possible. **I’m committed to counteracting misinformation through empathetic conversations with friends and loved ones – but I’m only one person: It’s going to take all of us doing our part to get people vaccinated. ** **[How many conversations can you commit to having with friends and loved ones about getting vaccinated?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40365305/324022506/123138415?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWQxMzU5My1iNDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1iDZXZMxX3uUxV3nlWBHRXt11Z1xJIcjmNOzcXrqrG8=&emci=1ef4e11a-9e6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=81d13593-b46d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25515813)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40365306/324022507/123138415?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWQxMzU5My1iNDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1iDZXZMxX3uUxV3nlWBHRXt11Z1xJIcjmNOzcXrqrG8=&emci=1ef4e11a-9e6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=81d13593-b46d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25515813) Thank you so much for helping be a part of the solution, Dr. Gillian Battino

It's going to take all of us working together to defeat Ron Johnson to get her there, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. body:
If you could add your name to our list of endorsers today, it would really mean the world to me.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40365478/324023073/619242359?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.12.21_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2022.01.04_b1_endorse_x_f1_s1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2022.01.04_b1_endorse_X_F1_S1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWM2Njg0MC1iNjZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fNnxLxeYTC83LSqMdqAQEtvNY-84YcUf_z0CNEUijps=)

Peter,

I’ve spent my career tackling the forces of inequality in our society -- by fighting to reform our justice system, ending the death penalty once and for all, making housing more affordable, and protecting our environment.

Now, I’m running for Congress because Florida deserves a real reformer who will fight for them and their interests.

I know that together we can chart a better future for our communities -- but we all must work together and fight for it.

**[So Peter, I would be honored if you would personally endorse our campaign for Congress. body:
With your support, we can continue to spread the truth.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40365635/324024278/1884979347?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220104-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjQ1NTQ1Ni1iOTZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aewvOB8qTbRFzHU100f2L10_6vEc83RP-sXNFfwphRE=)

| Friend,

This week marks one year since the January 6th attack on our democracy — one that happened on Sara’s fourth day as a member of Congress.

In commemoration of this anniversary and as part of her commitment to ensuring the American people know the truth about what happened that day, Sara spoke with Ali Vitali at NBC.
---
| | _**“There was this buzzing that I will never forget....I can’t watch the clips of that day with the sound on.”**_ _****_
