name: John Cranley
subject: This has been the best job of my life. But even bigger things are ahead.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
I’m excited about what the months ahead will bring. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40365815/324025446/-1406512299?amount=5&refcode=ea.f07dde73-ba6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.f07dde73-ba6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDdkZGU3My1iYTZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KCbslTAJCvm1YoWnnYFV4MAklNn6GhjvugupOolbn_M=) Friend, Today, Cincinnati has a new mayor, and I leave the best job I’ve had yet. After 8 years serving my hometown as mayor, and nearly 10 before that serving on the city council, it is more than a little strange to be moving on. **But I take great pride in looking back at all we’ve accomplished for Cincinnati since I took office.** We’ve done big things — expanded renewable energy so that our municipal government is on its way to becoming carbon neutral, passed a $15 minimum wage for all full-time city workers, and grown small businesses. We’ve revitalized a failing city, bringing back jobs and reducing poverty. We’ve fixed failing infrastructure and invested in pre-school and public transit. We reformed police-community relations. We’ve embraced the values of diversity and inclusion. **And Cincinnati is thriving again.** This city is where I grew up, and it’s our family’s home — it’s where Dena and I are raising our son, Joseph, with the same principles that guide me: love of community and country, generosity and kindness, and that serving others is the highest calling. Cincinnati will always be home, and change is always hard. But I’m so excited for what the months ahead hold, friend, because I know that a bigger challenge is awaiting me. **Ohio needs a comeback too, and our people deserve a governor who has already led one.** Together, we will turn this state around. Thanks for standing with me, John **_[P.S. Want to support our campaign for governor? Chip in today — $5, $25, or $50, it’ll all go a long way. Click here to give>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40365818/324025503/-1406512299?amount=5&refcode=ea.f07dde73-ba6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.f07dde73-ba6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDdkZGU3My1iYTZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KCbslTAJCvm1YoWnnYFV4MAklNn6GhjvugupOolbn_M=)_**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40365821/324025506/-1406512299?amount=5&refcode=ea.f07dde73-ba6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.f07dde73-ba6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDdkZGU3My1iYTZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KCbslTAJCvm1YoWnnYFV4MAklNn6GhjvugupOolbn_M=)**
---

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

[**Please make a donation today and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40365824/324025509/-1406512299?refcode=ea.f07dde73-ba6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.f07dde73-ba6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDdkZGU3My1iYTZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KCbslTAJCvm1YoWnnYFV4MAklNn6GhjvugupOolbn_M=)

body:
He’s the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S. history. | Fellow American,

I've been 100% clear on my opinion of Dr. Anthony Fauci. He's been dishonest, political, and partisan, distorting science to exercise authoritarian control and cover up his own conduct.

_**He is the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S history.**_

I've demanded the Department of Justice INVESTIGATE and PROSECUTE Fauci for lying to Congress when he claimed that the federal government and his NIH did not fund "gain-of-function" research in Wuhan, China.

And now, we have 221 pages of records obtained by Judicial Watch through a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit that provide DAMNING new evidence, including a grant application for research involving the coronavirus that was submitted back in 2018!

_When Fauci lied to Congress, he lied to the American people._

18 USC 1001 makes this a felony, punishable by up to 5 years in prison.

_We need to know the FULL EXTENT of what Fauci is attempting to hide!_

Friend, the U.S. Postal Service is a staple of American life and an essential public service we all rely on. Its necessity goes beyond delivering packages – the USPS delivers lifesaving prescriptions, groceries, even paychecks. But this service took a massive hit during the Trump administration.
**FIRST:** Trump BLOCKED USPS funding in the middle of the pandemic and handpicked the Board of Governors who selected Trump megadonor Louis DeJoy to be postmaster general.
**THEN:** DeJoy started cutting USPS hours and facilities – delaying the delivery of Medicare prescriptions, Social Security benefits and mail-in ballots.
**NOW:****DeJoy is at it again, this time enacting plans that reduce post office hours, increase prices and MASSIVELY slow down deliveries.**
We need action NOW to remove DeJoy and save the Postal Service. **But we can't stop him without grassroots support, so we need to hear from 34 more people in 18326 by midnight tonight. Please friend, tell us now:**

name: Cora Neumann
subject: We couldn’t have done it without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
Thanks to your support, we reached our ambitious fundraising goal. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40366299/324038243/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDQzYTc1Ni1iZjZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ArBT68ahgI2ewmz_AXM5tl1KKGeFNH8Q1nitxUIsFjU=) Friend, we did it!

Thanks to a strong surge from supporters like you, we successfully reached our end-of-year fundraising goal. **This is exactly the kind of momentum we need to take on Ryan Zinke, and we couldn’t have done it without your help.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40366300/324038244/655314317?refcode=em-1.4.22-all-a&amount=22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDQzYTc1Ni1iZjZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ArBT68ahgI2ewmz_AXM5tl1KKGeFNH8Q1nitxUIsFjU=)
In just a few days, our FEC numbers will come out and be compared side-by-side to Ryan Zinke’s. We expect to see a ton of corporate PAC backers on his report.**They’re no match for a strong, dedicated grassroots movement like ours.**

I believe that a campaign _for_ the people needs to be supported _by_ the people. Washington special interests have no place in Montana. That’s why I count on individual donors like you, and with your support, I'm ready to fight for our shared values in Congress.

**[Will you help us start 2022 on the right foot with a $22 donation? We need to keep up this momentum to help defeat Ryan Zinke and turn Montana’s new 1st district blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40366301/324038245/655314317?refcode=em-1.4.22-all-a&amount=22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDQzYTc1Ni1iZjZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ArBT68ahgI2ewmz_AXM5tl1KKGeFNH8Q1nitxUIsFjU=)**
| **[Donate $22](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40366302/324038246/655314317?refcode=em-1.4.22-all-a&amount=22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDQzYTc1Ni1iZjZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ArBT68ahgI2ewmz_AXM5tl1KKGeFNH8Q1nitxUIsFjU=)**

Now that we’re officially in an election year, there’s going to be more eyes on this race than ever before. Running in a brand new district against a former Trump official won’t be easy, but the future of Montana is worth the fight.

Thank you for helping us reach this critical deadline, and for your continued support in the months ahead.

Cora

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Update (re: the filibuster)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Senate Democrats just announced a vote to change the filibuster before Martin Luther King Jr. Day in order to pass a critical voting rights bill. That’s big news.
We need Senate Democrats to finally bypass the filibuster so we can protect voting rights, free and fair elections, and our democracy. But it’s clear that we also need an end to the filibuster so we can pass popular legislation on protecting abortion rights, LGBTQ+ equality, policing reform, raising the minimum wage, gun safety, climate action, health care, and so much more.
After voters delivered us the House, Senate, and White House, Democrats have a rare opportunity to deliver for the people in a big way. We can’t afford to squander it. I’ve long been advocating for an end to the filibuster — and there’s too much on the line for our agenda to simply be stalled in the Senate.
[**Peter, can you support my fight to end the filibuster with a $3 contribution today? I won’t stop working to protect our democracy, codify _Roe v. Wade_ , and pass other desperately-needed progressive reforms.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9336?refcode=em20220104-930&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=930%2E420207%2EXvaaeX)
**[Contribute »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9336?refcode=em20220104-930&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=930%2E420207%2EXvaaeX)**
**It’s simple: we either protect the filibuster or our democracy, Peter.** We must respond to the more than 400 Republican attacks on voting rights and our elections by getting rid of the filibuster. That’s how we take power away from Mitch McConnell, protect voting rights, and preserve our democracy. But ending the filibuster is also how we respond to Republican attacks on LGBTQ+ folks, abortion rights, and the environment. This is why getting rid of the filibuster is so important and so urgent.
**It’s time to nix the filibuster and deliver for the people.**
[**Let’s not allow Republicans to stop voting rights, abortion rights, the fight for equality, and critical action to combat climate change. Chip in today to fuel my fight to end the filibuster and protect our democracy.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9336?refcode=em20220104-930&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=930%2E420207%2EXvaaeX)
We can only make this change together, and we need to be all-in on this fight.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220104-930-footer&t=22&refcode2=930_420207_XvaaeX&akid=930%2E420207%2EXvaaeX)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=930%2E420207%2EXvaaeX)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=930%2E420207%2EXvaaeX)

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: Rand Paul’s announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

It’s official,
Peter.

This morning, Rand Paul officially announced he’s launching his
re-election campaign to represent Kentucky in the U.S. Senate for another
six years.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14410?refcode=em20220104-1411&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1411%2E346206%2E7PAeWT ][IMG]

That’s six more years of spreading conspiracy theories and lies that
undermine our democracy. Six more years of holding up legislation like the
9/11 Victims Compensation Fund and the Emmett Till Anti-Lynching Act. Six
more years of using his elected office to trade stocks using insider
knowledge.

Peter, our
country cannot afford six more years of Rand Paul.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14410?refcode=em20220104-1411&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1411%2E346206%2E7PAeWT ]Will you chip in $20.22 or anything you can right now to show Rand
Paul that this grassroots movement is rising up to replace him in 2022? We
have a real chance to flip Kentucky — but we’re relying on supporters like
you to power our voter outreach and organizing efforts.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14410?refcode=em20220104-1411&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1411%2E346206%2E7PAeWT ]Contribute $20.22

Rand has been representing Kentucky in the U.S. Senate for nearly a
decade. For more than 10 years, he’s had an incredible opportunity to
uplift Kentuckians and bring real change to our commonwealth.

But the only person who's benefited from Rand being in the Senate is Rand.
He’s consistently ignored Kentuckians and our needs. And the sad truth is
that Kentucky has one of the worst records of voter disenfranchisement in
our country’s history which has allowed failed leaders like Rand to stay
in office.

He’s voted against policies that would protect our right to vote, protect
people with preexisting conditions, provide jobs for our communities, and
save lives. Especially now — in the midst of the COVID-19 pandemic — Rand
refuses to lift a finger for the record number of working families who are
struggling to make ends meet and instead whines on Twitter about how
“masks don’t work”.

It's time to elect someone who's the complete opposite of Rand Paul.

Someone who knows what it's like to not have enough money to feed his
family.
Someone who looks at his community and asks, "How can I help?"
Someone who isn't afraid to fight for the right thing even when it isn't
politically convenient.

That’s why we’re reaching out to ask you a favor,
Peter: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14410?refcode=em20220104-1411&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1411%2E346206%2E7PAeWT ]Can you please chip
in $20.22 or anything you can to our campaign right now? It’s important we
show the strength of our grassroots movement now that Rand announced he’s
running for re-election.

Together,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220104-1411-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1411_346206_7PAeWT&akid=1411%2E346206%2E7PAeWT

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1411%2E346206%2E7PAeWT

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Team Engel
subject: ***BREAKING NEWS*** A new Republican frontrunner?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40366312/324041121/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDg3ZjliZC1jMDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d_IN5soNbkLKp9pX7ZK7jP5s5e4ZcT1dMVlGTV1Q3hg=&emci=f5579efe-b16d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=ed87f9bd-c06d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
State Sen. Kelly Townsend just filed to run for Congress in AZ-06. **Townsend has a proven track record of perpetuating easily debunked conspiracy theories, particularly with regard to public health.** Townsend is also one of the leading proponents of “The Big Lie”, and has pledged to use her position as Chair of the Senate Government Committee to erode voting rights. She is as dangerous as she is popular – at least among GOP Primary voters.
While her entrance into the GOP Primary could be helpful in slowing down Gov. Ducey’s right-hand-man, Juan Ciscomani, the Republican frontrunner up until now, Townsend will attract millions in spending from fringe groups across the country.
**Which is why we need your help.[Will you rush a donation of $5, $25, or $100 to Kirsten’s campaign to show these groups that AZ-06 doesn’t buy into the unhinged conspiracy theories of the alt-right?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40366313/324041122/558373307?refcode=X_10322_TownsendOppo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDg3ZjliZC1jMDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d_IN5soNbkLKp9pX7ZK7jP5s5e4ZcT1dMVlGTV1Q3hg=)**
More about Kelly Townsend:
1) Her dangerous views on vaccinations aren’t limited to COVID. **She called the measles vaccine a communist plot1** and compared mandatory vaccines to the tattoos Nazis used in conentration camps2
2) She supports “The Big Lie” that Trump won re-election, going so far as **attempting to overturn the results of the 2020 Presidential election** , and has introduced a bill that would allow the legislature to overturn election results3
3) **She blames the January 6 attack on the Capitol on everyone but the insurrectionists.** In a series of since-deleted social media rants, Townsend claimed insurrectionists were inspired by “the Left” and speculated whether or not the real culprits were apprehended4. Townsend also blamed the attack on Gov. Ducey, stating “(W)hen the people have had enough, you (Ducey) cannot act pious and holier than thou when the people revolt... (D)on’t act like this isn’t in large part, your fault,”4
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40366314/324041123/41694283?refcode=X_10322_TownsendOppo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDg3ZjliZC1jMDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d_IN5soNbkLKp9pX7ZK7jP5s5e4ZcT1dMVlGTV1Q3hg=)
---
So, when we say Kelly Townsend is dangerous, we don’t mean she’s dangerous just because we disagree on issues like climate change, abortion rights, and lowering the cost of prescription drug prices. We mean that she wants to allow politicians to overturn elections. We mean that **she supports the insurrectionists who violently overtook our nation’s Capitol.** We mean she wants to sacrifice public safety by outlawing vaccine requirements not just for COVID, but for diseases like the measles.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40366315/324041124/41694283?refcode=X_10322_TownsendOppo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDg3ZjliZC1jMDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d_IN5soNbkLKp9pX7ZK7jP5s5e4ZcT1dMVlGTV1Q3hg=)
---
And here’s the scary part: these dangerous ideas, and the unhinged rhetoric she uses, has made her enormously popular with fringe elements of the GOP base and could make her the frontrunner to win her primary. Combined with what most pundits expect will be a down year for Democratic turnout, **we’re now looking at the very real possibility that this alt-right zealot could take over the seat once held by Gabby Goffords, Ron Barber, and Ann Kirkpatrick.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40366316/324041125/41694283?refcode=X_10322_TownsendOppo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDg3ZjliZC1jMDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d_IN5soNbkLKp9pX7ZK7jP5s5e4ZcT1dMVlGTV1Q3hg=)
---
The best chance for winning this election in November, and protecting this seat from the far-right fringe, is Kirsten Engel. Kirsten is an University of Arizona Professor, a water policy expert, a working mom, and a state legislator who has never lost an election. **Make no mistake about it, Kirsten is our best chance at keeping this seat blue.** Now is the time to step up and join the team.
[**It’s all-hands-on-deck time. Are you in?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40366317/324041126/41694283?refcode=X_10322_TownsendOppo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDg3ZjliZC1jMDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d_IN5soNbkLKp9pX7ZK7jP5s5e4ZcT1dMVlGTV1Q3hg=)

clean_body: You’re going to love him. | Peter, It’s me: Chairman Michael Whatley. I’m so glad I reached you. I’m sure you’ve heard that one lucky Republican Patriot is going to win an all-expenses paid trip to meet President Trump. I’ve met President Trump so many times, and every time has been absolutely amazing. Whether I’m on the tarmac at the airport, on stage at a rally, or nominating him for re-election -- meeting President Trump never gets old. | | | | | | Trust me, Peter... this is not an opportunity you want to miss. There’s nothing like meeting President Trump face-to-face, and I want you to have the opportunity to experience it for yourself. But time is running out, and this opportunity won’t come again. Congratulations! Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Matt Brown and Cynthia Mendes
subject: This is the year we’re going to make it happen.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Happy New Year!

We hope you had a restful holiday spent with loved ones, and we wanted to
take a quick moment to say thank you.

At a time when we face compounding crises of an out-of-control pandemic, a
rapidly changing climate, unaffordable housing, and a political system
that’s left too many Rhode Islanders behind, people across the state have
stepped up to show that Rhode Island is ready for a new government. This
year is the year we’re going to make it happen!

Thanks to your support, we are starting 2022 in a strong position to stand
against the corrupt establishment and win a progressive Rhode Island that
won’t leave anyone behind. We’re ready to get to work.

In gratitude and solidarity,

Matt and Cynthia

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]Hi, did you see the email Marcus sent yesterday?
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently banned from Twitter for spreading disinformation about COVID-19 and putting her followers at severe risk.
We welcome her removal from Twitter -- but the next step is to remove her from office. Can you donate $20 or more now to help us do just that? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marcus Flowers is a Veteran, a patriot, and a Democrat -- and he’ll restore honor and integrity to Congress.
Thanks for your support.
---- Begin forwarded message ----
From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene was permanently suspended from Twitter
Sent on Sunday, January 2, 2022 at 1:05 p.m.
It’s official: Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter.
She deserved to be removed from the platform because of her dangerous incitements to violence and reckless spreading of harmful disinformation.
But here’s the thing: Our goal was never to get Marjorie Taylor Greene removed from Twitter. Our goal is to remove her from Congress.
I’m a Veteran, a Democrat, and I believe that the people of Georgia’s 14th District deserve so much better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. That’s why I’m running to unseat her in 2022.
So I have to ask: Will you join me in the fight to remove her from Congress by donating $20 or more to my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]

Thanks for fighting with me,
Marcus Flowers

I hope you were able to enjoy your holidays and that your 2022 is off to a great start!

My team just finalized numbers from last quarter, and I couldn’t believe it – **we surpassed our fundraising goal!** Knowing how tough the holidays can be, it is truly humbling and inspiring that so many of you were willing to contribute to my campaign. So, **thank you!** I am grateful for all that you have done to help defeat Mike Garcia and hold him accountable. That’s why we’re working hard to build a war chest big enough to take on any challenges Republicans and special interest groups spring on us in 2022.

As we kick off election year, I am feeling confident in this team and what we can accomplish together. Your contributions will continue to help us hire more boots on the ground, spread our message to voters in our district, and get closer to unseating Mike Garcia.

Although our district number changed, the goal remains the same. I look forward to continuing to grow our people-powered movement and serving our communities with the grit and compassion the new CA-27 deserves.

Thank you for all you do,

Quaye Quartey | ************[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40366585/324049548/-1671415344?refcode=em_msg_2022.01.04_b1_qqvqfc_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTJjZTRlZS1jNDZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efdkrx6Ietj5zAGVylJjEJ3-lxCpi825qhkDjHNw740=)************

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: You have been selected to join our official first 2022 Strategy Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek, it’s officially Election Year, believe it or not, and the very first thing we’re going to do as a campaign is **check in directly with supporters like you.**
John Fetterman really wants to hear the opinions of real people on our campaign strategy to win PA in November, which is why we’ve picked YOU to represent Cresco in our first official 2022 Strategy Survey.
[**Will you take a minute to answer a few questions about our campaign strategy as part of John Fetterman’s 2022 Strategy Survey?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20220104-4078&t=1&akid=4078%2E434096%2EeOe39-)
_[While Dr. Oz self-funds millions of dollars in TV ads, John Fetterman is running a true 67 County campaign strategy across the Commonwealth to reach every voter in every county — no matter how red or blue.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20220104-4078&t=2&akid=4078%2E434096%2EeOe39-)_
[Do you agree that organizing in every PA county is the best way to take on the Dr. Oz TV ad blitz?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20220104-4078&t=3&akid=4078%2E434096%2EeOe39-)
Select your answer: Yes No Unsure
**[Finish the survey →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20220104-4078&t=4&akid=4078%2E434096%2EeOe39-)**
Right now, as we set our budgets, staff up, and chart out every day of this campaign until polls close, is the *perfect* time to share your input with us, Derek.
The more qualitative feedback we get from genuine Team Fetterman supporters in our 2022 survey, the more insight we'll have from the ground about how we can best defeat the GOP and flip this seat.
**So, will you please take a few minutes (or less!!) of your time to participate in our official survey?**
**[Click here to enter John Fetterman’s 2022 Strategy Survey right now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20220104-4078&t=5&akid=4078%2E434096%2EeOe39-)**
**[Enter the survey →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20220104-4078&t=6&akid=4078%2E434096%2EeOe39-)**
Thank you for taking the time to share your response. It really means a lot.
Keep an eye out for survey results soon,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220104-4078-footer&t=7&refcode2=4078_434096_eOe39-&akid=4078%2E434096%2EeOe39-)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: Derek, it’s officially Election Year, believe it or not, and the very first thing we’re going to do as a campaign is check in directly with supporters like you. John Fetterman really wants to hear the opinions of real people on our campaign strategy to win PA in November, which is why we’ve picked YOU to represent Cresco in our first official 2022 Strategy Survey. - - - Select your answer: Yes No Unsure - Right now, as we set our budgets, staff up, and chart out every day of this campaign until polls close, is the perfect time to share your input with us, Derek. The more qualitative feedback we get from genuine Team Fetterman supporters in our 2022 survey, the more insight we'll have from the ground about how we can best defeat the GOP and flip this seat. So, will you please take a few minutes (or less!!) of your time to participate in our official survey? - - Thank you for taking the time to share your response. It really means a lot. Keep an eye out for survey results soon, Team Fetterman - | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

subject: New Year’s Resolutions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for by Lawson for Congress")
body:
| | |
---
| | Friend,
New Year, New Congress, it’s that simple.
My New Year’s resolution is to put everything I’ve got into defeating Jennifer Wexton, Nancy Pelosi, and The Squad and take back the 10th for common sense conservative values. **In Congress, I resolve to:** **-cut taxes on working families** **-oppose sanctuary city policies for illegal immigrants** **-stand with our police** **-work with parents, not woke school bureaucrats, to take back our schools** **-restore common sense leadership to our country** We deserve better than we are getting from Pelosi, Wexton, and The Squad. Their Leftist policies have left us with higher taxes, record inflation, and our neighborhoods are less safe than just two years ago. It’s time we took back the House and put an end to their reckless governance.
---
| [Let's Retire Nancy Pelosi, Fire Jennifer Wexton & Defeat The Squad](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=2b666c3d47&e=fc83fb200d "Let's Retire Nancy Pelosi, Fire Jennifer Wexton & Defeat The Squad")
---
| In Congress, I will work tirelessly on behalf of our shared values. My team and I are in high gear taking our common sense conservative message to patriots across Virginia's 10th District. I understand this district and know what it takes to win back the 10th. If you want to win this seat, you're a winner with me! Join me in this fight by writing postcards, calling fellow conservatives, or volunteering in another manner. Please contact my team at [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com) or fill out the form on our website[ here.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=2f55f3d6f1&e=fc83fb200d "https://na01.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.jeaninelawson.com%2Fget-involved&data=04%7C01%7C%7Cb64dc68c83224bcec5f108d9cf8b8702%7C84df9e7fe9f640afb435aaaaaaaaaaaa%7C1%7C0%7C637769020444267859%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C3000&sdata=y2flD79i1%2FPH9RWy2DylM795d7SJUAU2XzCxCQd%2FEDY%3D&reserved=0")
---
| Cheers to 2022, and here is to a big win in November! Jeanine

name: Lisa Scheller (iPhone)
subject: some quick thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
It’s Lisa reaching out quickly about something I’m beginning to see consistently across the district and it’s beginning to seriously impact our famili Peter, It’s Lisa reaching out quickly about something I’m beginning to see consistently across the district and it’s beginning to seriously impact our families and small businesses. Take a look for yourself: [](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=e862b74607724ff0a4d9212ddcb85dd7&_e=xB-N1a8ym-cw3P7GnXFxSkh7jNxUgLTMKKFl7ucKVW_aXBsvdLeopdTtnQbejX-VeFcYOERcZKgTeBDyfBoipVTgzgtAZUvd7K7Co_hx3MbTJtOFp9I5hSN9OQXTFvjPfPkYdmfud44cCwIWwzc6WDYCW5e9scn1jZH7Hz6A-YVcX2IVPWQ4Ye1DzHM2iWtO76fWrpY7zg0qqpnv04eiPmqZhG-o_oLwXTns5RO-Knzm29lgnhMieBzDWfEESMlYEWS_17vgk9S9FnGpgxAElI0LpZjhGkCTtqY4X1P_oZ56vIIelvemwFHw0iqljQeicfCd9BPDuEijd7ZcF8moR7HgYhNrbiojKCOs3724EW2Fj_PpDT2kN2LVj8b8EdMXbmZMDVlFZ8HZgy7j5GHaKkFE7oy1q_90XhJ4efSn-UrXA_t_6xApNxPD8f4Pndcyg8xrlBWOtvBaFZ8IGRSTJiXsWolZFHqywEiMQheqZ3Clu_2u3yZpkd--XK4bEvVHhyF5Z60H_7wVFXI5Adau_A%3D%3D) I’ve been trying to communicate this to you for months now, but this time I mean it more than I have before: Democrat policies supported by Susan Wild and Nancy Pelosi are slowly killing our economy and will quickly drive our small businesses and families out of the district. Peter, I’m sick of the way the Lehigh Valley is being treated due to poor decisions being made in DC. When I’m your Congresswoman, you have my firmest commitment that I will ALWAYS put you and your family first. If it’s not a lack of supplies across the Valley, it's a lack of leadership. Washington D.C., is more worried about trillion dollar spending sprees and not fighting to help small businesses and the local economy which **is** our backbone. **[Do you agree with me that it’s time we finally retire Susan Wild and Nancy Pelosi and elect a new Congress full of conservative and America-first values?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=e862b74607724ff0a4d9212ddcb85dd7&_e=xB-N1a8ym-cw3P7GnXFxSkh7jNxUgLTMKKFl7ucKVW_aXBsvdLeopdTtnQbejX-VeFcYOERcZKgTeBDyfBoipVTgzgtAZUvd7K7Co_hx3MbTJtOFp9I5hSN9OQXTFvjPfPkYdmfud44cCwIWwzc6WDYCW5e9scn1jZH7Hz6A-YVcX2IVPWQ4Ye1DzHM2iWtO76fWrpY7zg0qqpnv04eiPmqZhG-o_oLwXTns5RO-Knzm29lgnhMieBzDWfEESMlYEWS_17vgk9S9FnGpgxAElI0LpZjhGkCTtqY4X1P_oZ56vIIelvemwFHw0iqljQei4cWZvW51r479McqxMgpThu0vyPrArAx8Tez7oJeYBD7-2Ib36wRVstBQotL2ufd9Pnko2pUFFGqJxe8mNvyI3haNeQUmHK6RvJUiGw4VZydI6_W9RF-SSUwKwHhrLzZdwKAcExK0Xi-J_Ol08BtTwE0bllMFbi-MC6DZ33IOpKjbG7WVZdgymGM9ujRH47Wm8JS9BJqVAFK3NH4M5WY_GQ%3D%3D) ** I look forward to seeing you in the district in the coming days. [1]Beto O'Rourke

Governor Greg Abbott has undermined science and public health at every
turn during the Covid-19 pandemic.

Now, as Abbott brags about stopping schools from requiring masks in the
classroom, Texas leads the nation in child Covid hospitalizations — again.

Governor Greg Abbott is failing the people of Texas. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51525?refcode=ema20220104-170026&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=170026%2E444211%2EZ7CM-f ]If you're ready to
do something today to help defeat Greg Abbott and elect Beto O'Rourke to
be our next governor, will you chip in $3 or more right now?

Amid the Omicron surge, Covid hospitalizations in Texas have doubled in
the past two weeks. They’ve tripled among children, making Texas the
national leader in child Covid hospitalizations for the second time in the
past year.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51525?refcode=ema20220104-170026&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=170026%2E444211%2EZ7CM-f ]The number of Texas kids hospitalized with COVID-19 nearly tripled in

But instead of protecting vulnerable Texans, especially our kids, Abbott
has:

* Mandated that cities, counties, and public schools cannot require
masks in the classroom and will be fined if they attempt to do so.
* Delayed support to local hospitals as they struggle to staff their
ICUs.
* Insisted nothing needs to change about his (lack of a) pandemic
response, even as cases and hospitalizations rise and our vaccination
rate lags behind the nation.

Under Abbott’s failed Covid-19 leadership, we’ve lost over 76,000 lives
and are now sending hundreds of children to the hospital with severe
illness. Texas urgently needs a leader focused on protecting us from this
ever-changing virus, and that’s what Beto will do as Governor.

But first, we need to do everything in our power to help Beto defeat
Abbott. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51525?refcode=ema20220104-170026&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=170026%2E444211%2EZ7CM-f ]Please, will you consider donating $3 today to

Texas deserves so much better than divisive policies, a bungled pandemic
response, and a governor who refuses to take responsibility for his

Let's win this,

Beto for Texas

body:
He’s the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S. history. | Fellow American,

I've been 100% clear on my opinion of Dr. Anthony Fauci. He's been dishonest, political, and partisan, distorting science to exercise authoritarian control and cover up his own conduct.

_**He is the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S history.**_

I've demanded the Department of Justice INVESTIGATE and PROSECUTE Fauci for lying to Congress when he claimed that the federal government and his NIH did not fund "gain-of-function" research in Wuhan, China.

And now, we have 221 pages of records obtained by Judicial Watch through a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit that provide DAMNING new evidence, including a grant application for research involving the coronavirus that was submitted back in 2018!

_When Fauci lied to Congress, he lied to the American people._

18 USC 1001 makes this a felony, punishable by up to 5 years in prison.

_We need to know the FULL EXTENT of what Fauci is attempting to hide!_

[**Take a stand to help me EXPOSE FAUCI >>>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=747d5d2362b643ebae50e889ef4b881a&_e=jur-qyMqrOW3nxTHt7dja4NRBeWNqX4ci-X46Q6DWIFPV6hAEwcIeEU8zIEW0Rgleg4X1FhkGtBvoWauJnAUwS_pXEvrxbKuWmEZQA14CWQJdGm6VhLrVXoXnwhqPwNL0IZoSDmY0zxt_SnK5KQG7g7S3YbdUp2sls_2psNYHzIKCrON9vIdLfcUU8wlFkHyoM6Vln62anDHUnbwHzmnv_SPpzOho1kRgdbnBpd_2HOog07K5FgdpczWC6Vbpm6nvs6nvTD2s91ZaES7SSgol7E1PktEf0pfpBiaWnY0MitavGMcHkR8ks14Vtvo3Y4xggonCg9cSNVdA-tIJcMI46X32yoPZvPZJuBNLcI_pdihTbZjzRs3P8oicRzvVCYujJXl2QxS_HWpzZNJpl-ucG-BnOCTJTZbPbfMYTfIgjEZYi_8gaeRNb5i0ac6e4f2Ns1Y8tev56U0go_3ZUgCVA%3D%3D)

This new evidence obtained by Judicial Watch shows that Fauci did indeed know about "gain-of-function" research and funding of the Wuhan coronavirus.

Fauci, the Biden administration, and the Fake News media can attack me all they want... **I _WILL NOT STOP_ fighting to expose how Fauci and his bureaucrat pals spent MILLIONS of U.S. taxpayer dollars to make viruses more harmful and deadly.**

[**Take action now to join me in this fight >>>** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=747d5d2362b643ebae50e889ef4b881a&_e=jur-qyMqrOW3nxTHt7dja4NRBeWNqX4ci-X46Q6DWIFPV6hAEwcIeEU8zIEW0Rgleg4X1FhkGtBvoWauJnAUwS_pXEvrxbKuWmEZQA14CWQJdGm6VhLrVXoXnwhqPwNL0IZoSDmY0zxt_SnK5KQG7g7S3YbdUp2sls_2psNYHzIKCrON9vIdLfcUU8wlFkHyoM6Vln62anDHUnbwHzmnv_SPpzOho1kRgdbnBpd_2HOog07K5FgdpczWC6Vbpm6nz3bckQ2RadB9unbuUhE5Fc5CRUCbNedU9fy9Q1O0zffgXPMkQ0eJXm_zrIp75ws2TQ8j842vvSWQIJQRk_EueoBmzoYuFp_9VdHpJQ8nF1TfzTajvCZ7d5I1JCTCFrqwCuqZhk2y9zl7o9-a-bpaA7n3KCmNI8QKdUJOhEabIlZUYWHU-KssKnVcYTcizg04U0dzJ-sULesBK55W4pqg7g%3D%3D)

Ted Cruz

clean_body: He’s the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S. history. | Fellow American, I've been 100% clear on my opinion of Dr. Anthony Fauci. He's been dishonest, political, and partisan, distorting science to exercise authoritarian control and cover up his own conduct. He is the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S history. I've demanded the Department of Justice INVESTIGATE and PROSECUTE Fauci for lying to Congress when he claimed that the federal government and his NIH did not fund "gain-of-function" research in Wuhan, China. And now, we have 221 pages of records obtained by Judicial Watch through a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit that provide DAMNING new evidence, including a grant application for research involving the coronavirus that was submitted back in 2018! When Fauci lied to Congress, he lied to the American people. 18 USC 1001 makes this a felony, punishable by up to 5 years in prison. We need to know the FULL EXTENT of what Fauci is attempting to hide! This new evidence obtained by Judicial Watch shows that Fauci did indeed know about "gain-of-function" research and funding of the Wuhan coronavirus. Fauci, the Biden administration, and the Fake News media can attack me all they want... I WILL NOT STOP fighting to expose how Fauci and his bureaucrat pals spent MILLIONS of U.S. taxpayer dollars to make viruses more harmful and deadly. For Liberty, Ted Cruz PS: And now Dr. Fauci says he supports new vaccine mandates and other onerous COIVD-19 restrictions on our freedoms- such as showing proof of vaccination to get on an airplane or even visit a private home! Dr. Fauci needs to go. YES – I Support Ted Cruz: Expose & Prosecute Fauci! If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Team -- Nearly one year since the deadly January 6th insurrection, the committee investigating the incident is _closer than ever_ to uncovering the truth about Trump’s involvement.

CNN _JUST_ reported that the January 6th panel has obtained “significant testimony” about Trump's actions while the U.S. Capitol was under attack -- details Trump fought tooth and nail to keep hidden from the American people.

With the full story still coming out and Trump’s allies STILL trying to hide the truth, we need to confirm that Americans support the work of this critical investigation. **Answer our urgent Live Poll by MIDNIGHT to help us reach our 20,000-response goal:**

name: BREAKING NEWS FOR YOU (via DCCC)
subject: RE: Twitter ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you support Twitter's permanent suspension of Marjorie Taylor Greene? >>

| | **_BREAKING NEWS:_
Twitter Permanently Suspends Trump Ally Marjorie Taylor Greene**

| | ****Did you see this?!

After MONTHS of spreading dangerous disinformation, Twitter FINALLY suspended top Trump ally Marjorie Taylor Greene.

_**But her Republican colleagues are FUMING ...**_

**... So we're calling on 50,000 grassroots supporters to let us know where they stand on Twitter's MONUMENTAL decision. **
---
[Let us know: Do you SUPPORT Twitter's permanent suspension of Marjorie Taylor Greene? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Twitter has finally booted ANOTHER dangerous Republican from the platform.

For MONTHS, we've been **OUTRAGED** to see the dangerous disinformation Marjorie Taylor Greene has spewed to her thousands of followers.

_She 's spread conspiracy theories about tragic school shootings. _

_She 's spread conspiracy theories about vaccines and COVID-19 safety efforts.

And she's even spread conspiracy theories about election fraud and the January 6 insurrection. _

That's why we were **THRILLED** to see Twitter take action and stop her from spreading even more lies.

But at this fragile moment for our democracy, we need to know our best grassroots supporters feel the same way.
**So quickly, let us know: Do you SUPPORT Twitter 's decision to permanently remove Marjorie Taylor Greene?******
| [YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/vWPEQ9N_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcXPg7_)
---|---|---
****

Thank you,

DCCC

subject: TX Freedom Caucus Members Endorses Van Taylor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Van Taylor Campaign
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=b3e4bdb3db&e=9920087750)
---
| | Peter,

The Texas Freedom Caucus has some of the most conservative legislators in Texas. Fighting the radical liberals in Austin, these representatives aren't afraid to roll up their sleeves and work to defend the Lone Star State. Van is honored to be endorsed by members of the Texas Freedom Caucus.
_"Van's reputation as an uncompromising, conservative trail blazer here in the Legislature is well-known. I am proud to endorse him for re-election"_
\- Rep. Mayes Middleton, Chairman, Texas Freedom Caucus
_"There is no doubt where he stands, and where he will fight. I want to keep Van Taylor in Washington so he can continue to stand up to Joe Biden and to protect our freedoms in Texas."_
\- Rep. Matt Schaefer, Vice-Chairman, Texas Freedom Caucus
_"Now in Congress, Van continues to be an example for conservative legislators nationwide. At a time when Democrats are becoming more and more extreme, we need to keep Van in Washington."_
\- Rep. Briscoe Cain, Member, Texas Freedom Caucus
_"Luckily, we have strong conservatives like Van Taylor in Congress who won’t bend to the demands of the radical left. Van was one of the most conservative in the Texas Legislature. He stood tall against the liberal mob then, and he hasn’t backed down since."_
\- Rep. Steve Toth, Member, Texas Freedom Caucus
Join them by adding your endorsement of Van today...
---
| [ENDORSE VAN TAYLOR >>](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=7f08a249e9&e=9920087750 "ENDORSE VAN TAYLOR >>")
---
| Thank you,

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Hey! I hope your new year is off to a good start.

Today, I wanted to take a moment to thank you. As you know, we asked a lot of you over the past few weeks as we raced toward our end-of-year deadline, and I’m proud to say we just had our best online fundraising month since we launched this campaign.

We are kicking off this critical election year in a strong position to flip Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat blue, and that couldn’t be more important. 2022 presents big challenges, but we have what it takes to make sure this is Ron Johnson’s last year in office.

When I got in this race, I promised to show up all across Wisconsin to build a statewide coalition that will help return this seat to the people of our state. From Ashland to Marinette to Janesville, and everywhere in between, we’re well on our way — but we’re also just getting started.

You see, showing up everywhere isn’t about checking a box for me. It’s about meeting with workers and families to hear about the kitchen table issues that matter most in their communities, and asking how I can help.

One thing I know for sure is that Wisconsinites deserve a U.S. Senator who actually fights for them and delivers real results — no matter how scrappy you have to be. That’s the job, and it’s why I’m running.

From our first campaign event in Milwaukee to our next one in Big Bend, I’m putting in the work (and the miles!) to make sure we are hearing about the challenges folks in our state are facing and what we can do to give them a little breathing room.

Look, Ron Johnson gave up the fight for working families a long time ago. I’m here to tell you that I never will. Growing up in western Wisconsin, my parents always taught me when you see something wrong, you have to stand up and do something about it. So that’s exactly what I’m doing.

You and I both know Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control, and defeating a two-term incumbent with the entire Republican establishment behind him will not be easy. But we have real momentum right now.

The latest poll in this race shows I'm the only Democrat who can defeat Ron Johnson, which means our job from now until Election Day is to grow and sustain that momentum to win this race. With your help, I know we can give Wisconsin workers and families leadership they can believe in again.

That's why I'm respectfully asking you to make your very first contribution of 2022 to my grassroots campaign for U.S. Senate. Your support today will allow us to make a critical investment in our early voter outreach program as we continue our work to defeat Ron Johnson and flip Wisconsin's Senate seat blue.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-january22

I’m ready to get to work in Washington to lower health care costs, restore voting rights, combat climate change, and make sure our country is ready to deal with pandemics like this one. But first, we need to win this race. I’m up for the challenge and ready to fight with everything I have to beat Ron Johnson; I need to know you’re with me.

Thanks for reading all the way through. I can’t tell you how much I appreciate it.

Forward!

— Sarah

Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat who is beating Ron Johnson in the latest poll of our race. With your help, we can flip this seat. Chip in to join our grassroots campaign:

Contribute: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-january2

Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
Sarah for Wisconsin
PO Box 166
Madison, WI 53701
United States
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are the best way for us to stay in touch, but if you need to go, please unsubscribe here: [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9a37a11b-b26d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c/bbac8bf5-d16d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmFjOGJmNS1kMTZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hhSoTwQO7MlrSe5epb0lMVoLwQsfTVRufXBi8WkE6xI=&id=121241219] If you only wish to receive our most important updates, submit this form for fewer emails [https://action.sarahforwisconsin.com/a/less-email]. If you'd like to support Sarah's campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin, please add a donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-donate?refcode=em2021&amount=10] to help us win.

Have a question? Reply to this email.

TAKE A LOOK AT OUR YEAR IN REVIEW VIDEO As we head into 2022, let’s keep up the momentum as we fight to bring our conservative Alaska values to the Senate. Thank you, Team Tshibaka | | | | ==

name: Dan Rowe, Organizing Director for Team Morgan Harper
subject: This will determine if we can stay in this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Ramping up our organizing program.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220104-496-footer-ak&t=2&akid=496%2E90090%2EX1-HQ2)
Hey there -- it’s Dan, the new Organizing Director for Team Morganize.
There’s a lot of energy around Morgan and our campaign right now, **especially since we just officially entered Election Year this week.** That means we need to ramp up our volunteering and organizing efforts — and fast.
I’ll be honest: Organizing takes hard work and dedication from our team, but it takes funds, too. **[Since Morgan isn’t taking a dollar from corporate PACs, we rely on grassroots supporters like you. So I have to ask: Can you chip in right now to help fuel our organizing efforts in 2022?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/19504?t=3&akid=496%2E90090%2EX1-HQ2)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/19510?refcode=em20220104-496&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=496%2E90090%2EX1-HQ2)**
Morgan is the only candidate who can turn out the base and flip this Senate seat blue. But first, we need to get her name on the primary ballot. That means we need 1,000 signatures from registered Ohio voters by February 2nd — and we need big events, as well as organizers going door to door, to get them all.
**That’s what your grassroots donations make possible.** Whether it’s $5 or $50, it helps us get out into the communities of Ohio and have meaningful conversations about Morgan’s candidacy and what she stands for. **[So please, make a donation today to help us organize our communities and send Morgan to the U.S. Senate.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/19504?t=23&akid=496%2E90090%2EX1-HQ2)**
Thank you for your time!
Let's do this, Team Morganize,
Dan Rowe

Organizing Director, Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220104-496-footer&t=24&refcode2=496_90090_X1-HQ2&akid=496%2E90090%2EX1-HQ2)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=496%2E90090%2EX1-HQ2)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

clean_body: Peter, Throughout the 2020 campaign, Joe Biden demagogued Donald Trump over COVID, blaming Trump for COVID cases while promising that he would "shut down the virus." But just recently, his tune changed after seeing his playbook of mandates and restrictions is failing. Incredibly, Joe Biden told governors from across the country that there "is no federal solution to COVID" and it is now "up to the states to figure things out." What a difference a year makes, Peter. Back in August, Biden told me to "get out of the way" if I wouldn't go along with his administration's authoritarian, lockdown COVID policies, guided by Dr. Fauci and his (political) "science." Now, after months of repeated policy failures and a new variant, Joe Biden has finally admitted that his central campaign promise of "shutting down the virus" was a lie. Fortunately, I never caved to Biden's ineffective and authoritarian government lockdowns and mandates in Florida. Instead, we've preserved individual liberty and freedom, kept businesses and schools open, and protected the livelihoods of our workers. And we did all of that while providing information, vaccines, and treatments to Floridians so they could make informed decisions that work best for their families. When the going got tough, Joe ran back to his basement. This isn't leadership. It's a systemic failure of the entire Biden administration and it deserves to be held accountable AND called out. That's why I'm running for reelection to ensure Biden's lockdowns and mandates never come to Florida. Thank you for stepping up and helping us continue the fight. Sincerely, Ron DeSantis "CONTRIBUTE" Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Cheri Beasley HQ
subject: NBC News: NC-Sen is one of the races “most likely to determine which party takes the Senate.”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
North Carolina’s open Senate seat will be one of the most competitive races this year
#

No exaggeration here: North Carolina’s open Senate seat will be one of the most competitive races this year — and could hold the fate of Democrats’ Senate majority. We’re not just saying that.
NBC News just named our race as one of the ones **“most likely to determine which party takes the Senate.”**
This is one of the most important races in the entire country in our fight to hold or expand the Senate majority. And we’re counting on a lot of people to fight alongside us to win.
**[Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign to send Cheri to the Senate and hold Democrats’ majority? We cannot take on the dark money and corporate interests without a LOT of grassroots support.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220104-1-ma&refcode2=232.357359.WQBY2X&t=1&akid=232%2E357359%2EWQBY2X)**
Winning North Carolina means we can make significant progress on health care, climate change, voting rights, and economic inequality.
But it will be tough. One of the most competitive races in one of the biggest, most diverse states in the country means this will also be among the most expensive races too.
**[We must get to work now to win the general election. So if you can, please consider making a $3 donation to our campaign to flip North Carolina. Winning a competitive race like this and delivering real change for working people requires each of us to do our part.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220104-1-ma&refcode2=232.357359.WQBY2X&t=2&akid=232%2E357359%2EWQBY2X)**

body:
Peter -- We hope everyone has had a Merry Christmas and fantastic holiday season! Now that we are... | Peter -- We hope everyone has had a **Merry Christmas** and fantastic holiday season! Now that we are back in action, we are happy to announce the **Go Red! Training** **Series** January Schedule:
* 1/11: **Campaign Sidekick** : [**RSVP**](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=FHnL8ikUv8WviObJjkW8kTR7ozFiVSYhzSu-2EwIkQAuUJXgkz7CWoeIBPDHDf3Gpzw13dM65NvK-ZE36FjDueo04XANE-y5oaoeSxA4F4JNcyuXL6LsiNJM1-MVMaAseV93SdFrRWQU5w6biqh2bQ&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_4_2022_go_red&n=1)
* Door knocking is the most effective method of getting out the vote! Campaign Sidekick is designed to make every aspect of voter-contact management easier.
* 1/18: **Voter Registration** : [**RSVP**](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=FHnL8ikUv8WviObJjkW8kTR7ozFiVSYhzSu-2EwIkQCquBriO6Ndwc8xMQ13NHjL4Qa2O_-pohR6O5BL6TSd3KVFin37KuLQzAboyRe_878mXpLcgpTTLcrHsSO4xZoEr6wTfSNFim_CtvteXz8D2A&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_4_2022_go_red&n=2)
* Voter Registration is absolutely crucial to our ability to elect republicans and building our base of support.
* 1/25: **Social Media** : [**RSVP**](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=FHnL8ikUv8WviObJjkW8kTR7ozFiVSYhzSu-2EwIkQBDuQp_Lw11nnTt-LnToCfhLyT-2Yj7TKJOWgoY7y90pN5vryXVQjVv4NrZak235Dm7e11USxFEplsszFJkiGOYi1N2AyCrqZWcZ-y7RdqHXw&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_4_2022_go_red&n=3)
* Communicating to voters and mobilizing your activists is crucial, and proper social media helps accomplish this.
* 2/1: **Volunteer Recruitment** : [**RSVP**](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=FHnL8ikUv8WviObJjkW8kTR7ozFiVSYhzSu-2EwIkQAJoYGr0EVRJnJmPuyWwkV3Y7yRLwLG2RRGZ4i-WPrObtxpEQiC11jQJWEjgz-mdQSZ8w0YP-3EBlxAxp9zsNre0plMy5-Za-6plzktitrqKg&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_4_2022_go_red&n=4)
* No grassroots goal can be accomplished without volunteers! This training goes over the best practices of how to get them.
* 2/8: **Campaign Sidekick** : [**RSVP**](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=FHnL8ikUv8WviObJjkW8kTR7ozFiVSYhzSu-2EwIkQACNI8WWSsmY8Eme2EFuJUpiFGZm22X1icFArsBIc1ks87m5Bg1NJ1paPfV96trIv3PHPXF3K8zbDgFu1b3ef3O6YbDK-8uzgF-cLUz697UnQ&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_4_2022_go_red&n=5)
* Door knocking is the most effective method of getting out the vote! Campaign Sidekick is designed to make every aspect of voter-contact management easier.
* 2/15: **Voter Registration** : [**RSVP**](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=FHnL8ikUv8WviObJjkW8kTR7ozFiVSYhzSu-2EwIkQCPwJWFXW76St61-R3eg8rpYhlkFjPVrTqnlVpPMwFn60kHfJy-FVzpXK_0lfnG7yFg91S2BnFs7L1dns3L4jnWd7TDp3h0yXWbkujoM0uw5A&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_4_2022_go_red&n=6)
* Voter Registration is absolutely crucial to our ability to elect republicans and building our base of support.
* 2/22: **Voter Contact** : [**RSVP**](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=FHnL8ikUv8WviObJjkW8kTR7ozFiVSYhzSu-2EwIkQBOaXNkNoG3UbBuwiL_8Exuk9ZOHUI9NjjjCDcbmzyVIV3gpC204UmqVBrfZ5ZM5jhsI8sFm5kom9tPvId9e-W2cDiD4a3pIp7RJ0VfMr9vfg&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_4_2022_go_red&n=7)
* Best practices of successful door knocking and phone banking.
* 2/24: **Precinct Organization** : [**RSVP**](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=FHnL8ikUv8WviObJjkW8kTR7ozFiVSYhzSu-2EwIkQCGtBJ7xGigoh-sgObA7rMMJRelbC3orlFQhlZbO5YlyHy5be8TPT9Ca4pK4XzAqGJ4W8JpiWF5-ffs9QKGOoAijLvSNnhyjLojEHemGK5K1g&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_4_2022_go_red&n=8)
* Our party is BUILT on the work of our Precinct Chairs and their committees. Knowing the best practices is necessary for being successful in the role.

We need to work together to protect our seats in North Carolina and retake Congress. Getting trained is crucial in doing so! We hope to see everyone there! **Note:** Each training will have a slot for 1 p.m. and 6 p.m. respectively and the Zoom invite will be sent out on the morning of the relevant training. Respectfully, Josh Fritz Data Director, NCGOP
[](http://www.nc.gop/?e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_4_2022_go_red&n=9)[http://www.nc.gop/](http://www.nc.gop/?e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_4_2022_go_red&n=10)

name: Steve Chabot
subject: 2022 ISSUES SURVEY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chabot for Congress
body:
In 2021 we were able to accomplish a lot fighting back against Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi. I am grateful for the opportunity to serve you in Congress Friend, In 2021 we were able to accomplish a lot fighting back against Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi. I am grateful for the opportunity to serve you in Congress and I’m looking forward to the momentum we have going into 2022. name: Rebecca Parson
subject: 24-hour frozen ordeal
body:
Hi there, Drivers in Virginia just spent 24 hours stuck on a freezing highway without food or water. Why? Because of a 6-truck pileup during a winter storm. [**Instead of fixing infrastructure, Congress has been busy sneaking $275 billion in tax cuts for the rich into the Build Back Better bill. We need a federal jobs guarantee that pays millions of workers to fix our decrepit infrastructure — not more bailouts for millionaires! If you agree, please donate now to help me win my election, so I can fight for that in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40366989/324053557/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmE4OTVkZC1kYTZkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4vksC_m3WlW64CXVmTK5jARTJzs054DDVB2Fpr6y1qM=) Meanwhile, Japan has suspension monorail trains and China has giant above-ground aqueducts for cargo ships — essentially water highways for cargo ships to travel hundreds of feet above ground. Simply put, we don’t need a mandatory booster shot to fix America, we NEED a booster wall. But while the radical Left goes on its out-of-touch socialist crusade, I’m going directly to grassroots patriots like YOU to form our campaign’s strategy for victory this election year. That’s why to kick off 2022, I’ve commissioned my very own Election Year Priorities Survey to get your input on the critical matters that will decide the fate of our race for Texas’ new seat – and consequently, the fate of the entire House majority. body:
Did you see what Kamala Harris said, Fellow American?
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0395c12bca9144bcbbeedf0ce7129af1&_e=gw3IgXuXGn_mjtBp3UQ96vXG8t7uUnKILAce7bkoP9sEWdI4nYTk5iFHEb7YLz7wCdnR-ognSr1qivEJulizw-JBIXpgr-VUIVyKuJVzs9uxsGjk8ThId7uO8ig_zEMrjRC648yXPe_N4jCdocrEBCLtA3ylC5n-Fwzu_1kV1uRB3yyrMny0pOpeunqLzRlrmf8FGlf883id25SPDabxuJFK76bBDmGCEau2wFIgR4GQh1STETRq0HNUaV6nM7L0OdrOUhBCgOdT31Gtxs8_ogLyrYBheL6ynnF0gMh_pqFXgSpgKvZarOxbdhcyEt0rGFfyTwz-pzv7IFWY3tuFW23SaoFNxIFl1ByOiDxJOrtXES-i7mpNJd2VeJSGxBE52pIQmv1wYMv2MU5TGicNXjQZay63xBLUGsBYjj0_XgQxv9hzLi43iPqTVH1G5KVK)

---
| Fellow American, why am I not surprised?

_**FIRST**_ we had every single Democrat blaming our 45th President for Covid-19, when it was China, not Donald Trump, who lied and allowed this virus to spread throughout the world.

_**THEN**_ the Democrats running the U.S. government refused to do the right thing and chose not to hold China responsible for this pandemic.

_**NOW**_ we have all the same Democrats like Kamala Harris saying that no one is to blame, despite spending all of 2020 pointing fingers at everyone but the Communist Government of China.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0395c12bca9144bcbbeedf0ce7129af1&_e=gw3IgXuXGn_mjtBp3UQ96vXG8t7uUnKILAce7bkoP9sEWdI4nYTk5iFHEb7YLz7wCdnR-ognSr1qivEJulizw-JBIXpgr-VUIVyKuJVzs9uxsGjk8ThId7uO8ig_zEMrjRC648yXPe_N4jCdocrEBCLtA3ylC5n-Fwzu_1kV1uRB3yyrMny0pOpeunqLzRlrmf8FGlf883id25SPDabxuJFK76bBDmGCEau2wFIgR4Hl7VihaVpt2O82-rs4b5KyVOPMyG79TLOUKNwo22d7glqY45okh87-Lur7XxKSKeq-kfgJUGXisAFNG3oD37e9hsIQ9jkXigKPYBsLrbqaoP-BD5-LMWCMvT3xNF15_q3RTRT4btMHUzYbJiet0yl79WDAE6Y5wsR909tVkAi_2VyC7WC26tmjOlCVSolJTdOBlU-piz4v5BTXdzuyV7uW)
**How much more of their lying politics are you willing to put up with Fellow American?**

I mean we’re seriously at a point where our own government hides from the people or deceives us on a daily basis. [**WE HAVE TO DO SOMETHING!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0395c12bca9144bcbbeedf0ce7129af1&_e=gw3IgXuXGn_mjtBp3UQ96vXG8t7uUnKILAce7bkoP9sEWdI4nYTk5iFHEb7YLz7wCdnR-ognSr1qivEJulizw-JBIXpgr-VUIVyKuJVzs9uxsGjk8ThId7uO8ig_zEMrjRC648yXPe_N4jCdocrEBCLtA3ylC5n-Fwzu_1kV1uRB3yyrMny0pOpeunqLzRlrmf8FGlf883id25SPDabxuJFK76bBDmGCEau2wFIgR4HINukVwypkCHeXT-B2PLMPpxWjnnZpltpvcGsmrjaOlIwo7PxyN1ngy1qHQ0kgc0TimLSUizLeqMWZfI2584dWJOEELEnfJzc5l1iH_FZPp6EPcnzw5ccFrHXYzdnxXcWiNz3icEdBoqRTfVptNHDqrkT3-3NzvA-SwyItwJfvvv3fPFqhyLEtTJ38I6sLmjKkpC2EhyOEtgxJGBnh71Tn)

**The first place we need start with is Congress.** If my fellow Republicans and I can win back Congress, then we can stop the endless power grabs, the wasteful spending, and defend the rights that Democrats have been trying to replace.

[**I need your help**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0395c12bca9144bcbbeedf0ce7129af1&_e=gw3IgXuXGn_mjtBp3UQ96vXG8t7uUnKILAce7bkoP9sEWdI4nYTk5iFHEb7YLz7wCdnR-ognSr1qivEJulizw-JBIXpgr-VUIVyKuJVzs9uxsGjk8ThId7uO8ig_zEMrjRC648yXPe_N4jCdocrEBCLtA3ylC5n-Fwzu_1kV1uRB3yyrMny0pOpeunqLzRlrmf8FGlf883id25SPDabxuJFK76bBDmGCEau2wFIgR4E1kz31r__XCLiPsZ1MfgjY5L0j8F2VXQCcrD6BDdhDvPirIjZI02fq81PPw5yeH_64H5HKtcp9CFSedgjLEiojd9vsaU_MwkWAU84vrkL9tHvgwjwQsR0GUSLIqROw0ZdT9h2yRZ1uTIzb9BqViBOZCHhVOmZV1Q_bGlvx3oIdEYUlmwZNZyaH_nUxJFq-h3PS7HCUwQUGPWfE0PEE48XY) if we’re going to have a fighting chance of doing that. [**Your support**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0395c12bca9144bcbbeedf0ce7129af1&_e=gw3IgXuXGn_mjtBp3UQ96vXG8t7uUnKILAce7bkoP9sEWdI4nYTk5iFHEb7YLz7wCdnR-ognSr1qivEJulizw-JBIXpgr-VUIVyKuJVzs9uxsGjk8ThId7uO8ig_zEMrjRC648yXPe_N4jCdocrEBCLtA3ylC5n-Fwzu_1kV1uRB3yyrMny0pOpeunqLzRlrmf8FGlf883id25SPDabxuJFK76bBDmGCEau2wFIgR4GLJiYyNv_EwkBjhZyN42atkqetXybovKFUYfAVtzdiSxYpTKZyRK7sW921NivOGcxLxQ0c0cGgf_f3ysHUS-ZtIQXzuzKUvGfNa6b0FXISY5NajSLEER95gb9g7wBgcCwEvsfvGefKf1lF4toojzu82oDF9RT8PopEKqoEXNwb-J32kvWV6MSHRgwLZR0WUvIOg-QogmpV5wxH-iojwrh-) is the difference between freedom or new mandates, truth or more lies.

[**I don’t know about you friend, but I’m tired of the mandates and deception, so if you are too, then please chip in today and help me win us a majority in Congress.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0395c12bca9144bcbbeedf0ce7129af1&_e=gw3IgXuXGn_mjtBp3UQ96vXG8t7uUnKILAce7bkoP9sEWdI4nYTk5iFHEb7YLz7wCdnR-ognSr1qivEJulizw-JBIXpgr-VUIVyKuJVzs9uxsGjk8ThId7uO8ig_zEMrjRC648yXPe_N4jCdocrEBCLtA3ylC5n-Fwzu_1kV1uRB3yyrMny0pOpeunqLzRlrmf8FGlf883id25SPDabxuJFK76bBDmGCEau2wFIgR4HNjSJQtzgpvnozgYXRLr5rNi2MfjCBESjSjebqq0z1KClQyhfvzPCjuYW8G9zXiFCnFkgJqorJL6ICUHbZlgeue87nyjFwH3ExoRSpekTHDtCGYXQ7l9Xv6W6a34kF5HcxI1jhiS6r1Apiae1kKxyFD9r9mokHlgmAkln0dAJ_9NsMFtNxWlGEcdUbol_pvTHvvMGHD-qgpoBGl7P5rOlU)

With your help Fellow American, we can win this.

I've demanded the Department of Justice INVESTIGATE and PROSECUTE Fauci for lying to Congress when he claimed that the federal government and his NIH did not fund "gain-of-function" research in Wuhan, China. And now, we have 221 pages of records obtained by Judicial Watch through a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit that provide DAMNING new evidence, including a grant application for research involving the coronavirus that was submitted back in 2018! When Fauci lied to Congress, he lied to the American people. 18 USC 1001 makes this a felony, punishable by up to 5 years in prison. We need to know the FULL EXTENT of what Fauci is attempting to hide! This new evidence obtained by Judicial Watch shows that Fauci did indeed know about "gain-of-function" research and funding of the Wuhan coronavirus. Fauci, the Biden administration, and the Fake News media can attack me all they want... body:
As we enter this critical phase of our campaign, we’re checking in with grassroots supporters — like you — who make our movement so powerful.
#
It’s officially Election Year!
As we enter this critical next phase of our campaign, we’re checking in with grassroots supporters (like you!) who make our movement so powerful. [**Will you take a moment to complete our Official Team Erica Strategy Survey?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-202201-survey/?source=em20220104-742&t=1&akid=742%2E3698%2EXRqxK1)
**Erica is ready to challenge the status quo, defeat our Republican opponent — and January 6th insurrectionist — Sandy Smith, and deliver NC-02 for the people.**
But to ensure our collective success, we need to have a powerful campaign strategy in place. Now that we’re officially in the election year, we’re hoping to get your perspective. [**If you have a moment, please fill out our brief survey. Erica is looking forward to hearing directly from you.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-202201-survey/?source=em20220104-742&t=2&akid=742%2E3698%2EXRqxK1)
**[Start the survey](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-202201-survey/?source=em20220104-742&t=3&akid=742%2E3698%2EXRqxK1)**
Unlike North Carolina Republicans who are attempting to gerrymander their way to winning this seat and silencing voters for their own political power, Erica is running to uplift our voices.
That means Erica needs to hear regularly and directly from folks like you — the very people she’s running to fight for in Congress. [**So, will share your thoughts with us today?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-202201-survey/?source=em20220104-742&t=4&akid=742%2E3698%2EXRqxK1)
Thank you in advance!
— Erica Smith HQ

body:
I need your help to call out her double standard.
| [](https://links.salazarforflorida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=7852c23ddb7b4f499404f8353dba7cfd&_e=IwKZWOWwEJXIKluxoD6eQlyFeRx_UXHbkClUHTPT3B7ReobWbhfwKAAIBDUJV1OPRKulu-1ipcjogS703T0fOuLo4IqNDpBF2zMleuafT8UhpMqNpqvu-tLYk896CrB8oUEl7NqFTjyQ0In_qhTd9c68uJxvQKEI174362u4hcxE0592KUHep5plEDiRks1COaHsiDjF5tLU4x3CpP8h8B92rtkuOQx9cQMVmXTW45Um0MPoD0oW8BAFDxmdCI7T0GbHhu0i_hWQ0FGFwJMzX_IbkbIP2qPO8i9NYgEibipsQIcYzndVwZl3zO47tVYv1T0ud8hlWjFRhtLpFL0sEp5MzhDDYBoyq8q-_Wlb6dkABkRSXIEVxKsEiMOqkMBigOZo_FNqPMoHDGfh2LDDVpoEqC6rZVHVEek5U1PwTL0XNg6wPyYhJSfh8mw6laRpA_Ejr1hFkhstVWqAJM_Tbsmz7B9cfem3QFiH8Le7YBho2f95LDl5uJVc8oBcwdod)
---
Peter,
---
Socialists like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez love to force you to live by a set of rules that they themselves don’t follow.
---
_While she supports tyrannical lockdowns in her home state of New York, she’s happy to vacation to Florida and enjoy our states’ freedom by partying at packed bars._
---
